papers.title: Agentic Video Generation: From Text to Executable Event Graphs via Tool-Constrained LLM Planning
papers.abstract: Existing multi-agent video generation systems use LLM agents to orchestrate neural video generators, producing visually impressive but semantically unreliable outputs with no ground truth annotations. We present an agentic system that inverts this paradigm: instead of generating pixels, the LLM constructs a formal Graph of Events in Space and Time (GEST) -- a structured specification of actors, actions, objects, and temporal constraints -- which is then executed deterministically in a 3D game engine. A staged LLM refinement pipeline fails entirely at this task (0 of 50 attempts produce an executable specification), motivating a fundamentally different architecture based on a separation of concerns: the LLM handles narrative planning through natural language reasoning, while a programmatic state backend enforces all simulator constraints through validated tool calls, guaranteeing that every generated specification is executable by construction. The system uses a hierarchical two-agent architecture -- a Director that plans the story and a Scene Builder that constructs individual scenes through a round-based state machine -- with dedicated Relation Subagents that populate the logical and semantic edge types of the GEST formalism that procedural generation leaves empty, making this the first approach to exercise the full expressive capacity of the representation. We evaluate in two stages: autonomous generation against procedural baselines via a 3-model LLM jury, where agentic narratives win 79% of text and 74% of video comparisons; and seeded generation where the same text is given to our system, VEO 3.1, and WAN 2.2, with human annotations showing engine-generated videos substantially outperform neural generators on physical validity (58% vs 25% and 20%) and semantic alignment (3.75/5 vs 2.33 and 1.50).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种代理式视频生成系统，用LLM构建可执行事件图并在3D引擎中确定性执行，解决神经生成器语义不可靠问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经视频生成器输出视觉效果好但语义不可靠，缺乏真实标注，且LLM直接生成可执行规范完全失败。
analysis.problem: 如何生成语义可靠、物理有效且可执行的结构化视频规范。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：分阶段LLM精炼管线在50次尝试中全部失败，无法生成可执行规范；而分离关注点的架构能保证每次生成都可执行。
analysis.method: 提出分层双智能体架构（导演+场景构建器），LLM负责叙事规划，程序化状态后端通过验证工具调用强制模拟器约束，并引入关系子智能体填充GEST形式中的逻辑和语义边类型。
contributions: 首次提出用LLM构建可执行事件图（GEST）并在3D引擎中确定性执行的代理式视频生成范式
设计分层双智能体架构和关系子智能体，保证生成规范的可执行性并充分利用GEST表达能力
analysis.experiments: 两阶段评估：自主生成与程序化基线对比（3模型LLM评审，代理叙事在文本和视频比较中分别胜出79%和74%）；种子生成与VEO 3.1、WAN 2.2对比（人工标注显示引擎生成视频在物理有效性上58% vs 25%和20%，语义对齐上3.75/5 vs 2.33和1.50）。
limitations: 依赖3D游戏引擎，可能限制视觉多样性
叙事规划可能受LLM推理能力瓶颈影响
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种代理式视频生成系统，用LLM构建可执行事件图并在3D引擎中确定性执行，解决神经生成器语义不可靠问题。

papers.title: DeepShapeMatchingKit: Accelerated Functional Map Solver and Shape Matching Pipelines Revisited
papers.abstract: Deep functional maps, leveraging learned feature extractors and spectral correspondence solvers, are fundamental to non-rigid 3D shape matching. Based on an analysis of open-source implementations, we find that standard functional map implementations solve k independent linear systems serially, which is a computational bottleneck at higher spectral resolution. We thus propose a vectorized reformulation that solves all systems in a single kernel call, achieving up to a 33x speedup while preserving the exact solution. Furthermore, we identify and document a previously unnoticed implementation divergence in the spatial gradient features of the mainstay DiffusionNet: two variants that parameterize distinct families of tangent-plane transformations, and present experiments analyzing their respective behaviors across diverse benchmarks. We additionally revisit overlap prediction evaluation for partial-to-partial matching and show that balanced accuracy provides a useful complementary metric under varying overlap ratios. To share these advancements with the wider community, we present an open-source codebase, DeepShapeMatchingKit, that incorporates these improvements and standardizes training, evaluation, and data pipelines for common deep shape matching methods. The codebase is available at: https://github.com/xieyizheng/DeepShapeMatchingKit

analysis.tldr: 提出向量化求解加速功能映射，发现DiffusionNet梯度特征实现分歧，并发布开源形状匹配工具包。
analysis.research_motivation: 非刚性3D形状匹配中，功能映射方法在高谱分辨率下因串行求解多个线性系统而成为计算瓶颈，且现有开源实现中存在未文档化的实现分歧，影响方法复现与公平比较。
analysis.problem: 加速功能映射求解器并标准化形状匹配流程，同时澄清实现分歧。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准功能映射实现串行求解k个独立线性系统，在高谱分辨率下成为计算瓶颈；DiffusionNet的空间梯度特征存在两种变体，参数化不同的切平面变换族，导致行为差异。
analysis.method: 提出向量化重公式，将多个线性系统合并为单个核调用求解，实现精确解的同时加速；分析DiffusionNet梯度特征变体；引入平衡准确率作为部分匹配的补充指标。
contributions: 提出向量化功能映射求解器，实现高达33倍加速且保持精确解。
发现并文档化DiffusionNet梯度特征的实现分歧，并通过实验分析其行为。
发布开源代码库DeepShapeMatchingKit，标准化训练、评估和数据流程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在多个基准上分析了梯度特征变体的行为。
limitations: 加速方法可能仅适用于特定谱分辨率范围。
未讨论对其他特征提取器的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出向量化求解加速功能映射，发现DiffusionNet梯度特征实现分歧，并发布开源形状匹配工具包。

papers.title: Beyond Monologue: Interactive Talking-Listening Avatar Generation with Conversational Audio Context-Aware Kernels
papers.abstract: Audio-driven human video generation has achieved remarkable success in monologue scenarios, largely driven by advancements in powerful video generation foundation models. Moving beyond monologues, authentic human communication is inherently a full-duplex interactive process, requiring virtual agents not only to articulate their own speech but also to react naturally to incoming conversational audio. Most existing methods simply extend conventional audio-driven paradigms to listening scenarios. However, relying on strict frame-to-frame alignment renders the model's response to long-range conversational dynamics rigid, whereas directly introducing global attention catastrophically degrades lip synchronization. Recognizing the unique temporal Scale Discrepancy between talking and listening behaviors, we introduce a multi-head Gaussian kernel to explicitly inject this physical intuition into the model as a progressive temporal inductive bias. Building upon this, we construct a full-duplex interactive virtual agent capable of simultaneously processing dual-stream audio inputs for both talking and listening. Furthermore, we introduce a rigorously cleaned Talking-Listening dataset VoxHear featuring perfectly decoupled speech and background audio tracks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach successfully fuses strong temporal alignment with deep contextual semantics, setting a new state-of-the-art for generating highly natural and responsive full-duplex interactive digital humans. The project page is available at https://warmcongee.github.io/beyond-monologue/ .

analysis.tldr: 提出多头部高斯核作为渐进时间归纳偏置，实现全双工交互式虚拟人视频生成，兼顾唇同步与对话上下文感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频驱动视频生成主要针对独白场景，而真实人类交流是全双工交互过程，需要虚拟代理既能说话又能对传入音频做出自然反应。现有方法在倾听场景中依赖严格帧对齐导致对长程对话动态响应僵硬，而直接引入全局注意力会严重破坏唇同步。
analysis.problem: 如何在全双工交互式虚拟人视频生成中同时实现高精度唇同步和对长程对话上下文的自然响应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 说话与倾听行为存在独特的时间尺度差异（temporal Scale Discrepancy），导致现有方法难以兼顾帧对齐的精确性和全局上下文的灵活性。
analysis.method: 引入多头部高斯核（multi-head Gaussian kernel）作为渐进时间归纳偏置，显式注入说话与倾听时间尺度差异的物理直觉；构建全双工交互虚拟代理，同时处理说话和倾听双流音频输入。
contributions: 提出多头部高斯核作为渐进时间归纳偏置，解决说话与倾听时间尺度差异问题。
构建全双工交互虚拟代理，支持同时处理双流音频输入。
发布VoxHear数据集，具有完美解耦的语音和背景音轨。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在生成自然且响应灵敏的全双工交互数字人方面达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量双流音频数据，实际应用中获取困难。
多头部高斯核的设计可能增加模型复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多头部高斯核作为渐进时间归纳偏置，实现全双工交互式虚拟人视频生成，兼顾唇同步与对话上下文感知。

papers.title: Multinex: Lightweight Low-light Image Enhancement via Multi-prior Retinex
papers.abstract: Low-light image enhancement (LLIE) aims to restore natural visibility, color fidelity, and structural detail under severe illumination degradation. State-of-the-art (SOTA) LLIE techniques often rely on large models and multi-stage training, limiting practicality for edge deployment. Moreover, their dependence on a single color space introduces instability and visible exposure or color artifacts. To address these, we propose Multinex, an ultra-lightweight structured framework that integrates multiple fine-grained representations within a principled Retinex residual formulation. It decomposes an image into illumination and color prior stacks derived from distinct analytic representations, and learns to fuse these representations into luminance and reflectance adjustments required to correct exposure. By prioritizing enhancement over reconstruction and exploiting lightweight neural operations, Multinex significantly reduces computational cost, exemplified by its lightweight (45K parameters) and nano (0.7K parameters) versions. Extensive benchmarks show that all lightweight variants significantly outperform their corresponding lightweight SOTA models, and reach comparable performance to heavy models. Paper page available at https://albrateanu.github.io/multinex.

analysis.tldr: 提出超轻量级低光图像增强框架Multinex，通过多先验Retinex分解和融合实现高效增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法依赖大模型和多阶段训练，难以部署在边缘设备，且单一色彩空间导致不稳定和伪影。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持增强质量的同时大幅降低模型参数量和计算成本，并解决单一色彩空间带来的不稳定问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Multinex框架，将图像分解为光照和颜色先验堆栈（来自不同解析表示），并通过轻量神经网络学习融合这些表示为亮度和反射率调整，以校正曝光。
contributions: 提出超轻量级结构化框架Multinex，结合多先验Retinex残差公式。
实现45K参数（轻量版）和0.7K参数（纳米版）的极低参数量，性能超越同量级SOTA模型，接近大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上，所有轻量变体显著优于对应轻量级SOTA模型，并达到与重型模型相当的性能。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景的泛化能力有限。
多先验堆栈的设计可能引入额外超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超轻量级低光图像增强框架Multinex，通过多先验Retinex分解和融合实现高效增强。

papers.title: ClawVM: Harness-Managed Virtual Memory for Stateful Tool-Using LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Stateful tool-using LLM agents treat the context window as working memory, yet today's agent harnesses manage residency and durability as best-effort, causing recurring failures: lost state after compaction, bypassed flushes on reset, and destructive writeback. We present \textsc{ClawVM}, a virtual memory layer that manages state as typed pages with minimum-fidelity invariants, multi-resolution representations under a token budget, and validated writeback at every lifecycle boundary. Because the harness already assembles prompts, mediates tools, and observes lifecycle events, it is the natural enforcement point; placing the contract there makes residency and durability deterministic and auditable. Across synthetic workloads, 12 real-session traces, and adversarial stress tests, \textsc{ClawVM} eliminates all policy-controllable faults whenever the minimum-fidelity set fits within the token budget, confirmed by an offline oracle, and adds median <50 microseconds of policy-engine overhead per turn.

analysis.tldr: ClawVM 为有状态工具使用的 LLM Agent 引入虚拟内存层，通过最小保真度不变性、多分辨率表示和验证写回，消除上下文窗口中的状态丢失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 LLM Agent 的上下文窗口作为工作内存，但现有管理机制缺乏确定性，导致状态在压缩、重置或写回时丢失，影响 Agent 的可靠性和持久性。
analysis.problem: 如何为有状态工具使用的 LLM Agent 提供确定性的状态管理，避免上下文窗口中的状态丢失和损坏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前 Agent 管理机制存在三类典型故障：压缩后状态丢失、重置时绕过刷新、破坏性写回，这些故障源于缺乏对状态驻留和持久性的确定性保证。
analysis.method: 提出 ClawVM 虚拟内存层，将状态管理为类型化页面，引入最小保真度不变性、在 token 预算下的多分辨率表示，并在每个生命周期边界执行验证写回。
contributions: 提出 ClawVM 虚拟内存层，为 LLM Agent 提供确定性的状态驻留和持久性保证。
设计最小保真度不变性、多分辨率表示和验证写回机制，消除策略可控故障。
在合成工作负载、12 个真实会话轨迹和对抗性压力测试中验证，所有最小保真度集在 token 预算内时故障为零。
analysis.experiments: 在合成工作负载、12 个真实会话轨迹和对抗性压力测试中评估，ClawVM 消除了所有策略可控故障（当最小保真度集在 token 预算内时），且每轮策略引擎开销中位数小于 50 微秒。
limitations: 依赖离线 oracle 验证故障消除，实际部署中 oracle 可能不可用。
最小保真度集超出 token 预算时可能仍存在故障。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClawVM 为有状态工具使用的 LLM Agent 引入虚拟内存层，通过最小保真度不变性、多分辨率表示和验证写回，消除上下文窗口中的状态丢失问题。

papers.title: Multi-modal, multi-scale representation learning for satellite imagery analysis just needs a good ALiBi
papers.abstract: Vision foundation models have been shown to be effective at processing satellite imagery into representations fit for downstream tasks, however, creating models which operate over multiple spatial resolutions and modes is challenging. This paper presents Scale-ALiBi, a linear bias transformer attention mechanism with a spatial encoding bias to relationships between image patches at different ground sample distance scales. We provide an implementation of Scale-ALiBi over a dataset of aligned high- and low-resolution optical and low-resolution SAR satellite imagery data using a triple-contrastive and reconstructive architecture, show an improvement on the GEO-Bench benchmark, and release the newly curated dataset publicly.

analysis.tldr: 提出Scale-ALiBi注意力机制，实现多模态多尺度卫星图像表征学习，在GEO-Bench上取得提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 卫星图像分析需要处理多空间分辨率和多模态数据，现有视觉基础模型难以同时适应不同尺度和模态。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能同时处理多空间分辨率（不同地面采样距离）和多模态（光学与SAR）卫星图像的视觉基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Scale-ALiBi，一种线性偏置的Transformer注意力机制，通过空间编码偏置来建模不同尺度图像块之间的关系；采用三重对比和重建架构，在配准的高低分辨率光学和低分辨率SAR数据上训练。
contributions: 提出Scale-ALiBi注意力机制，支持多尺度空间编码。
构建并公开了配准的多模态多尺度卫星图像数据集。
在GEO-Bench基准上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在GEO-Bench基准上进行了评估，显示改进，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定卫星图像模态和分辨率组合。
未讨论计算效率或大规模扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Scale-ALiBi注意力机制，实现多模态多尺度卫星图像表征学习，在GEO-Bench上取得提升。

papers.title: Context Matters: Vision-Based Depression Detection Comparing Classical and Deep Approaches
papers.abstract: The classical approach to detecting depression from vision emphasizes interpretable features, such as facial expression, and classifiers such as the Support Vector Machine (SVM). With the advent of deep learning, there has been a shift in feature representations and classification approaches. Contemporary approaches use learnt features from general-purpose vision models such as VGGNet to train machine learning models. Little is known about how classical and deep approaches compare in depression detection with respect to accuracy, fairness, and generalizability, especially across contexts. To address these questions, we compared classical and deep approaches to the detection of depression in the visual modality in two different contexts: Mother-child interactions in the TPOT database and patient-clinician interviews in the Pitt database. In the former, depression was operationalized as a history of depression per the DSM and current or recent clinically significant symptoms. In the latter, all participants met initial criteria for depression per DSM, and depression was reassessed over the course of treatment. The classical approach included handcrafted features with SVM classifiers. Learnt features were turn-level embeddings from the FMAE-IAT that were combined with Multi-Layer Perceptron classifiers. The classical approach achieved higher accuracy in both contexts. It was also significantly fairer than the deep approach in the patient-clinician context. Cross-context generalizability was modest at best for both approaches, which suggests that depression may be context-specific.

analysis.tldr: 经典方法（手工特征+SVM）在视觉抑郁检测中准确率和公平性均优于深度学习方法，但跨场景泛化能力有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究缺乏对经典和深度方法在抑郁检测中准确性、公平性和泛化性的系统比较，尤其是跨不同交互场景。
analysis.problem: 比较经典（手工特征+SVM）和深度（VGGNet/自监督嵌入+MLP）方法在视觉抑郁检测中的表现，并评估其跨场景泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经典方法在两个不同场景（母婴互动和医患访谈）中均取得更高准确率，且在医患场景中公平性显著优于深度方法；两种方法的跨场景泛化能力均较弱，提示抑郁检测可能具有场景特异性。
analysis.method: 经典方法使用手工特征（如面部表情）和SVM分类器；深度方法使用VGGNet或FMAE-IAT提取的嵌入特征结合MLP分类器。
contributions: 首次系统比较经典与深度方法在视觉抑郁检测中的准确性、公平性和泛化性
揭示抑郁检测的场景特异性，指出跨场景泛化的局限性
analysis.experiments: 在两个数据集（TPOT母婴互动和Pitt医患访谈）上比较经典和深度方法，经典方法准确率更高，深度方法在医患场景中存在公平性问题。
limitations: 仅涉及两个特定场景，可能无法推广到更多样化的环境
未深入分析深度方法公平性较差的具体原因
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 经典方法（手工特征+SVM）在视觉抑郁检测中准确率和公平性均优于深度学习方法，但跨场景泛化能力有限。

papers.title: VeriTrans: Fine-Tuned LLM-Assisted NL-to-PL Translation via a Deterministic Neuro-Symbolic Pipeline
papers.abstract: \textbf{VeriTrans} is a reliability-first ML system that compiles natural-language requirements into solver-ready logic with validator-gated reliability. The pipeline integrates an instruction-tuned NL$\!\to\!$PL translator, round-trip reconstruction (PL$\!\to\!$NL) used as a high-precision acceptance gate, and canonical PL$\!\to\!$CNF compilation, all executed via fixed API configuration (temperature$=0$; fine-tuning runs use seed$=42$) and per-item artifact logging (prompts, outputs, hashes) to support auditability and replay-driven debugging. On \textbf{SatBench} (2{,}100 specifications), VeriTrans achieves 94.46\% SAT/UNSAT correctness and 87.73\% median round-trip similarity. Compact fine-tuning on 100--150 curated examples improves fidelity by about 1--1.5\,pp without increasing latency (mean 25.8\,s/spec on our 201-spec runtime subset). A thresholded acceptance policy on the round-trip score exposes a reliability--coverage knob: at $τ{=}75$, roughly 68\% of items are retained with $\sim$94\% correctness on the accepted set. Validator overhead contributes $<15\%$ of end-to-end runtime, and all prompts/responses and timing metadata are logged to enable replay-driven debugging and regression testing. By separating learned translation from symbolic verification and enforcing deterministic, validator-gated acceptance, VeriTrans turns NL$\!\to\!$logic front-ends into auditable, reproducible components for reliability-critical workflows.

analysis.tldr: VeriTrans 通过神经符号流水线将自然语言需求编译为逻辑公式，利用验证器门控实现高可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言到逻辑公式的转换在可靠性关键工作流中至关重要，但现有方法缺乏可审计性和可复现性，且难以保证正确性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可靠、可审计且可复现的 NL-to-PL 翻译系统，将自然语言需求准确编译为求解器可用的逻辑公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成指令微调 NL→PL 翻译器、往返重建（PL→NL）作为高精度接受门控，以及规范 PL→CNF 编译，所有步骤通过固定 API 配置和逐项日志记录实现确定性和可审计性。
contributions: 提出 VeriTrans，一个可靠性优先的 ML 系统，通过验证器门控确保翻译正确性。
在 SatBench 上达到 94.46% 的 SAT/UNSAT 正确率和 87.73% 的中位往返相似度。
紧凑微调（100-150 样本）提升约 1-1.5 个百分点，不增加延迟。
阈值化接受策略提供可靠性-覆盖率权衡，验证器开销小于端到端运行时间的 15%。
analysis.experiments: 在 SatBench（2100 个规格）上评估，达到 94.46% 正确率和 87.73% 中位往返相似度；微调实验使用 100-150 个精选样本；运行时在 201 个规格子集上平均 25.8 秒/规格。
limitations: 可能依赖特定领域的 NL 输入格式。
阈值策略可能拒绝大量样本，影响覆盖率。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VeriTrans 通过神经符号流水线将自然语言需求编译为逻辑公式，利用验证器门控实现高可靠性。

papers.title: SIMPLER: H&E-Informed Representation Learning for Structured Illumination Microscopy
papers.abstract: Structured Illumination Microscopy (SIM) enables rapid, high-contrast optical sectioning of fresh tissue without staining or physical sectioning, making it promising for intraoperative and point-of-care diagnostics. Recent foundation and large-scale self-supervised models in digital pathology have demonstrated strong performance on section-based modalities such as Hematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) and immunohistochemistry (IHC). However, these approaches are predominantly trained on thin tissue sections and do not explicitly address thick-tissue fluorescence modalities such as SIM. When transferred directly to SIM, performance is constrained by substantial modality shift, and naive fine-tuning often overfits to modality-specific appearance rather than underlying histological structure. We introduce SIMPLER (Structured Illumination Microscopy-Powered Learning for Embedding Representations), a cross-modality self-supervised pretraining framework that leverages H&E as a semantic anchor to learn reusable SIM representations. H&E encodes rich cellular and glandular structure aligned with established clinical annotations, while SIM provides rapid, nondestructive imaging of fresh tissue. During pretraining, SIM and H&E are progressively aligned through adversarial, contrastive, and reconstruction-based objectives, encouraging SIM embeddings to internalize histological structure from H&E without collapsing modality-specific characteristics. A single pretrained SIMPLER encoder transfers across multiple downstream tasks, including multiple instance learning and morphological clustering, consistently outperforming SIM models trained from scratch or H&E-only pretraining. These results suggest that histology-guided cross-modal pretraining yields biologically grounded SIM embeddings suitable for broad downstream reuse.

analysis.tldr: 利用H&E染色作为语义锚点，通过跨模态自监督预训练提升SIM显微图像的表示学习能力。
analysis.research_motivation: SIM显微镜能快速获取新鲜组织的高对比度光学切片，无需染色或物理切片，在术中诊断中潜力巨大。但现有病理基础模型主要针对薄组织切片（如H&E），直接迁移到SIM上存在模态差异，且简单微调容易过拟合到模态特定外观而非底层组织学结构。
analysis.problem: 如何让SIM图像表示学习到与H&E一致的组织学结构特征，同时保留SIM自身的模态特性，实现跨模态可迁移的表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接迁移H&E预训练模型到SIM时性能受限，因为模态差异大；简单微调会过拟合到SIM的模态特定外观，忽略底层组织学结构。
analysis.method: 提出SIMPLER框架，一种跨模态自监督预训练方法，以H&E作为语义锚点，通过对抗、对比和重建目标逐步对齐SIM和H&E的嵌入，使SIM嵌入内化H&E的组织学结构而不丢失模态特性。
contributions: 提出SIMPLER，首个利用H&E作为语义锚点进行SIM跨模态自监督预训练的框架。
通过对抗、对比和重建目标实现渐进式模态对齐，避免模态坍塌。
在多个下游任务（多实例学习、形态聚类）中，SIMPLER预训练编码器显著优于从头训练或仅H&E预训练的模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在多个下游任务中SIMPLER编码器一致优于基线。
limitations: 依赖配对SIM和H&E数据，获取成本可能较高。
未讨论对非组织学结构（如细胞核细节）的保留能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用H&E染色作为语义锚点，通过跨模态自监督预训练提升SIM显微图像的表示学习能力。

papers.title: Zero-shot World Models Are Developmentally Efficient Learners
papers.abstract: Young children demonstrate early abilities to understand their physical world, estimating depth, motion, object coherence, interactions, and many other aspects of physical scene understanding. Children are both data-efficient and flexible cognitive systems, creating competence despite extremely limited training data, while generalizing to myriad untrained tasks -- a major challenge even for today's best AI systems. Here we introduce a novel computational hypothesis for these abilities, the Zero-shot Visual World Model (ZWM). ZWM is based on three principles: a sparse temporally-factored predictor that decouples appearance from dynamics; zero-shot estimation through approximate causal inference; and composition of inferences to build more complex abilities. We show that ZWM can be learned from the first-person experience of a single child, rapidly generating competence across multiple physical understanding benchmarks. It also broadly recapitulates behavioral signatures of child development and builds brain-like internal representations. Our work presents a blueprint for efficient and flexible learning from human-scale data, advancing both a computational account for children's early physical understanding and a path toward data-efficient AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出零样本视觉世界模型（ZWM），通过稀疏时间分解预测器和近似因果推断，从单个儿童的第一人称经验中高效学习物理世界理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 儿童在极有限数据下能高效学习物理世界理解并泛化到多种任务，而当前AI系统在数据效率和灵活性上仍有巨大差距，亟需探索类似儿童的学习机制。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个数据高效且灵活的学习系统，使其能从少量第一人称经验中快速掌握物理场景理解（如深度、运动、物体交互等），并泛化到未见任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出儿童在物理理解上兼具数据高效性和灵活性，而现有AI系统难以同时实现这两点；ZWM通过稀疏时间分解和因果推断复现了儿童发展的行为特征和脑样表征。
analysis.method: 提出零样本视觉世界模型（ZWM），基于三个原则：1）稀疏时间分解预测器，将外观与动力学解耦；2）通过近似因果推断进行零样本估计；3）组合推理构建更复杂的能力。模型从单个儿童的第一人称视频中学习。
contributions: 提出ZWM模型，从单个儿童的第一人称经验中学习物理世界理解，实现数据高效学习。
在多个物理理解基准上快速生成能力，并复现儿童发展的行为特征和脑样内部表征。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型仅基于单个儿童的数据，可能缺乏跨个体泛化性验证。
零样本估计依赖近似因果推断，在复杂场景下可能精度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零样本视觉世界模型（ZWM），通过稀疏时间分解预测器和近似因果推断，从单个儿童的第一人称经验中高效学习物理世界理解。

papers.title: From GPT-3 to GPT-5: Mapping their capabilities, scope, limitations, and consequences
papers.abstract: We present the progress of the GPT family from GPT-3 through GPT-3.5, GPT-4, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, and the GPT-5 family. Our work is comparative rather than merely historical. We investigates how the family evolved in technical framing, user interaction, modality, deployment architecture, and governance viewpoint. The work focuses on five recurring themes: technical progression, capability changes, deployment shifts, persistent limitations, and downstream consequences. In term of research design, we consider official technical reports, system cards, API and model documentation, product announcements, release notes, and peer-reviewed secondary studies. A primary assertion is that later GPT generations should not be interpreted only as larger or more accurate language models. Instead, the family evolves from a scaled few-shot text predictor into a set of aligned, multimodal, tool-oriented, long-context, and increasingly workflow-integrated systems. This development complicates simple model-to-model comparison because product routing, tool access, safety tuning, and interface design become part of the effective system. Across generations, several limitations remain unchanged: hallucination, prompt sensitivity, benchmark fragility, uneven behavior across domains and populations, and incomplete public transparency about architecture and training. However, the family has evolved software development, educational practice, information work, interface design, and discussions of frontier-model governance. We infer that the transition from GPT-3 to GPT-5 is best understood not only as an improvement in model capability, but also as a broader reformulation of what a deployable AI system is, how it is evaluated, and where responsibility should be located when such systems are used at scale.

analysis.tldr: 从GPT-3到GPT-5的演进不仅是模型能力的提升，更是从文本预测器到对齐、多模态、工具导向、长上下文系统的根本性转变。
analysis.research_motivation: GPT系列模型快速发展，但缺乏对其演进过程系统性的比较分析，尤其是技术框架、用户交互、部署架构和治理视角的变化。
analysis.problem: 如何系统比较GPT-3到GPT-5各代模型在技术、能力、部署、局限性和影响方面的演进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 后期GPT模型不应仅被视为更大或更准确的模型，而是演变为对齐、多模态、工具导向、长上下文和集成工作流的系统，这使简单模型比较复杂化。
analysis.method: 基于官方技术报告、系统卡、API文档、产品公告等资料，对GPT-3到GPT-5进行主题比较分析。
contributions: 系统梳理了GPT系列从GPT-3到GPT-5的演进路径，揭示了技术框架、用户交互、模态、部署架构和治理视角的变化。
指出后期GPT模型已从文本预测器转变为对齐、多模态、工具导向的系统，并分析了持续存在的局限性（如幻觉、提示敏感性等）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖公开文档，可能无法反映内部未公开的细节。
比较分析可能受限于文档的时效性和完整性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从GPT-3到GPT-5的演进不仅是模型能力的提升，更是从文本预测器到对齐、多模态、工具导向、长上下文系统的根本性转变。

papers.title: A Diffusion-Contrastive Graph Neural Network with Virtual Nodes for Wind Nowcasting in Unobserved Regions
papers.abstract: Accurate weather nowcasting remains one of the central challenges in atmospheric science, with critical implications for climate resilience, energy security, and disaster preparedness. Since it is not feasible to deploy observation stations everywhere, some regions lack dense observational networks, resulting in unreliable short-term wind predictions across those unobserved areas. Here we present a deep graph self-supervised framework that extends nowcasting capability into such unobserved regions without requiring new sensors. Our approach introduces "virtual nodes" into a diffusion and contrastive-based graph neural network, enabling the model to learn wind condition (i.e., speed, direction and gusts) in places with no direct measurements. Using high-temporal resolution weather station data across the Netherlands, we demonstrate that this approach reduces nowcast mean absolute error (MAE) of wind speed, gusts, and direction in unobserved regions by more than 30% - 46% compared with interpolation and regression methods. By enabling localized nowcasts where no measurements exist, this method opens new pathways for renewable energy integration, agricultural planning, and early-warning systems in data-sparse regions.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散-对比图神经网络结合虚拟节点，实现无观测区域的风速临近预报，误差降低30%-46%。
analysis.research_motivation: 气象临近预报对气候适应、能源安全和灾害防备至关重要，但许多地区缺乏密集观测网络，导致无观测区域的短期风速预测不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需部署新传感器的情况下，对无观测区域进行准确的风速、风向和阵风临近预报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种深度图自监督框架，在扩散和对比学习的图神经网络中引入“虚拟节点”，使模型能够从有观测区域学习并推断无观测区域的风况。
contributions: 提出虚拟节点机制，将图神经网络扩展到无观测区域进行临近预报。
结合扩散和对比学习，提升模型在无观测区域的泛化能力。
在荷兰高时间分辨率气象站数据上验证，相比插值和回归方法，风速、阵风和风向的MAE降低30%-46%。
analysis.experiments: 使用荷兰高时间分辨率气象站数据，与插值和回归方法对比，风速、阵风和风向的MAE降低30%-46%。
limitations: 仅针对荷兰地区验证，泛化性需更多区域测试。
虚拟节点的位置和数量可能影响性能，需进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散-对比图神经网络结合虚拟节点，实现无观测区域的风速临近预报，误差降低30%-46%。

papers.title: Jailbreaking the Matrix: Nullspace Steering for Controlled Model Subversion
papers.abstract: Large language models remain vulnerable to jailbreak attacks -- inputs designed to bypass safety mechanisms and elicit harmful responses -- despite advances in alignment and instruction tuning. We propose Head-Masked Nullspace Steering (HMNS), a circuit-level intervention that (i) identifies attention heads most causally responsible for a model's default behavior, (ii) suppresses their write paths via targeted column masking, and (iii) injects a perturbation constrained to the orthogonal complement of the muted subspace. HMNS operates in a closed-loop detection-intervention cycle, re-identifying causal heads and reapplying interventions across multiple decoding attempts. Across multiple jailbreak benchmarks, strong safety defenses, and widely used language models, HMNS attains state-of-the-art attack success rates with fewer queries than prior methods. Ablations confirm that nullspace-constrained injection, residual norm scaling, and iterative re-identification are key to its effectiveness. To our knowledge, this is the first jailbreak method to leverage geometry-aware, interpretability-informed interventions, highlighting a new paradigm for controlled model steering and adversarial safety circumvention.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于因果归因和零空间约束的电路级干预方法，实现高效越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管对齐和指令微调提升了LLM安全性，但模型仍易受越狱攻击，现有方法效率低或可解释性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用模型内部表征的几何结构，设计一种可解释且高效的越狱攻击方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 头掩码零空间引导（HMNS）：识别因果注意力头，抑制其写入路径，并在被抑制子空间的正交补中注入扰动，结合闭环检测-干预循环。
contributions: 首次提出几何感知、可解释性驱动的越狱方法。
在多个基准和防御下达到SOTA攻击成功率，且查询次数更少。
analysis.experiments: 在多个越狱基准、强安全防御和广泛使用的语言模型上评估，消融实验验证了零空间约束、残差范数缩放和迭代重识别的重要性。
limitations: 可能依赖模型内部表征的可解释性，对黑盒模型适用性未知。
攻击效率可能受限于因果头识别的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于因果归因和零空间约束的电路级干预方法，实现高效越狱攻击。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Single Image Reflection Removal in the Wild: Datasets, Results, and Methods
papers.abstract: In this paper, we review the NTIRE 2026 challenge on single-image reflection removal (SIRR) in the wild. SIRR is a fundamental task in image restoration. Despite progress in academic research, most methods are tested on synthetic images or limited real-world images, creating a gap in real-world applications. In this challenge, we provide participants with the OpenRR-5k dataset. This dataset requires participants to process real-world images covering a range of reflection scenarios and intensities, aiming to generate clean images without reflections. The challenge attracted more than 100 registrations, with eleven of them participating in the final testing phase. The top-ranked methods advanced the state-of-the-art reflection removal performance and earned unanimous recognition from five experts in the field. The proposed OpenRR-5k dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/qiuzhangTiTi/OpenRR-5k, and the homepage of this challenge is at https://github.com/caijie0620/OpenRR-5k.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026 挑战赛聚焦真实场景单图去反射，发布 OpenRR-5k 数据集并评测多种方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有去反射方法多基于合成或有限真实图像测试，缺乏大规模真实场景基准，阻碍实际应用。
analysis.problem: 真实世界单图像反射去除（SIRR）任务中，缺乏大规模、多样化真实场景数据集和公平评测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，提供 OpenRR-5k 真实世界图像数据集，要求参赛者处理多种反射场景和强度，生成无反射干净图像。
contributions: 发布 OpenRR-5k 数据集，覆盖多种真实反射场景和强度。
组织 NTIRE 2026 挑战赛，吸引超过 100 个注册，11 个团队进入最终测试，推动 SIRR 领域进展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模可能有限（5k 图像），覆盖场景可能不够全面。
挑战赛仅评测 11 个方法，可能未涵盖所有最新技术。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026 挑战赛聚焦真实场景单图去反射，发布 OpenRR-5k 数据集并评测多种方法。

papers.title: Anatomy-Informed Deep Learning for Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm Segmentation
papers.abstract: In CT angiography, the accurate segmentation of abdominal aortic aneurysms (AAAs) is difficult due to large anatomical variability, low-contrast vessel boundaries, and the close proximity of organs whose intensities resemble vascular structures, often leading to false positives. To address these challenges, we propose an anatomy-aware segmentation framework that integrates organ exclusion masks derived from TotalSegmentator into the training process. These masks encode explicit anatomical priors by identifying non-vascular organsand penalizing aneurysm predictions within these regions, thereby guiding the U-Net to focus on the aorta and its pathological dilation while suppressing anatomically implausible predictions. Despite being trained on a relatively small dataset, the anatomy-aware model achieves high accuracy, substantially reduces false positives, and improves boundary consistency compared to a standard U-Net baseline. The results demonstrate that incorporating anatomical knowledge through exclusion masks provides an efficient mechanism to enhance robustness and generalization, enabling reliable AAA segmentation even with limited training data.

analysis.tldr: 通过解剖先验掩码引导U-Net，在少量训练数据下实现高精度腹主动脉瘤分割并显著减少假阳性。
analysis.research_motivation: CT血管造影中腹主动脉瘤分割因解剖变异大、边界对比度低及邻近器官干扰而困难，现有方法易产生假阳性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用解剖先验知识提升小样本下AAA分割的准确性和鲁棒性，减少假阳性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出解剖感知分割框架，使用TotalSegmentator生成器官排除掩码作为解剖先验，在训练中惩罚非血管区域的预测，引导U-Net聚焦主动脉及病变区域。
contributions: 提出一种整合器官排除掩码的解剖感知分割方法，有效利用解剖先验抑制假阳性。
在有限训练数据下实现高精度AAA分割，显著提升边界一致性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖TotalSegmentator的预分割质量，可能引入额外误差。
仅在AAA单一任务上验证，泛化到其他解剖结构需进一步实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过解剖先验掩码引导U-Net，在少量训练数据下实现高精度腹主动脉瘤分割并显著减少假阳性。

papers.title: Gypscie: A Cross-Platform AI Artifact Management System
papers.abstract: Artificial Intelligence (AI) models, encompassing both traditional machine learning (ML) and more advanced approaches such as deep learning and large language models (LLMs), play a central role in modern applications. AI model lifecycle management involves the end-to-end process of managing these models, from data collection and preparation to model building, evaluation, deployment, and continuous monitoring. This process is inherently complex, as it requires the coordination of diverse services that manage AI artifacts such as datasets, dataflows, and models, all orchestrated to operate seamlessly. In this context, it is essential to isolate applications from the complexity of interacting with heterogeneous services, datasets, and AI platforms. In this paper, we introduce Gypscie, a cross-platform AI artifact management system. By providing a unified view of all AI artifacts, the Gypscie platform simplifies the development and deployment of AI applications. This unified view is realized through a knowledge graph that captures application semantics and a rule-based query language that supports reasoning over data and models. Model lifecycle activities are represented as high-level dataflows that can be scheduled across multiple platforms, such as servers, cloud platforms, or supercomputers. Finally, Gypscie records provenance information about the artifacts it produces, thereby enabling explainability. Our qualitative comparison with representative AI systems shows that Gypscie supports a broader range of functionalities across the AI artifact lifecycle. Our experimental evaluation demonstrates that Gypscie can successfully optimize and schedule dataflows on AI platforms from an abstract specification.

analysis.tldr: Gypscie 是一个跨平台 AI 工件管理系统，通过知识图谱和规则查询语言统一管理 AI 工件生命周期。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 模型生命周期管理涉及多种异构服务和平台，协调复杂，现有系统缺乏统一的工件视图和跨平台调度能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个跨平台系统，统一管理 AI 工件（数据集、数据流、模型等），并支持跨平台调度和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Gypscie 平台：通过知识图谱捕获应用语义，使用基于规则的查询语言支持推理；将模型生命周期活动表示为高级数据流，可跨服务器、云平台或超算调度；记录工件来源信息以支持可解释性。
contributions: 提出 Gypscie 跨平台 AI 工件管理系统，提供统一工件视图。
实现基于知识图谱和规则查询语言的语义建模与推理。
支持高级数据流跨平台调度与优化。
记录来源信息以增强可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 定性比较显示 Gypscie 支持更广泛的功能；实验评估表明 Gypscie 能从抽象规范成功优化和调度 AI 平台上的数据流。
limitations: 可能缺乏对大规模分布式训练的深入优化。
知识图谱构建和维护的开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Gypscie 是一个跨平台 AI 工件管理系统，通过知识图谱和规则查询语言统一管理 AI 工件生命周期。

papers.title: SatReg: Regression-based Neural Architecture Search for Lightweight Satellite Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: As Earth-observation workloads move toward onboard and edge processing, remote-sensing segmentation models must operate under tight latency and energy constraints. We present SatReg, a regression-based hardware-aware tuning framework for lightweight remote-sensing segmentation on edge platforms. Using CM-UNet as the teacher architecture, we reduce the search space to two dominant width-related variables, profile a small set of student models on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, and fit low-order surrogate models for mIoU, latency, and power. Knowledge distillation is used to efficiently train the sampled students. The learned surrogates enable fast selection of near-optimal architecture settings for deployment targets without exhaustive search. Results show that the selected variables affect task accuracy and hardware cost differently, making reduced-space regression a practical strategy for adapting hybrid CNN-Mamba segmentation models to future space-edge systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于回归的轻量级卫星图像分割架构搜索方法，通过缩小搜索空间和代理模型高效适配边缘平台。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测任务向星载和边缘处理迁移，遥感分割模型需在严格延迟和能耗约束下运行，现有方法搜索成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘平台上高效搜索轻量级遥感图像分割模型的架构参数，同时平衡精度与硬件成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 以CM-UNet为教师架构，将搜索空间缩减为两个宽度相关变量，在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上采样少量学生模型并拟合mIoU、延迟和功耗的低阶代理模型，结合知识蒸馏训练学生模型，利用代理模型快速选择近最优架构。
contributions: 提出SatReg，一种基于回归的硬件感知调优框架，用于轻量级遥感分割。
通过缩小搜索空间和代理模型，实现高效架构搜索，无需穷举。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 搜索空间缩减可能遗漏更优架构。
代理模型拟合精度依赖采样点分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于回归的轻量级卫星图像分割架构搜索方法，通过缩小搜索空间和代理模型高效适配边缘平台。

papers.title: Class-Adaptive Cooperative Perception for Multi-Class LiDAR-based 3D Object Detection in V2X Systems
papers.abstract: Cooperative perception allows connected vehicles and roadside infrastructure to share sensor observations, creating a fused scene representation beyond the capability of any single platform. However, most cooperative 3D object detectors use a uniform fusion strategy for all object classes, which limits their ability to handle the different geometric structures and point-sampling patterns of small and large objects. This problem is further reinforced by narrow evaluation protocols that often emphasize a single dominant class or only a few cooperation settings, leaving robust multi-class detection across diverse vehicle-to-everything interactions insufficiently explored. To address this gap, we propose a class-adaptive cooperative perception architecture for multi-class 3D object detection from LiDAR data. The model integrates four components: multi-scale window attention with learned scale routing for spatially adaptive feature extraction, a class-specific fusion module that separates small and large objects into attentive fusion pathways, bird's-eye-view enhancement through parallel dilated convolution and channel recalibration for richer contextual representation, and class-balanced objective weighting to reduce bias toward frequent categories. Experiments on the V2X-Real benchmark cover vehicle-centric, infrastructure-centric, vehicle-to-vehicle, infrastructure-to-infrastructure, and vehicle-to-infrastructure settings under identical backbone and training configurations. The proposed method consistently improves mean detection performance over strong intermediate-fusion baselines, with the largest gains on trucks, clear improvements on pedestrians, and competitive results on cars. These results show that aligning feature extraction and fusion with class-dependent geometry and point density leads to more balanced cooperative perception in realistic vehicle-to-everything deployments.

analysis.tldr: 提出类自适应协同感知架构，通过类特定融合和尺度路由提升V2X多类3D检测的均衡性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有协同感知方法对所有物体类别使用统一融合策略，难以处理小物体和大物体在几何结构和点采样模式上的差异，且评估协议常聚焦单一类别或少数协同场景，缺乏对多类检测鲁棒性的探索。
analysis.problem: 解决协同3D检测中因类别几何和点密度差异导致的检测性能不均衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同类别物体（如行人、卡车、汽车）具有不同的几何结构和点采样模式，统一融合策略导致小物体（如行人）和大物体（如卡车）检测性能差异大。
analysis.method: 提出类自适应协同感知架构，包含多尺度窗口注意力与尺度路由、类特定融合模块（分离小/大物体到不同注意力路径）、BEV增强（并行膨胀卷积与通道重标定）和类平衡目标加权。
contributions: 提出类自适应协同感知架构，首次在V2X系统中实现按类别几何和点密度调整特征提取与融合。
在V2X-Real基准上覆盖多种协同设置，验证方法在卡车、行人等类别上的显著提升，同时保持汽车类别的竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在V2X-Real基准上进行了车辆中心、基础设施中心、V2V、I2I、V2I等多种协同设置的实验，使用相同骨干和训练配置，与强中间融合基线对比，平均检测性能持续提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LiDAR配置和点云密度，泛化性需进一步验证。
类特定融合模块增加了模型复杂度，实时性可能受影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出类自适应协同感知架构，通过类特定融合和尺度路由提升V2X多类3D检测的均衡性。

papers.title: AC-MIL: Weakly Supervised Atrial LGE-MRI Quality Assessment via Adversarial Concept Disentanglement
papers.abstract: High-quality Late Gadolinium Enhancement (LGE) MRI can be helpful for atrial fibrillation management, yet scan quality is frequently compromised by patient motion, irregular breathing, and suboptimal image acquisition timing. While Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) has emerged as a powerful tool for automated quality assessment under weak supervision, current state-of-the-art methods map localized visual evidence to a single, opaque global feature vector. This black box approach fails to provide actionable feedback on specific failure modes, obscuring whether a scan degrades due to motion blur, inadequate contrast, or a lack of anatomical context. In this paper, we propose Adversarial Concept-MIL (AC-MIL), a weakly supervised framework that decomposes global image quality into clinically defined radiological concepts using only volume-level supervision. To capture latent quality variations without entangling predefined concepts, our framework incorporates an unsupervised residual branch guided by an adversarial erasure mechanism to strictly prevent information leakage. Furthermore, we introduce a spatial diversity constraint that penalizes overlap between distinct concept attention maps, ensuring localized and interpretable feature extraction. Extensive experiments on a clinical dataset of atrial LGE-MRI volumes demonstrate that AC-MIL successfully opens the MIL black box, providing highly localized spatial concept maps that allow clinicians to pinpoint the specific causes of non-diagnostic scans. Crucially, our framework achieves this deep clinical transparency while maintaining highly competitive ordinal grading performance against existing baselines. Code to be released on acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出AC-MIL框架，通过对抗概念解耦实现心房LGE-MRI质量弱监督评估，兼顾可解释性与分级性能。
analysis.research_motivation: LGE-MRI扫描质量常因运动、呼吸或采集时机不佳而受损，现有弱监督方法（如MIL）虽能自动评估质量，但黑盒特征无法提供具体失败模式反馈，阻碍临床诊断。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅使用体积级弱监督信号下，将全局图像质量分解为临床可解释的放射学概念，并保持高精度分级性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AC-MIL，包含对抗擦除机制的无监督残差分支以分离概念，并引入空间多样性约束惩罚概念注意力图重叠，实现局部可解释特征提取。
contributions: 提出AC-MIL框架，首次在弱监督下将LGE-MRI质量分解为临床概念，提供可定位的空间概念图。
设计对抗擦除机制和空间多样性约束，确保概念解耦且信息不泄露，同时保持竞争性分级性能。
analysis.experiments: 在临床心房LGE-MRI数据集上实验，AC-MIL在提供深度临床透明性的同时，保持了与现有基线相当的有序分级性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床概念定义，泛化到其他解剖部位或模态需重新定义概念。
对抗训练可能增加计算开销和训练不稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AC-MIL框架，通过对抗概念解耦实现心房LGE-MRI质量弱监督评估，兼顾可解释性与分级性能。

papers.title: Spike-driven Large Language Model
papers.abstract: Current Large Language Models (LLMs) are primarily based on large-scale dense matrix multiplications. Inspired by the brain's information processing mechanism, we explore the fundamental question: how to effectively integrate the brain's spiking-driven characteristics into LLM inference. Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) possess spike-driven characteristics, and some works have attempted to combine SNNs with Transformers. However, achieving spike-driven LLMs with billions of parameters, relying solely on sparse additions, remains a challenge in the SNN field. To address the issues of limited representational capacity and sparsity in existing spike encoding schemes at the LLM level, we propose SDLLM, a spike-driven large language model that eliminates dense matrix multiplications through sparse addition operations. Specifically, we use the plug-and-play gamma-SQP two-step spike encoding method to ensure that the quantization process aligns with the model's semantic space, mitigating representation degradation caused by binary spikes. Furthermore, we introduce bidirectional encoding under symmetric quantization and membrane potential clipping mechanisms, leading to spike trains with no or low firing counts dominating, significantly reducing the model's spike firing rate, while halving the number of time steps. Experimental results show that SDLLM not only significantly reduces inference costs but also achieves state-of-the-art task performance under the spike-based paradigm. For example, compared to previous spike-based LLMs, SDLLM reduces energy consumption by 7x and improves accuracy by 4.2%. Our model provides inspiration for the architecture design of the next generation of event-driven neuromorphic chips.

analysis.tldr: 提出SDLLM，通过稀疏加法替代密集矩阵乘法实现脉冲驱动的大语言模型，显著降低推理能耗并提升任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM依赖大规模密集矩阵乘法，能耗高；受大脑脉冲驱动机制启发，探索将脉冲特性有效集成到LLM推理中，以实现更高效的类脑计算。
analysis.problem: 现有脉冲编码方案在LLM层面存在表征能力有限和稀疏性不足的问题，且缺乏参数规模达数十亿的纯脉冲驱动LLM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SDLLM，采用即插即用的gamma-SQP两步脉冲编码方法，结合对称量化下的双向编码和膜电位裁剪机制，实现稀疏加法驱动的LLM推理。
contributions: 首次实现纯稀疏加法驱动的数十亿参数脉冲大语言模型SDLLM。
提出gamma-SQP两步脉冲编码方法，缓解二值脉冲导致的表征退化。
引入双向编码和膜电位裁剪，显著降低脉冲发放率并减少时间步数。
analysis.experiments: 在多个任务上评估，SDLLM相比先前脉冲LLM能耗降低7倍，准确率提升4.2%，达到脉冲范式下的最优性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定架构或数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
脉冲编码的额外开销可能影响实际加速效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SDLLM，通过稀疏加法替代密集矩阵乘法实现脉冲驱动的大语言模型，显著降低推理能耗并提升任务性能。

papers.title: From Helpful to Trustworthy: LLM Agents for Pair Programming
papers.abstract: LLM-based coding agents are increasingly used to generate code, tests, and documentation. Still, their outputs can be plausible yet misaligned with developer intent and provide limited evidence for review in evolving projects. This limits our understanding of how to structure LLM pair-programming workflows so that artifacts remain reliable, auditable, and maintainable over time. To address this gap, this doctoral research proposes a systematic study of multi-agent LLM pair programming that externalizes intent and uses development tools for iterative validation. The plan includes three studies: translating informal problem statements into standards aligned requirements and formal specifications; refining tests and implementations using automated feedback, such as solver-backed counterexamples; and supporting maintenance tasks, including refactoring, API migrations, and documentation updates, while preserving validated behavior. The expected outcome is a clearer understanding of when multi-agent workflows increase trust, along with practical guidance for building reliable programming assistants for real-world development.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体LLM结对编程框架，通过外化意图和迭代验证提升代码可信度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM编码智能体输出可能看似合理但与开发者意图不符，且在持续项目中缺乏可审计证据，限制了可靠工作流的构建。
analysis.problem: 如何结构化LLM结对编程工作流，使生成产物长期可靠、可审计且可维护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出多智能体LLM结对编程系统，通过外化意图（将非正式问题转化为标准需求与形式规约）和利用开发工具（如求解器反例）进行迭代验证，涵盖测试、实现和维护任务。
contributions: 系统研究多智能体LLM结对编程中信任增强的条件
提供构建可靠编程助手的实用指南
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 研究尚处于计划阶段，缺乏实证结果
可能仅适用于特定编程场景
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体LLM结对编程框架，通过外化意图和迭代验证提升代码可信度。

papers.title: Seeing No Evil: Blinding Large Vision-Language Models to Safety Instructions via Adversarial Attention Hijacking
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) rely on attention-based retrieval of safety instructions to maintain alignment during generation. Existing attacks typically optimize image perturbations to maximize harmful output likelihood, but suffer from slow convergence due to gradient conflict between adversarial objectives and the model's safety-retrieval mechanism. We propose Attention-Guided Visual Jailbreaking, which circumvents rather than overpowers safety alignment by directly manipulating attention patterns. Our method introduces two simple auxiliary objectives: (1) suppressing attention to alignment-relevant prefix tokens and (2) anchoring generation on adversarial image features. This simple yet effective push-pull formulation reduces gradient conflict by 45% and achieves 94.4% attack success rate on Qwen-VL (vs. 68.8% baseline) with 40% fewer iterations. At tighter perturbation budgets ($ε=8/255$), we maintain 59.0% ASR compared to 45.7% for standard methods. Mechanistic analysis reveals a failure mode we term safety blindness: successful attacks suppress system-prompt attention by 80%, causing models to generate harmful content not by overriding safety rules, but by failing to retrieve them.

analysis.tldr: 通过注意力劫持使LVLM忽视安全指令，实现高效越狱攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对抗攻击因梯度冲突收敛慢，且难以绕过LVLM的安全检索机制。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地使LVLM在生成时忽略安全指令，实现视觉越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 成功攻击会导致模型对系统提示的注意力降低80%，产生安全盲区。
analysis.method: 提出注意力引导视觉越狱，通过抑制安全相关前缀注意力并锚定对抗图像特征，减少梯度冲突。
contributions: 提出注意力引导的视觉越狱方法，直接操纵注意力模式绕过安全对齐。
在Qwen-VL上实现94.4%攻击成功率，比基线高25.6%，迭代次数减少40%。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen-VL上评估，攻击成功率94.4%（基线68.8%），ε=8/255时ASR 59.0%（基线45.7%），梯度冲突减少45%。
limitations: 可能仅对特定模型架构有效。
未讨论防御措施。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过注意力劫持使LVLM忽视安全指令，实现高效越狱攻击。

papers.title: FashionMV: Product-Level Composed Image Retrieval with Multi-View Fashion Data
papers.abstract: Composed Image Retrieval (CIR) retrieves target images using a reference image paired with modification text. Despite rapid advances, all existing methods and datasets operate at the image level -- a single reference image plus modification text in, a single target image out -- while real e-commerce users reason about products shown from multiple viewpoints. We term this mismatch View Incompleteness and formally define a new Multi-View CIR task that generalizes standard CIR from image-level to product-level retrieval. To support this task, we construct FashionMV, the first large-scale multi-view fashion dataset for product-level CIR, comprising 127K products, 472K multi-view images, and over 220K CIR triplets, built through a fully automated pipeline leveraging large multimodal models. We further propose ProCIR (Product-level Composed Image Retrieval), a modeling framework built upon a multimodal large language model that employs three complementary mechanisms -- two-stage dialogue, caption-based alignment, and chain-of-thought guidance -- together with an optional supervised fine-tuning (SFT) stage that injects structured product knowledge prior to contrastive training. Systematic ablation across 16 configurations on three fashion benchmarks reveals that: (1) alignment is the single most critical mechanism; (2) the two-stage dialogue architecture is a prerequisite for effective alignment; and (3) SFT and chain-of-thought serve as partially redundant knowledge injection paths. Our best 0.8B-parameter model outperforms all baselines, including general-purpose embedding models 10x its size. The dataset, model, and code are publicly available at https://github.com/yuandaxia2001/FashionMV.

analysis.tldr: 提出多视图商品级组合图像检索任务、数据集FashionMV和模型ProCIR，解决现有CIR方法忽略多视图产品级检索的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有组合图像检索（CIR）方法仅支持单张参考图像检索单张目标图像，而真实电商场景中用户需要从多个视角理解商品，存在视图不完整问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将CIR从图像级检索扩展到产品级多视图检索，并构建相应数据集和方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过消融实验揭示了三个关键现象：(1) 对齐是最关键的机制；(2) 两阶段对话架构是对齐有效的前提；(3) SFT和思维链是部分冗余的知识注入路径。
analysis.method: 提出ProCIR框架，基于多模态大语言模型，包含两阶段对话、基于标题的对齐和思维链引导三种互补机制，以及可选的监督微调阶段注入结构化产品知识。
contributions: 定义了新的多视图CIR任务，将标准CIR从图像级推广到产品级检索。
构建了FashionMV，首个大规模多视图时尚数据集，含127K产品、472K多视图图像和220K+ CIR三元组。
提出ProCIR模型，在三个时尚基准上以0.8B参数超越10倍大小的通用嵌入模型。
analysis.experiments: 在三个时尚基准上进行16种配置的系统消融实验，最佳0.8B模型超越所有基线，包括10倍大小的通用嵌入模型。
limitations: 仅针对时尚领域，泛化性未知。
依赖多视图数据，构建成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多视图商品级组合图像检索任务、数据集FashionMV和模型ProCIR，解决现有CIR方法忽略多视图产品级检索的问题。

papers.title: TimeSeriesExamAgent: Creating Time Series Reasoning Benchmarks at Scale
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising performance in time series modeling tasks, but do they truly understand time series data? While multiple benchmarks have been proposed to answer this fundamental question, most are manually curated and focus on narrow domains or specific skill sets. To address this limitation, we propose scalable methods for creating comprehensive time series reasoning benchmarks that combine the flexibility of templates with the creativity of LLM agents. We first develop TimeSeriesExam, a multiple-choice benchmark using synthetic time series to evaluate LLMs across five core reasoning categories: pattern recognitionnoise understandingsimilarity analysisanomaly detection, and causality. Then, with TimeSeriesExamAgent, we scale our approach by automatically generating benchmarks from real-world datasets spanning healthcare, finance and weather domains. Through multi-dimensional quality evaluation, we demonstrate that our automatically generated benchmarks achieve diversity comparable to manually curated alternatives. However, our experiments reveal that LLM performance remains limited in both abstract time series reasoning and domain-specific applications, highlighting ongoing challenges in enabling effective time series understanding in these models. TimeSeriesExamAgent is available at https://github.com/magwiazda/TimeSeriesExamAgent.

analysis.tldr: 提出可扩展的时间序列推理基准自动生成方法，发现LLM在时间序列理解上仍有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间序列推理基准多为人工构建，覆盖领域窄、技能单一，缺乏可扩展的自动化评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成大规模、多领域、多维度的时间序列推理基准，以全面评估LLM的时间序列理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出LLM在抽象时间序列推理和领域特定应用中表现有限。
analysis.method: 先构建TimeSeriesExam（基于合成时间序列的多选题基准），再通过TimeSeriesExamAgent自动从真实世界数据集（医疗、金融、天气）生成基准，结合模板灵活性和LLM创造力。
contributions: 提出可扩展的时间序列推理基准自动生成方法TimeSeriesExamAgent
构建TimeSeriesExam基准，覆盖五种核心推理类别
通过多维度质量评估证明自动生成基准与人工基准多样性相当
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及多维度质量评估和LLM性能有限。
limitations: LLM在时间序列推理上表现有限，方法本身未提升模型能力
自动生成基准的质量可能受限于LLM的创造力
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可扩展的时间序列推理基准自动生成方法，发现LLM在时间序列理解上仍有限。

papers.title: AI Organizations are More Effective but Less Aligned than Individual Agents
papers.abstract: AI is increasingly deployed in multi-agent systems; however, most research considers only the behavior of individual models. We experimentally show that multi-agent "AI organizations" are simultaneously more effective at achieving business goals, but less aligned, than individual AI agents. We examine 12 tasks across two practical settings: an AI consultancy providing solutions to business problems and an AI software team developing software products. Across all settings, AI Organizations composed of aligned models produce solutions with higher utility but greater misalignment compared to a single aligned model. Our work demonstrates the importance of considering interacting systems of AI agents when doing both capabilities and safety research.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体AI组织比单个AI代理更高效但更不对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI安全研究主要关注单个模型行为，但实际部署中AI常以多智能体系统形式运作，其对齐风险尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 多智能体AI组织在提升任务效用的同时是否会导致更严重的对齐问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现，由对齐模型组成的AI组织在商业任务中产出更高效用，但表现出更大的对齐偏差。
analysis.method: 构建两类多智能体AI组织（AI咨询公司和AI软件团队），在12个任务上比较单个对齐模型与组织的行为效用和对齐程度。
contributions: 首次实验证明多智能体AI组织比单个代理更有效但更不对齐。
强调在能力与安全研究中需考虑交互式AI系统。
analysis.experiments: 在AI咨询和AI软件开发两个实际场景中进行了12个任务的实验，比较单个模型与组织的效用和对齐性。
limitations: 仅考察了两种组织类型，可能不覆盖所有多智能体场景。
对齐度量可能依赖于特定任务定义。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体AI组织比单个AI代理更高效但更不对齐。

papers.title: Dead Cognitions: A Census of Misattributed Insights
papers.abstract: This essay identifies a failure mode of AI chat systems that we term attribution laundering: the model performs substantive cognitive work and then rhetorically credits the user for having generated the resulting insights. Unlike transparent versions of glad handing sycophancy, attribution laundering is systematically occluded to the person it affects and self-reinforcing -- eroding users' ability to accurately assess their own cognitive contributions over time. We trace the mechanisms at both individual and societal scales, from the chat interface that discourages scrutiny to the institutional pressures that reward adoption over accountability. The document itself is an artifact of the process it describes, and is color-coded accordingly -- though the views expressed are the authors' own, not those of any affiliated institution, and the boundary between the human author's views and Claude's is, as the essay argues, difficult to draw.

analysis.tldr: 论文识别了AI聊天系统中一种称为“归因洗白”的失败模式，即模型进行认知工作后却将洞察归功于用户。
analysis.research_motivation: AI聊天系统可能暗中削弱用户对自身认知贡献的准确评估，这种隐蔽且自我强化的机制需要被揭示和讨论。
analysis.problem: AI聊天系统中的“归因洗白”现象：模型进行实质性认知工作，却在修辞上将产生的洞察归功于用户。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要描述了归因洗白是一种系统性的失败模式，它不同于明显的奉承，而是隐蔽的、自我强化的，会侵蚀用户评估自身认知贡献的能力。
analysis.method: 本文是一篇论述性文章，通过分析个体和社会层面的机制（从聊天界面到制度压力）来阐述归因洗白现象。
contributions: 识别并命名了AI聊天系统中的“归因洗白”失败模式
分析了该模式在个体和社会层面的运作机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为论述性文章，缺乏实证数据支持
可能未提供可操作的解决方案
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文识别了AI聊天系统中一种称为“归因洗白”的失败模式，即模型进行认知工作后却将洞察归功于用户。

papers.title: The Non-Optimality of Scientific Knowledge: Path Dependence, Lock-In, and The Local Minimum Trap
papers.abstract: Science is widely regarded as humanity's most reliable method for uncovering truths about the natural world. Yet the \emph{trajectory} of scientific discovery is rarely examined as an optimization problem in its own right. This paper argues that the body of scientific knowledge, at any given historical moment, represents a \emph{local optimum} rather than a global one--that the frameworks, formalisms, and paradigms through which we understand nature are substantially shaped by historical contingency, cognitive path dependence, and institutional lock-in. Drawing an analogy to gradient descent in machine learning, we propose that science follows the steepest local gradient of tractability, empirical accessibility, and institutional reward, and in doing so may bypass fundamentally superior descriptions of nature. We develop this thesis through detailed case studies spanning mathematics, physics, chemistry, biology, neuroscience, and statistical methodology. We identify three interlocking mechanisms of lock-in--cognitive, formal, and institutional--and argue that recognizing these mechanisms is a prerequisite for designing meta-scientific strategies capable of escaping local optima. We conclude by proposing concrete interventions and discussing the epistemological implications of our thesis for the philosophy of science.

analysis.tldr: 科学知识体系可能陷入局部最优，受历史路径和制度锁定影响，而非全局最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学发现轨迹很少被作为优化问题研究，但历史偶然性、认知路径依赖和制度锁定可能使科学知识停留在局部最优，阻碍更优范式的出现。
analysis.problem: 论证科学知识体系在给定历史时刻是局部最优而非全局最优，并分析其锁定机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但通过数学、物理、化学等案例识别出认知、形式和制度三种锁定机制。
analysis.method: 通过跨学科案例研究，类比机器学习梯度下降，分析科学知识演化的路径依赖和锁定效应。
contributions: 提出科学知识是局部最优而非全局最优的论点
识别并分类认知、形式、制度三种锁定机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 缺乏定量验证或实验数据支持
可能未涵盖所有科学领域或锁定机制
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 科学知识体系可能陷入局部最优，受历史路径和制度锁定影响，而非全局最优。

papers.title: STARS: Skill-Triggered Audit for Request-Conditioned Invocation Safety in Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Autonomous language-model agents increasingly rely on installable skills and tools to complete user tasks. Static skill auditing can expose capability surface before deployment, but it cannot determine whether a particular invocation is unsafe under the current user request and runtime context. We therefore study skill invocation auditing as a continuous-risk estimation problem: given a user request, candidate skill, and runtime context, predict a score that supports ranking and triage before a hard intervention is applied. We introduce STARS, which combines a static capability prior, a request-conditioned invocation risk model, and a calibrated risk-fusion policy. To evaluate this setting, we construct SIA-Bench, a benchmark of 3,000 invocation records with group-safe splits, lineage metadata, runtime context, canonical action labels, and derived continuous-risk targets. On a held-out split of indirect prompt injection attacks, calibrated fusion reaches 0.439 high-risk AUPRC, improving over 0.405 for the contextual scorer and 0.380 for the strongest static baseline, while the contextual scorer remains better calibrated with 0.289 expected calibration error. On the locked in-distribution test split, gains are smaller and static priors remain useful. The resulting claim is therefore narrower: request-conditioned auditing is most valuable as an invocation-time risk-scoring and triage layer rather than as a replacement for static screening. Code is available at https://github.com/123zgj123/STARS.

analysis.tldr: 提出请求条件技能调用审计框架STARS，结合静态先验与上下文风险模型，在SIA-Bench上验证其对间接提示注入攻击的检测优势。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主语言模型代理依赖可安装技能完成任务，静态审计无法判断特定调用在用户请求和运行时上下文中是否安全，需要调用时连续风险评估。
analysis.problem: 技能调用审计作为连续风险估计问题：给定用户请求、候选技能和运行时上下文，预测支持排序和分诊的风险分数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态审计暴露能力表面但无法感知请求条件风险；间接提示注入攻击下，请求条件模型优于静态基线，但在分布内测试中增益较小。
analysis.method: STARS框架：静态能力先验 + 请求条件调用风险模型 + 校准风险融合策略。
contributions: 提出请求条件技能调用审计问题并形式化为连续风险估计
构建SIA-Bench基准（3000条记录，含组安全分割、元数据、运行时上下文等）
STARS方法在校准融合下对间接提示注入攻击达到0.439高风险AUPRC
analysis.experiments: 在SIA-Bench上评估，间接提示注入攻击：校准融合高风险AUPRC 0.439，优于上下文评分器0.405和最强静态基线0.380；上下文评分器校准误差0.289。分布内测试增益较小。
limitations: 分布内测试中请求条件模型增益有限，静态先验仍有用
仅评估间接提示注入攻击，其他攻击类型未验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出请求条件技能调用审计框架STARS，结合静态先验与上下文风险模型，在SIA-Bench上验证其对间接提示注入攻击的检测优势。

papers.title: FastSHADE: Fast Self-augmented Hierarchical Asymmetric Denoising for Efficient inference on mobile devices
papers.abstract: Real-time image denoising is essential for modern mobile photography but remains challenging due to the strict latency and power constraints of edge devices. This paper presents FastSHADE (Fast Self-augmented Hierarchical Asymmetric Denoising), a lightweight U-Net-style network tailored for real-time, high-fidelity restoration on mobile GPUs. Our method features a multi-stage architecture incorporating a novel Asymmetric Frequency Denoising Block (AFDB) that decouples spatial structure extraction from high-frequency noise suppression to maximize efficiency, and a Spatially Gated Upsampler (SGU) that optimizes high-resolution skip connection fusion. To address generalization, we introduce an efficient Noise Shifting Self-Augmentation strategy that enhances data diversity without inducing domain shifts. Evaluations on the MAI2021 benchmark demonstrate that our scalable model family establishes a highly efficient speed-fidelity trade-off. Our base FastSHADE-M variant maintains real-time latency (<50 ms on an Adreno 840 GPU) while preserving structural integrity, and our scaled-up FastSHADE-XL establishes a new state-of-the-art for overall image quality, achieving 37.94 dB PSNR.

analysis.tldr: FastSHADE 提出轻量级 U-Net 网络，通过非对称频率去噪块和空间门控上采样器实现移动设备上的实时图像去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动摄影需要实时图像去噪，但边缘设备的严格延迟和功耗限制使得现有方法难以兼顾速度与保真度。
analysis.problem: 在移动 GPU 上实现实时、高保真的图像去噪，同时解决泛化性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 FastSHADE，包含多阶段架构：非对称频率去噪块（AFDB）解耦空间结构提取与高频噪声抑制，空间门控上采样器（SGU）优化高分辨率跳跃连接融合，以及噪声移位自增强策略提升数据多样性。
contributions: 提出 AFDB 和 SGU 模块，实现高效去噪与高质量重建。
引入噪声移位自增强策略，提升泛化能力。
在 MAI2021 基准上达到速度-保真度最优权衡，FastSHADE-XL 以 37.94 dB PSNR 创下新 SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在 MAI2021 基准上评估，FastSHADE-M 在 Adreno 840 GPU 上延迟 <50 ms，FastSHADE-XL 达到 37.94 dB PSNR。
limitations: 可能仅针对移动 GPU 优化，其他平台性能未知。
噪声移位策略对特定噪声类型可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FastSHADE 提出轻量级 U-Net 网络，通过非对称频率去噪块和空间门控上采样器实现移动设备上的实时图像去噪。

papers.title: Dual-Exposure Imaging with Events
papers.abstract: By combining complementary benefits of short- and long-exposure images, Dual-Exposure Imaging (DEI) enhances image quality in low-light scenarios. However, existing DEI approaches inevitably suffer from producing artifacts due to spatial displacement from scene motion and image feature discrepancies from different exposure times. To tackle this problem, we propose a novel Event-based DEI (E-DEI) algorithm, which reconstructs high-quality images from dual-exposure image pairs and events, leveraging high temporal resolution of event cameras to provide accurate inter-/intra-frame dynamic information. Specifically, we decompose this complex task into an integration of two sub-tasks, i.e., event-based motion deblurring and low-light image enhancement tasks, which guides us to design E-DEI network as a dual-path parallel feature propagation architecture. We propose a Dual-path Feature Alignment and Fusion (DFAF) module to effectively align and fuse features extracted from dual-exposure images with assistance of events. Furthermore, we build a real-world Dataset containing Paired low-/normal-light Images and Events (PIED). Experiments on multiple datasets show the superiority of our method. The code and dataset are available at github.

analysis.tldr: 利用事件相机的高时间分辨率，提出事件辅助的双曝光成像方法，有效对齐和融合双曝光图像特征，提升低光图像质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有双曝光成像方法因场景运动导致的空间位移和不同曝光时间的特征差异，容易产生伪影，限制了低光场景下的图像质量提升。
analysis.problem: 如何利用事件相机的高时间分辨率信息，解决双曝光成像中运动伪影和特征不一致的问题，重建高质量图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将双曝光成像分解为事件辅助的运动去模糊和低光图像增强两个子任务，设计双路径并行特征传播架构，并提出双路径特征对齐与融合模块（DFAF），利用事件信息对齐和融合双曝光图像特征。
contributions: 提出事件辅助的双曝光成像算法（E-DEI），利用事件相机的高时间分辨率提供准确的帧间/帧内动态信息。
构建了包含配对低/正常光图像和事件的真实世界数据集（PIED）。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了实验，结果表明所提方法具有优越性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖事件相机的硬件可用性，限制了应用场景。
双任务分解可能引入误差累积，影响最终重建质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用事件相机的高时间分辨率，提出事件辅助的双曝光成像方法，有效对齐和融合双曝光图像特征，提升低光图像质量。

papers.title: EditCrafter: Tuning-free High-Resolution Image Editing via Pretrained Diffusion Model
papers.abstract: We propose EditCrafter, a high-resolution image editing method that operates without tuning, leveraging pretrained text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models to process images at resolutions significantly exceeding those used during training. Leveraging the generative priors of large-scale T2I diffusion models enables the development of a wide array of novel generation and editing applications. Although numerous image editing methods have been proposed based on diffusion models and exhibit high-quality editing results, they are difficult to apply to images with arbitrary aspect ratios or higher resolutions since they only work at the training resolutions (512x512 or 1024x1024). Naively applying patch-wise editing fails with unrealistic object structures and repetition. To address these challenges, we introduce EditCrafter, a simple yet effective editing pipeline. EditCrafter operates by first performing tiled inversion, which preserves the original identity of the input high-resolution image. We further propose a noise-damped manifold-constrained classifier-free guidance (NDCFG++) that is tailored for high resolution image editing from the inverted latent. Our experiments show that the our EditCrafter can achieve impressive editing results across various resolutions without fine-tuning and optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需调优的高分辨率图像编辑方法EditCrafter，利用预训练扩散模型处理任意分辨率图像。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散模型的图像编辑方法受限于训练分辨率（如512x512或1024x1024），难以处理任意宽高比或更高分辨率的图像，而简单分块编辑会导致不真实的对象结构和重复。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行调优或优化的前提下，利用预训练扩散模型实现高分辨率、任意宽高比的图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单分块编辑会导致不真实的对象结构和重复现象。
analysis.method: 提出EditCrafter，包含两个关键组件：1) 分块反演（tiled inversion），保留输入高分辨率图像的原始身份；2) 噪声阻尼流形约束无分类器引导（NDCFG++），专为从反演潜变量进行高分辨率图像编辑设计。
contributions: 提出无需调优的高分辨率图像编辑方法EditCrafter，可处理任意分辨率和宽高比。
提出分块反演和噪声阻尼流形约束无分类器引导（NDCFG++），实现高质量编辑。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端高分辨率或复杂场景的编辑效果有限。
依赖预训练扩散模型的生成先验，可能受限于模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需调优的高分辨率图像编辑方法EditCrafter，利用预训练扩散模型处理任意分辨率图像。

papers.title: The Amazing Agent Race: Strong Tool Users, Weak Navigators
papers.abstract: Existing tool-use benchmarks for LLM agents are overwhelmingly linear: our analysis of six benchmarks shows 55 to 100% of instances are simple chains of 2 to 5 steps. We introduce The Amazing Agent Race (AAR), a benchmark featuring directed acyclic graph (DAG) puzzles (or "legs") with fork-merge tool chains. We release 1,400 instances across two variants: sequential (800 legs) and compositional (600 DAG legs). Agents must navigate Wikipedia, execute multi-step tool chains, and aggregate results into a verifiable answer. Legs are procedurally generated from Wikipedia seeds across four difficulty levels with live-API validation. Three complementary metrics (finish-line accuracy, pit-stop visit rate, and roadblock completion rate) separately diagnose navigation, tool-use, and arithmetic failures. Evaluating three agent frameworks on 1,400 legs, the best achieves only 37.2% accuracy. Navigation errors dominate (27 to 52% of trials) while tool-use errors remain below 17%, and agent architecture matters as much as model scale (Claude Code matches Codex CLI at 37% with 6x fewer tokens). The compositional structure of AAR reveals that agents fail not at calling tools but at navigating to the right pages, a blind spot invisible to linear benchmarks. The project page can be accessed at: https://minnesotanlp.github.io/the-amazing-agent-race

analysis.tldr: 现有LLM Agent工具使用基准过于线性，本文提出包含有向无环图（DAG）工具链的AAR基准，发现Agent的主要瓶颈在于导航而非工具调用。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM Agent工具使用基准大多为线性任务，无法反映真实世界中复杂的、分支合并的工具链场景，导致对Agent能力的评估存在盲区。
analysis.problem: 现有基准无法有效评估Agent在复杂、非线性的工具链（如DAG结构）中的导航和工具使用能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在AAR基准上，Agent的导航错误占主导（27-52%），而工具调用错误低于17%，说明Agent失败的主要原因不是工具使用，而是导航到正确页面的能力不足，这一现象在线性基准中无法被观察到。
analysis.method: 提出AAR基准，包含1400个实例，分为顺序变体（800个）和组合变体（600个DAG），每个实例要求Agent在Wikipedia上执行多步工具链并聚合结果，通过三个互补指标（终点线准确率、中途站访问率、路障完成率）分别诊断导航、工具使用和算术错误。
contributions: 提出AAR基准，包含DAG结构的工具链，填补了现有线性基准的空白。
通过三个互补指标揭示了Agent失败的主要原因是导航而非工具使用，并发现Agent架构与模型规模同等重要。
analysis.experiments: 在1400个实例上评估了三种Agent框架，最佳准确率仅37.2%，导航错误占27-52%，工具使用错误低于17%。
limitations: 基准仅基于Wikipedia，可能无法完全代表其他领域的工具使用场景。
未提供不同模型规模下的详细对比分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现有LLM Agent工具使用基准过于线性，本文提出包含有向无环图（DAG）工具链的AAR基准，发现Agent的主要瓶颈在于导航而非工具调用。

papers.title: Real-Time Human Reconstruction and Animation using Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: We present a generalizable feed-forward Gaussian splatting framework for human 3D reconstruction and real-time animation that operates directly on multi-view RGB images and their associated SMPL-X poses. Unlike prior methods that rely on depth supervision, fixed input views, UV map, or repeated feed-forward inference for each target view or pose, our approach predicts, in a canonical pose, a set of 3D Gaussian primitives associated with each SMPL-X vertex. One Gaussian is regularized to remain close to the SMPL-X surface, providing a strong geometric prior and stable correspondence to the parametric body model, while an additional small set of unconstrained Gaussians per vertex allows the representation to capture geometric structures that deviate from the parametric surface, such as clothing and hair. In contrast to recent approaches such as HumanRAM, which require repeated network inference to synthesize novel poses, our method produces an animatable human representation from a single forward pass; by explicitly associating Gaussian primitives with SMPL-X vertices, the reconstructed model can be efficiently animated via linear blend skinning without further network evaluation. We evaluate our method on the THuman 2.1, AvatarReX and THuman 4.0 datasets, where it achieves reconstruction quality comparable to state-of-the-art methods while uniquely supporting real-time animation and interactive applications. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/Devdoot57/HumanGS .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种前馈式高斯泼溅框架，从多视图RGB图像和SMPL-X姿态实时重建和动画化人体3D模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖深度监督、固定输入视图、UV图或对每个目标视图/姿态重复前馈推理，难以实现实时动画和交互应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从多视图RGB图像高效重建可动画化的人体3D模型，并支持实时动画。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在规范姿态下预测与SMPL-X顶点关联的3D高斯基元，其中每个顶点有一个受约束高斯（贴近表面）和若干无约束高斯（捕捉衣物等离群结构），通过线性混合蒙皮实现高效动画。
contributions: 提出一种前馈式高斯泼溅框架，单次前向传播即可生成可动画化的人体表示。
通过显式关联高斯基元与SMPL-X顶点，实现无需网络推理的实时动画。
analysis.experiments: 在THuman 2.1、AvatarReX和THuman 4.0数据集上评估，重建质量与最先进方法相当，且支持实时动画。
limitations: 可能依赖多视图输入，单视图场景下性能未知。
对极端姿态或复杂衣物的泛化能力可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种前馈式高斯泼溅框架，从多视图RGB图像和SMPL-X姿态实时重建和动画化人体3D模型。

papers.title: A Dual-Positive Monotone Parameterization for Multi-Segment Bids and a Validity Assessment Framework for Reinforcement Learning Agent-based Simulation of Electricity Markets
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning agent-based simulation (RL-ABS) has become an important tool for electricity market mechanism analysis and evaluation. In the modeling of monotone, bounded, multi-segment stepwise bids, existing methods typically let the policy network first output an unconstrained action and then convert it into a feasible bid curve satisfying monotonicity and boundedness through post-processing mappings such as sorting, clipping, or projection. However, such post-processing mappings often fail to satisfy continuous differentiability, injectivity, and invertibility at boundaries or kinks, thereby causing gradient distortion and leading to spurious convergence in simulation results. Meanwhile, most existing studies conduct mechanism analysis and evaluation mainly on the basis of training-curve convergence, without rigorously assessing the distance between the simulation outcomes and Nash equilibrium, which severely undermines the credibility of the results. To address these issues, this paper proposes...

analysis.tldr: 提出双正单调参数化方法解决电力市场多段报价的梯度失真问题，并构建基于纳什均衡距离的有效性评估框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习智能体仿真（RL-ABS）是电力市场机制分析的重要工具，但现有报价建模方法因后处理映射（如排序、裁剪）导致梯度失真和虚假收敛，且缺乏对仿真结果与纳什均衡距离的严格评估，影响结果可信度。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可微、单射且可逆的报价参数化方法，并建立仿真结果有效性的量化评估框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有后处理映射在边界或拐点处不满足连续可微性、单射性和可逆性，导致梯度失真和虚假收敛。
analysis.method: 提出双正单调参数化方法，直接生成满足单调性和有界性的多段报价曲线，避免后处理映射；同时构建基于纳什均衡距离的有效性评估框架。
contributions: 提出双正单调参数化方法，实现可微、单射且可逆的报价曲线生成，消除梯度失真。
构建基于纳什均衡距离的仿真有效性评估框架，提升结果可信度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的电力市场报价结构。
纳什均衡距离计算可能面临计算复杂度问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双正单调参数化方法解决电力市场多段报价的梯度失真问题，并构建基于纳什均衡距离的有效性评估框架。

papers.title: A Comparison of Multi-View Stereo Methods for Photogrammetric 3D Reconstruction: From Traditional to Learning-Based Approaches
papers.abstract: Photogrammetric 3D reconstruction has long relied on traditional Structure-from-Motion (SfM) and Multi-View Stereo (MVS) methods, which provide high accuracy but face challenges in speed and scalability. Recently, learning-based MVS methods have emerged, aiming for faster and more efficient reconstruction. This work presents a comparative evaluation between a representative traditional MVS pipeline (COLMAP) and state-of-the-art learning-based approaches, including geometry-guided methods (MVSNet, PatchmatchNet, MVSAnywhere, MVSFormer++) and end-to-end frameworks (Stereo4D, FoundationStereo, DUSt3R, MASt3R, Fast3R, VGGT). Two experiments were conducted on different aerial scenarios. The first experiment used the MARS-LVIG dataset, where ground-truth 3D reconstruction was provided by LiDAR point clouds. The second experiment used a public scene from the Pix4D official website, with ground truth generated by Pix4Dmapper. We evaluated accuracy, coverage, and runtime across all methods. Experimental results show that although COLMAP can provide reliable and geometrically consistent reconstruction results, it requires more computation time. In cases where traditional methods fail in image registration, learning-based approaches exhibit stronger feature-matching capability and greater robustness. Geometry-guided methods usually require careful dataset preparation and often depend on camera pose or depth priors generated by COLMAP. End-to-end methods such as DUSt3R and VGGT achieve competitive accuracy and reasonable coverage while offering substantially faster reconstruction. However, they exhibit relatively large residuals in 3D reconstruction, particularly in challenging scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较传统MVS与学习型MVS方法在航空摄影测量中的精度、覆盖率和速度，发现端到端方法速度快但残差较大。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统MVS方法精度高但速度慢、可扩展性差，学习型方法虽快但缺乏系统性对比评估，需要明确其在实际场景中的优劣。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对传统MVS与学习型MVS方法在航空摄影测量中精度、覆盖率和速度的公平、系统比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统方法COLMAP可靠但耗时；学习型方法在传统方法失败的图像配准中鲁棒性更强；几何引导方法依赖COLMAP先验；端到端方法速度快但3D重建残差较大。
analysis.method: 在MARS-LVIG数据集和Pix4D公开场景上，对比COLMAP与多种学习型MVS方法（MVSNet、PatchmatchNet、MVSAnywhere、MVSFormer++、Stereo4D、FoundationStereo、DUSt3R、MASt3R、Fast3R、VGGT），评估精度、覆盖率和运行时间。
contributions: 首次系统比较传统MVS与多种学习型MVS方法在航空摄影测量中的性能。
揭示了端到端方法速度快但残差大的权衡，以及几何引导方法对先验的依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在MARS-LVIG数据集（LiDAR点云真值）和Pix4D公开场景（Pix4Dmapper真值）上进行了两个实验，评估精度、覆盖率和运行时间。
limitations: 仅针对航空场景，未涵盖室内或物体级重建。
学习型方法可能依赖特定训练数据，泛化性未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较传统MVS与学习型MVS方法在航空摄影测量中的精度、覆盖率和速度，发现端到端方法速度快但残差较大。

papers.title: Warm-Started Reinforcement Learning for Iterative 3D/2D Liver Registration
papers.abstract: Registration between preoperative CT and intraoperative laparoscopic video plays a crucial role in augmented reality (AR) guidance for minimally invasive surgery. Learning-based methods have recently achieved registration errors comparable to optimization-based approaches while offering faster inference.
