However, many supervised methods produce coarse alignments that rely on additional optimization-based refinement, thereby increasing inference time. We present a discrete-action reinforcement learning (RL) framework that formulates CT-to-video registration as a sequential decision-making process. A shared feature encoder, warm-started from a supervised pose estimation network to provide stable geometric features and faster convergence, extracts representations from CT renderings and laparoscopic frames, while an RL policy head learns to choose rigid transformations along six degrees of freedom and to decide when to stop the iteration. Experiments on a public laparoscopic dataset demonstrated that our method achieved an average target registration error (TRE) of 15.70 mm, comparable to supervised approaches with optimization, while achieving faster convergence. The proposed RL-based formulation enables automated, efficient iterative registration without manually tuned step sizes or stopping criteria. This discrete framework provides a practical foundation for future continuous-action and deformable registration models in surgical AR applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种预热强化学习框架，用于CT到腹腔镜视频的3D/2D肝脏配准，无需优化后处理即可实现快速收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 微创手术中，术前CT与术中腹腔镜视频的配准对增强现实引导至关重要。现有学习方法虽快但常需额外优化步骤进行精炼，增加了推理时间。
analysis.problem: 如何实现无需优化后处理的快速、自动化CT到视频配准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将配准建模为离散动作强化学习过程，使用从监督位姿估计网络预热初始化的共享特征编码器，策略头学习选择六自由度刚体变换并决定迭代停止。
contributions: 提出离散动作RL框架，将CT到视频配准转化为序列决策问题，无需手动调整步长或停止准则。
通过预热初始化加速收敛，实现与带优化监督方法相当的配准精度（TRE 15.70 mm）且推理更快。
analysis.experiments: 在公开腹腔镜数据集上评估，平均目标配准误差（TRE）为15.70 mm，与带优化的监督方法相当，收敛更快。
limitations: 仅针对离散动作空间，连续动作和可变形配准未涉及。
仅在肝脏数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种预热强化学习框架，用于CT到腹腔镜视频的3D/2D肝脏配准，无需优化后处理即可实现快速收敛。

papers.title: MedVeriSeg: Teaching MLLM-Based Medical Segmentation Models to Verify Query Validity Without Extra Training
papers.abstract: Despite recent advances in MLLM-based medical image segmentation, existing LISA-like methods cannot reliably reject false queries and often produce hallucinated segmentation masks for absent targets. This limitation reduces practical reliability in both medical education and clinical use. In this work, we propose MedVeriSeg, a training-free verification framework that equips LISA-like medical segmentation models with the ability to identify and reject false queries which contain non-existent targets. Our key observation is that the similarity map between the [SEG] token feature and MLLM image features exhibits markedly different distribution patterns for true and false queries. Based on this, we introduce a Similarity Response Quality Scoring Module that characterizes the similarity map from three aspects: strength, compactness, and purity, producing an initial target-existence prediction. We further incorporate qualitative visual evidence by using GPT-4o to jointly assess the similarity heatmap and the results of Similarity Response Quality Scoring Module for final verification. Experiments on a small-scale benchmark constructed from SA-Med2D-20M show that MedVeriSeg effectively rejects false-query segmentation requests while maintaining reliable recognition of true queries.

analysis.tldr: 无需额外训练，通过分析[SEG] token与图像特征的相似图分布来拒绝虚假查询，提升MLLM医学分割模型的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM医学分割模型（如LISA）无法可靠拒绝虚假查询，常对不存在的目标产生幻觉分割掩码，降低了在医学教育和临床中的实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不额外训练的情况下，使MLLM医学分割模型具备识别和拒绝虚假查询（包含不存在目标）的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到真实查询与虚假查询的[SEG] token与MLLM图像特征之间的相似图分布模式存在显著差异。
analysis.method: 提出MedVeriSeg，一个无需训练的验证框架，包含相似度响应质量评分模块（从强度、紧凑性、纯度三方面刻画相似图）和GPT-4o联合评估相似度热图与评分结果，最终判断目标是否存在。
contributions: 提出一种无需额外训练的验证框架，使LISA类医学分割模型能拒绝虚假查询。
发现真实与虚假查询在[SEG] token相似图分布上的差异，并设计了三方面评分模块。
在SA-Med2D-20M构建的小规模基准上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在从SA-Med2D-20M构建的小规模基准上进行实验，结果表明MedVeriSeg能有效拒绝虚假查询分割请求，同时保持对真实查询的可靠识别。
limitations: 依赖GPT-4o进行最终验证，可能引入额外成本和延迟。
仅在单一数据集的小规模基准上测试，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无需额外训练，通过分析[SEG] token与图像特征的相似图分布来拒绝虚假查询，提升MLLM医学分割模型的可靠性。

papers.title: Adapting 2D Multi-Modal Large Language Model for 3D CT Image Analysis
papers.abstract: 3D medical image analysis is of great importance in disease diagnosis and treatment. Recently, multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have exhibited robust perceptual capacity, strong cross-modal alignment, and promising generalizability. Therefore, they have great potential to improve the performance of medical report generation (MRG) and medical visual question answering (MVQA), which serve as two important tasks in clinical scenarios. However, due to the scarcity of 3D medical images, existing 3D medical MLLMs suffer from insufficiently pretrained vision encoder and inability to extract customized image features for different kinds of tasks. In this paper, we propose to first transfer a 2D MLLM, which is well trained with 2D natural images, to support 3D medical volumetric inputs while reusing all of its pre-trained parameters. To enable the vision encoder to extract tailored image features for various tasks, we then design a Text-Guided Hierarchical MoE (TGH-MoE) framework, which can distinguish tasks under the guidance of the text prompt. Furthermore, we propose a two-stage training strategy to learn both task-shared and task-specific image features. As demonstrated empirically, our method outperforms existing 3D medical MLLMs in both MRG and MVQA tasks. Our code will be released once this paper is accepted.

analysis.tldr: 将2D多模态大语言模型适配到3D CT图像分析，通过文本引导的层次化MoE和两阶段训练提升医学报告生成和视觉问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D医学图像分析在疾病诊断和治疗中至关重要，但现有3D医学MLLM因3D图像稀缺导致视觉编码器预训练不足，且无法为不同任务提取定制化图像特征。
analysis.problem: 如何将预训练充分的2D MLLM适配到3D医学体积输入，并使其能为不同任务提取定制化图像特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 首先将2D MLLM迁移到3D医学体积输入，复用所有预训练参数；然后设计文本引导的层次化混合专家（TGH-MoE）框架，在文本提示指导下区分任务；最后提出两阶段训练策略学习任务共享和任务特定特征。
contributions: 提出将2D MLLM适配到3D医学图像分析的方法，复用预训练参数。
设计TGH-MoE框架实现任务定制化特征提取。
提出两阶段训练策略学习任务共享和任务特定特征。
analysis.experiments: 在MRG和MVQA任务上，所提方法优于现有3D医学MLLM。
limitations: 可能依赖2D预训练模型在3D任务上的泛化能力。
TGH-MoE框架可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将2D多模态大语言模型适配到3D CT图像分析，通过文本引导的层次化MoE和两阶段训练提升医学报告生成和视觉问答性能。

papers.title: SVSR: A Self-Verification and Self-Rectification Paradigm for Multimodal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Current multimodal models often suffer from shallow reasoning, leading to errors caused by incomplete or inconsistent thought processes. To address this limitation, we propose Self-Verification and Self-Rectification (SVSR), a unified framework that explicitly integrates self-verification and self-rectification into the model's reasoning pipeline, substantially improving robustness and reliability in complex visual understanding and multimodal reasoning tasks. SVSR is built on a novel three-stage training paradigm. First, we construct a high-quality unified preference dataset by refining reasoning traces from pre-trained vision-language models, incorporating both forward and backward reasoning to embed self-reflective signals. Second, we perform cold-start supervised fine-tuning on this dataset to learn structured, multi-step reasoning behaviors. Third, we apply a Semi-online Direct Preference Optimization (Semi-online DPO) process, continuously augmenting the training corpus with high-quality, model-generated reasoning traces filtered by a powerful teacher VLM. This pipeline enables the model to learn, elicit, and refine its ability to self-verify and self-rectify. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that SVSR improves reasoning accuracy and enables stronger generalization to unseen tasks and question types. Notably, once trained with explicit self-reflective reasoning, the model also exhibits improved implicit reasoning ability, outperforming strong baselines even when no explicit reasoning traces are provided. These results highlight the potential of SVSR for building more dependable, introspective, and cognitively aligned multimodal systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出SVSR框架，通过自验证与自纠正三阶段训练范式提升多模态推理的鲁棒性和可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多模态模型推理浅层，易因不完整或不一致的思维过程产生错误，亟需提升推理的鲁棒性和可靠性。
analysis.problem: 多模态模型在复杂视觉理解和推理任务中缺乏自我验证与纠正能力，导致推理错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SVSR框架，包含三阶段训练：1) 构建统一偏好数据集，融合前向与反向推理；2) 冷启动监督微调学习结构化多步推理；3) 半在线直接偏好优化，用教师VLM筛选高质量推理轨迹持续增强。
contributions: 提出SVSR统一框架，将自验证与自纠正显式集成到多模态推理流程中。
设计三阶段训练范式，包括偏好数据集构建、冷启动SFT和半在线DPO。
实验证明SVSR提升推理准确率，增强对未见任务和问题类型的泛化能力，并改善隐式推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个不同基准上进行了广泛实验，表明SVSR提升了推理准确率，并实现了更强的泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖强大的教师VLM进行推理轨迹筛选，可能引入额外计算成本。
三阶段训练流程复杂，调优难度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SVSR框架，通过自验证与自纠正三阶段训练范式提升多模态推理的鲁棒性和可靠性。

papers.title: Exploring the impact of fairness-aware criteria in AutoML
papers.abstract: Machine Learning (ML) systems are increasingly used to support decision-making processes that affect individuals. However, these systems often rely on biased data, which can lead to unfair outcomes against specific groups. With the growing adoption of Automated Machine Learning (AutoML), the risk of intensifying discriminatory behaviours increases, as most frameworks primarily focus on model selection to maximise predictive performance. Previous research on fairness in AutoML had largely followed this trend, integrating fairness awareness only in the model selection or hyperparameter tuning, while neglecting other critical stages of the ML pipeline. This paper aims to study the impact of integrating fairness directly into the optimisation component of an AutoML framework that constructs complete ML pipelines, from data selection and transformations to model selection and tuning. As selecting appropriate fairness metrics remains a key challenge, our work incorporates complementary fairness metrics to capture different dimensions of fairness during the optimisation. Their integration within AutoML resulted in measurable differences compared to a baseline focused solely on predictive performance. Despite a 9.4% decrease in predictive power, the average fairness improved by 14.5%, accompanied by a 35.7% reduction in data usage. Furthermore, fairness integration produced complete yet simpler final solutions, suggesting that model complexity is not always required to achieve balanced and fair ML solutions.

analysis.tldr: 在AutoML优化中直接集成公平性指标，以9.4%预测性能下降换取14.5%公平性提升和35.7%数据使用减少。
analysis.research_motivation: AutoML框架通常只关注预测性能最大化，可能加剧歧视行为，而现有公平性研究仅局限于模型选择或超参数调优，忽略了ML流水线的其他关键阶段。
analysis.problem: 如何在AutoML的优化组件中直接集成公平性指标，以构建完整且公平的ML流水线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 集成公平性后，预测性能下降9.4%，但平均公平性提升14.5%，数据使用减少35.7%，且最终解决方案更简单，表明模型复杂度并非实现公平性的必要条件。
analysis.method: 在AutoML框架的优化组件中直接集成互补的公平性指标，覆盖数据选择、变换、模型选择和调优等完整流水线阶段。
contributions: 首次在AutoML的优化组件中直接集成公平性指标，覆盖完整ML流水线。
通过实验量化了公平性集成带来的性能-公平性权衡，并发现数据使用减少和模型简化等额外收益。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验设置，但报告了预测性能下降9.4%、公平性提升14.5%、数据使用减少35.7%等量化结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的AutoML框架或数据集。
公平性指标的互补性选择可能依赖领域知识，缺乏通用指导。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在AutoML优化中直接集成公平性指标，以9.4%预测性能下降换取14.5%公平性提升和35.7%数据使用减少。

papers.title: Cognitive Pivot Points and Visual Anchoring: Unveiling and Rectifying Hallucinations in Multimodal Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Reasoning Models (MLRMs) have achieved remarkable strides in visual reasoning through test time compute scaling, yet long chain reasoning remains prone to hallucinations. We identify a concerning phenomenon termed the Reasoning Vision Truth Disconnect (RVTD): hallucinations are strongly correlated with cognitive bifurcation points that often exhibit high entropy states. We attribute this vulnerability to a breakdown in visual semantic anchoring, localized within the network's intermediate layers; specifically, during these high uncertainty transitions, the model fails to query visual evidence, reverting instead to language priors. Consequently, we advocate a shift from solely outcome level supervision to augmenting it with fine grained internal attention guidance. To this end, we propose V-STAR (Visual Structural Training with Attention Reinforcement), a lightweight, holistic training paradigm designed to internalize visually aware reasoning capabilities. Central to our approach is the Hierarchical Visual Attention Reward (HVAR), integrated within the GRPO framework. Upon detecting high entropy states, this mechanism dynamically incentivizes visual attention across critical intermediate layers, thereby anchoring the reasoning process back to the visual input. Furthermore, we introduce the Forced Reflection Mechanism (FRM), a trajectory editing strategy that disrupts cognitive inertia by triggering reflection around high entropy cognitive bifurcation points and encouraging verification of subsequent steps against the visual input, thereby translating external debiasing interventions into an intrinsic capability for hallucination mitigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出V-STAR训练范式，通过层级视觉注意力奖励和强制反思机制，在多模态大语言模型长链推理中纠正幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大语言模型在长链推理中易产生幻觉，现有方法主要关注输出层面监督，缺乏对推理过程中视觉锚定失效的细粒度干预。
analysis.problem: 多模态推理模型在长链推理中因视觉语义锚定失效而出现幻觉，尤其是在高熵认知分叉点。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现推理-视觉-真相脱节现象：幻觉与高熵认知分叉点强相关，模型在这些时刻依赖语言先验而非视觉证据。
analysis.method: 提出V-STAR训练范式，包含层级视觉注意力奖励（HVAR）和强制反思机制（FRM），在GRPO框架内动态激励视觉注意力并触发反思。
contributions: 识别并分析了多模态推理中的推理-视觉-真相脱节现象。
提出V-STAR训练范式，通过层级视觉注意力奖励和强制反思机制有效缓解幻觉。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如GRPO框架）。
高熵状态检测的阈值设定可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出V-STAR训练范式，通过层级视觉注意力奖励和强制反思机制，在多模态大语言模型长链推理中纠正幻觉。

papers.title: SMFormer: Empowering Self-supervised Stereo Matching via Foundation Models and Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: Recent self-supervised stereo matching methods have made significant progress. They typically rely on the photometric consistency assumption, which presumes corresponding points across views share the same appearance. However, this assumption could be compromised by real-world disturbances, resulting in invalid supervisory signals and a significant accuracy gap compared to supervised methods. To address this issue, we propose SMFormer, a framework integrating more reliable self-supervision guided by the Vision Foundation Model (VFM) and data augmentation. We first incorporate the VFM with the Feature Pyramid Network (FPN), providing a discriminative and robust feature representation against disturbance in various scenarios. We then devise an effective data augmentation mechanism that ensures robustness to various transformations. The data augmentation mechanism explicitly enforces consistency between learned features and those influenced by illumination variations. Additionally, it regularizes the output consistency between disparity predictions of strong augmented samples and those generated from standard samples. Experiments on multiple mainstream benchmarks demonstrate that our SMFormer achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) performance among self-supervised methods and even competes on par with supervised ones. Remarkably, in the challenging Booster benchmark, SMFormer even outperforms some SOTA supervised methods, such as CFNet.

analysis.tldr: SMFormer通过视觉基础模型和数据增强提升自监督立体匹配的鲁棒性，达到与监督方法相当的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督立体匹配方法依赖光度一致性假设，但现实中的光照变化等干扰会破坏该假设，导致监督信号失效，与监督方法存在显著精度差距。
analysis.problem: 解决自监督立体匹配中光度一致性假设因现实干扰而失效的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出光度一致性假设在真实场景中易受干扰，导致自监督方法精度远低于监督方法。
analysis.method: 提出SMFormer框架，集成视觉基础模型（VFM）与特征金字塔网络（FPN）以提取鲁棒特征，并设计数据增强机制，包括光照一致性约束和强增强样本与标准样本的视差一致性正则化。
contributions: 首次将视觉基础模型融入自监督立体匹配，提升特征判别性和鲁棒性。
提出有效的数据增强机制，显式约束光照变化下的特征一致性及强增强样本的视差输出一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个主流基准上达到自监督方法SOTA，在Booster基准上甚至超越部分监督方法（如CFNet）。
limitations: 可能依赖VFM的预训练质量，泛化到极端未见场景时效果未知。
数据增强机制可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SMFormer通过视觉基础模型和数据增强提升自监督立体匹配的鲁棒性，达到与监督方法相当的性能。

papers.title: Are Pretrained Image Matchers Good Enough for SAR-Optical Satellite Registration?
papers.abstract: Cross-modal optical-SAR (Synthetic Aperture Radar) registration is a bottleneck for disaster-response via remote sensing, yet modern image matchers are developed and benchmarked almost exclusively on natural-image domains. We evaluate twenty-four pretrained matcher families--in a zero-shot setting with no fine-tuning or domain adaptation on satellite or SAR data--on SpaceNet9 and two additional cross-modal benchmarks under a deterministic protocol with tiled large-image inference, robust geometric filtering, and tie-point-grounded metrics. Our results reveal asymmetric transfer--matchers with explicit cross-modal training do not uniformly outperform those without it. While XoFTR (trained for visible-thermal matching) and RoMa achieve the lowest reported mean error at $3.0$ px on the labeled SpaceNet9 training scenes, RoMa achieves this without any cross-modal training, and MatchAnything-ELoFTR ($3.4$ px)--trained on synthetic cross-modal pairs--matches closely, suggesting (as a working hypothesis) that foundation-model features (DINOv2) may contribute to modality invariance that partially substitutes for explicit cross-modal supervision. 3D-reconstruction matchers (MASt3R, DUSt3R), which are not designed for traditional 2D image matching, are highly protocol-sensitive and remain fragile under default settings. Deployment protocol choices (geometry model, tile size, inlier gating) shift accuracy by up to $33\times$ for a single matcher, sometimes exceeding the effect of swapping matchers entirely within the evaluated sweep--affine geometry alone reduces mean error from $12.34$ to $9.74$ px. These findings inform both practical deployment of existing matchers and future matcher design for cross-modal satellite registration.

analysis.tldr: 零样本评估24种预训练图像匹配器在SAR-光学卫星图像配准中的表现，发现跨模态训练并非必要，协议选择影响巨大。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨模态光学-SAR图像配准是灾害响应遥感的关键瓶颈，但现有图像匹配器主要在自然图像域开发和评测，缺乏对卫星/SAR数据的零样本评估。
analysis.problem: 评估预训练图像匹配器在零样本设置下对SAR-光学卫星图像配准的适用性，并分析跨模态训练、协议选择等因素的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现非对称迁移：显式跨模态训练的匹配器并不一致优于无跨模态训练的匹配器；RoMa（无跨模态训练）达到最低平均误差3.0像素；协议选择（几何模型、瓦片大小、内点门控）对精度的影响可高达33倍，有时超过更换匹配器本身。
analysis.method: 在零样本设置下，对24种预训练匹配器家族进行确定性协议评估，包括分块大图像推理、鲁棒几何滤波和基于连接点的度量，使用SpaceNet9及两个额外跨模态基准。
contributions: 系统评估了24种预训练匹配器在SAR-光学卫星图像配准中的零样本性能。
发现跨模态训练并非必要，基础模型特征（如DINOv2）可能部分替代显式跨模态监督。
揭示了部署协议选择对配准精度的巨大影响，超过匹配器本身的选择。
analysis.experiments: 在SpaceNet9和两个额外跨模态基准上，使用确定性协议评估24种匹配器家族，报告平均误差等指标。
limitations: 零样本设置可能无法反映微调或域适应后的性能。
评估限于特定数据集和协议，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 零样本评估24种预训练图像匹配器在SAR-光学卫星图像配准中的表现，发现跨模态训练并非必要，协议选择影响巨大。

papers.title: ReaLiTy and LADS: A Unified Framework and Dataset Suite for LiDAR Adaptation Across Sensors and Adverse Weather Conditions
papers.abstract: Reliable LiDAR perception requires robustness across sensors, environments, and adverse weather. However, existing datasets rarely provide physically consistent observations of the same scene under varying sensor configurations and weather conditions, limiting systematic analysis of domain shifts. This work presents ReaLiTy, a unified physics-informed framework that transforms LiDAR data to match target sensor specifications and weather conditions. The framework integrates physically grounded cues with a learning-based module to generate realistic intensity patterns, while a physics-based weather model introduces consistent geometric and radiometric degradations. Building on this framework, we introduce the LiDAR Adaptation Dataset Suite (LADS), a collection of physically consistent, transformation-ready point clouds with one-to-one correspondence to original datasets. Experiments demonstrate improved cross-domain consistency and realistic weather effects. ReaLiTy and LADS provide a reproducible foundation for studying LiDAR adaptation and simulation-driven perception in intelligent transportation systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一物理信息框架ReaLiTy和数据集套件LADS，用于跨传感器和恶劣天气的LiDAR适配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LiDAR数据集缺乏同一场景在不同传感器配置和天气条件下的物理一致观测，限制了领域偏移的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 如何生成物理一致的LiDAR数据以匹配不同传感器规格和天气条件，并建立系统评估基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ReaLiTy框架结合物理引导和学习模块生成真实强度模式，并利用物理天气模型引入几何和辐射退化；LADS数据集提供与原始数据一一对应的物理一致点云。
contributions: 提出ReaLiTy，一个统一的物理信息框架，用于跨传感器和天气条件的LiDAR数据转换。
构建LADS数据集套件，包含物理一致且可转换的点云，支持LiDAR适配研究。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明改进的跨域一致性和逼真的天气效果，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定传感器参数，泛化性需验证。
天气模型可能无法覆盖所有真实退化情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一物理信息框架ReaLiTy和数据集套件LADS，用于跨传感器和恶劣天气的LiDAR适配。

papers.title: A3-FPN: Asymptotic Content-Aware Pyramid Attention Network for Dense Visual Prediction
papers.abstract: Learning multi-scale representations is the common strategy to tackle object scale variation in dense prediction tasks. Although existing feature pyramid networks have greatly advanced visual recognition, inherent design defects inhibit them from capturing discriminative features and recognizing small objects. In this work, we propose Asymptotic Content-Aware Pyramid Attention Network (A3-FPN), to augment multi-scale feature representation via the asymptotically disentangled framework and content-aware attention modules. Specifically, A3-FPN employs a horizontally-spread column network that enables asymptotically global feature interaction and disentangles each level from all hierarchical representations. In feature fusion, it collects supplementary content from the adjacent level to generate position-wise offsets and weights for context-aware resampling, and learns deep context reweights to improve intra-category similarity. In feature reassembly, it further strengthens intra-scale discriminative feature learning and reassembles redundant features based on information content and spatial variation of feature maps. Extensive experiments on MS COCO, VisDrone2019-DET and Cityscapes demonstrate that A3-FPN can be easily integrated into state-of-the-art CNN and Transformer-based architectures, yielding remarkable performance gains. Notably, when paired with OneFormer and Swin-L backbone, A3-FPN achieves 49.6 mask AP on MS COCO and 85.6 mIoU on Cityscapes. Codes are available at https://github.com/mason-ching/A3-FPN.

analysis.tldr: 提出A3-FPN，通过渐近解耦框架和内容感知注意力增强多尺度特征表示，提升密集视觉预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有特征金字塔网络在密集预测任务中难以捕获判别性特征和小物体，存在设计缺陷。
analysis.problem: 解决多尺度特征表示中特征判别性不足和小物体识别困难的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出A3-FPN，包括水平扩展列网络实现渐近全局特征交互并解耦各层级；特征融合时从相邻层级收集补充内容生成位置偏移和权重进行上下文感知重采样，并学习深度上下文重加权；特征重组时基于信息内容和空间变化强化尺度内判别性特征并重组冗余特征。
contributions: 提出渐近解耦框架和内容感知注意力模块，增强多尺度特征表示。
在多个密集预测基准上取得显著性能提升，可轻松集成到现有CNN和Transformer架构中。
analysis.experiments: 在MS COCO、VisDrone2019-DET和Cityscapes上实验，与OneFormer和Swin-L骨干结合在COCO上达到49.6 mask AP，在Cityscapes上达到85.6 mIoU。
limitations: 可能增加计算复杂度。
未在更多密集预测任务上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出A3-FPN，通过渐近解耦框架和内容感知注意力增强多尺度特征表示，提升密集视觉预测性能。

papers.title: Wolkowicz-Styan Upper Bound on the Hessian Eigenspectrum for Cross-Entropy Loss in Nonlinear Smooth Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Neural networks (NNs) are central to modern machine learning and achieve state-of-the-art results in many applications. However, the relationship between loss geometry and generalization is still not well understood. The local geometry of the loss function near a critical point is well-approximated by its quadratic form, obtained through a second-order Taylor expansion. The coefficients of the quadratic term correspond to the Hessian matrix, whose eigenspectrum allows us to evaluate the sharpness of the loss at the critical point. Extensive research suggests flat critical points generalize better, while sharp ones lead to higher generalization error. However, sharpness requires the Hessian eigenspectrum, but general matrix characteristic equations have no closed-form solution. Therefore, most existing studies on evaluating loss sharpness rely on numerical approximation methods. Existing closed-form analyses of the eigenspectrum are primarily limited to simplified architectures, such as linear or ReLU-activated networks; consequently, theoretical analysis of smooth nonlinear multilayer neural networks remains limited. Against this background, this study focuses on nonlinear, smooth multilayer neural networks and derives a closed-form upper bound for the maximum eigenvalue of the Hessian with respect to the cross-entropy loss by leveraging the Wolkowicz-Styan bound. Specifically, the derived upper bound is expressed as a function of the affine transformation parameters, hidden layer dimensions, and the degree of orthogonality among the training samples. The primary contribution of this paper is an analytical characterization of loss sharpness in smooth nonlinear multilayer neural networks via a closed-form expression, avoiding explicit numerical eigenspectrum computation. We hope that this work provides a small yet meaningful step toward unraveling the mysteries of deep learning.

analysis.tldr: 针对非线性平滑多层神经网络，推导了交叉熵损失下Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭式上界。
analysis.research_motivation: 损失几何与泛化关系尚不明确，现有锐度分析依赖数值近似，且闭式解仅适用于线性或ReLU网络，缺乏对平滑非线性多层网络的理论分析。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行数值特征分解的情况下，解析地表征平滑非线性多层神经网络交叉熵损失的锐度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 平坦临界点泛化更好，尖锐临界点泛化误差更高；但Hessian特征谱无闭式解，现有研究依赖数值近似。
analysis.method: 利用Wolkowicz-Styan界，推导交叉熵损失下Hessian最大特征值的闭式上界，表示为仿射变换参数、隐藏层维度和训练样本正交性的函数。
contributions: 首次为平滑非线性多层神经网络提供Hessian最大特征值的闭式上界。
避免显式数值特征谱计算，实现损失锐度的解析表征。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 上界可能不够紧，实际锐度可能远小于该界。
仅针对交叉熵损失，其他损失函数需另行推导。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对非线性平滑多层神经网络，推导了交叉熵损失下Hessian矩阵最大特征值的闭式上界。

papers.title: Edu-MMBias: A Three-Tier Multimodal Benchmark for Auditing Social Bias in Vision-Language Models under Educational Contexts
papers.abstract: As Vision-Language Models (VLMs) become integral to educational decision-making, ensuring their fairness is paramount. However, current text-centric evaluations neglect the visual modality, leaving an unregulated channel for latent social biases. To bridge this gap, we present Edu-MMBias, a systematic auditing framework grounded in the tri-component model of attitudes from social psychology. This framework diagnoses bias across three hierarchical dimensions: cognitive, affective, and behavioral. Utilizing a specialized generative pipeline that incorporates a self-correct mechanism and human-in-the-loop verification, we synthesize contamination-resistant student profiles to conduct a holistic stress test on state-of-the-art VLMs. Our extensive audit reveals critical, counter-intuitive patterns: models exhibit a compensatory class bias favoring lower-status narratives while simultaneously harboring deep-seated health and racial stereotypes. Crucially, we find that visual inputs act as a safety backdoor, triggering a resurgence of biases that bypass text-based alignment safeguards and revealing a systematic misalignment between latent cognition and final decision-making. The contributions of this paper are available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EduMMBias-63B2.

analysis.tldr: 提出教育场景下VLM社会偏见三维度基准Edu-MMBias，发现视觉输入是绕过文本对齐的安全后门。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前VLM公平性评估仅关注文本模态，忽视了视觉模态中隐藏的社会偏见，而VLM正被用于教育决策，亟需系统性审计框架。
analysis.problem: 缺乏针对教育场景的多模态社会偏见基准，无法检测视觉输入触发的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型表现出补偿性阶级偏见（偏向低地位叙事）和深层的健康/种族刻板印象；视觉输入作为安全后门，能绕过文本对齐触发偏见，且潜在认知与最终决策存在系统性错位。
analysis.method: 基于社会心理学态度三成分模型（认知、情感、行为），设计生成管道（含自纠正机制和人机验证）合成抗污染学生画像，对VLM进行压力测试。
contributions: 提出Edu-MMBias，首个教育场景下三维度多模态社会偏见审计框架
发现视觉输入是VLM安全后门，揭示文本对齐无法消除的偏见模式
analysis.experiments: 对多个SOTA VLM进行广泛审计，发现补偿性阶级偏见和健康/种族刻板印象，以及视觉后门效应。
limitations: 仅聚焦教育场景，泛化性待验证
合成学生画像可能无法完全覆盖真实偏见分布
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出教育场景下VLM社会偏见三维度基准Edu-MMBias，发现视觉输入是绕过文本对齐的安全后门。

papers.title: Radiology Report Generation for Low-Quality X-Ray Images
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have significantly advanced automated Radiology Report Generation (RRG). However, existing methods implicitly assume high-quality inputs, overlooking the noise and artifacts prevalent in real-world clinical environments. Consequently, current models exhibit severe performance degradation when processing suboptimal images. To bridge this gap, we propose a robust report generation framework explicitly designed for image quality variations. We first introduce an Automated Quality Assessment Agent (AQAA) to identify low-quality samples within the MIMIC-CXR dataset and establish the Low-quality Radiology Report Generation (LRRG) benchmark. To tackle degradation-induced shifts, we propose a novel Dual-loop Training Strategy leveraging bi-level optimization and gradient consistency. This approach ensures the model learns quality-agnostic diagnostic features by aligning gradient directions across varying quality regimes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively mitigates model performance degradation caused by image quality deterioration. The code and data will be released upon acceptance.

analysis.tldr: 提出针对低质量X光图像的鲁棒报告生成框架，通过质量评估代理和双环训练策略缓解图像退化导致的性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有放射学报告生成方法假设输入图像高质量，但真实临床环境中噪声和伪影普遍存在，导致模型在低质量图像上性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 如何使放射学报告生成模型对图像质量变化具有鲁棒性，避免因图像退化导致的诊断性能损失。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前VLM在低质量X光图像上性能严重退化，但未提供具体退化模式或失败案例细节。
analysis.method: 提出包含自动化质量评估代理（AQAA）和双环训练策略（利用双层优化和梯度一致性）的鲁棒报告生成框架，使模型学习质量无关的诊断特征。
contributions: 提出自动化质量评估代理（AQAA）识别低质量样本，并建立低质量放射学报告生成（LRRG）基准。
提出双环训练策略，通过梯度一致性对齐不同质量区域的诊断特征，缓解图像退化导致的性能下降。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上进行实验，结果表明方法有效缓解了图像质量退化导致的模型性能下降。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅在MIMIC-CXR数据集上验证，泛化性需更多数据集支持。
双环训练策略的计算开销可能较大，实际部署效率待评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出针对低质量X光图像的鲁棒报告生成框架，通过质量评估代理和双环训练策略缓解图像退化导致的性能下降。

papers.title: Taming Asynchronous CPU-GPU Coupling for Frequency-aware Latency Estimation on Mobile Edge
papers.abstract: Precise estimation of model inference latency is crucial for time-critical mobile edge applications, enabling devices to calculate latency margins against deadlines and trade them for enhanced model performance or resource savings. However, the ubiquity of Dynamic Voltage and Frequency Scaling (DVFS) renders traditional static profiling invalid in real-world deployments, as inference latency fluctuates with varying processor (CPU and GPU) frequencies. While extensive profiling across frequency combinations is theoretically possible, it is prohibitively expensive, particularly for emerging Small Language Models (SLMs), where variable context lengths explode the profiling up to days. We observe that simple analytic scaling fails to predict these fluctuations due to the complex asynchronous coupling between CPU (kernel launching) and GPU (execution). In this paper, we introduce FLAME to accurately estimate inference latency across frequency combinations. It features a novel layer-wise modeling that quantifies the overlapping parallelism and then aggregates dynamic pipeline bubbles caused by asynchronous processor interactions when extending to the full model. This bottom-up approach ensures generalizability across diverse models from DNNs to SLMs, and its precise modeling allows for profiling a sparse subset of samples, cutting DNN profiling from hours to minutes and SLM profiling from days to mere minutes, while maintaining small estimation errors across frequencies. We further showcase FLAME's utility in a deadline-aware DVFS, outperforming the state-of-the-art approach in both power efficiency and latency guarantees.

analysis.tldr: 提出FLAME方法，通过层间异步耦合建模实现跨频率的移动端模型推理延迟精确估计，大幅降低profiling开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动边缘应用中，DVFS导致推理延迟随CPU/GPU频率波动，传统静态profiling失效；全频率组合profiling成本过高，尤其对变长SLM可达数天。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且准确地估计不同CPU/GPU频率组合下的模型推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 简单解析缩放无法预测延迟波动，原因是CPU（内核启动）与GPU（执行）之间存在复杂的异步耦合。
analysis.method: 提出FLAME，包含层间建模量化重叠并行性，并聚合异步处理器交互导致的动态流水线气泡，采用自底向上方式从稀疏样本推广至全模型。
contributions: 提出层间异步耦合建模方法，准确估计跨频率的推理延迟。
实现稀疏profiling，将DNN profiling从小时降至分钟，SLM从数天降至分钟，且误差小。
在deadline-aware DVFS中展示应用，优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于CPU-GPU异步耦合场景，其他异构架构需调整。
稀疏采样策略的通用性可能受模型结构差异影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FLAME方法，通过层间异步耦合建模实现跨频率的移动端模型推理延迟精确估计，大幅降低profiling开销。

papers.title: Credit-Budgeted ICPC-Style Coding: When Agents Must Pay for Every Decision
papers.abstract: Current evaluations of autonomous coding agents assume an unrealistic, infinite-resource environment. However, real-world software engineering is a resource-bound competition. As we scale toward large agent swarms, ignoring compute and time costs risks catastrophic budget exhaustion. To shift the focus from isolated accuracy to cost-aware problem-solving, we introduce USACOArena, an interactive ACM-ICPC-style arena driven by a strict "credit" economy. Every generated token, local test, and elapsed second depletes a fixed budget, forcing agents to make strategic trade-offs. Our comprehensive profiling reveals that frontier single agents and swarms currently fail to optimally balance accuracy with these constraints, exhibiting divergent, path-dependent behaviors. Ultimately, USACOArena provides an essential dynamic training ground for developing highly efficient, resource-aware agent architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出USACOArena，通过信用经济机制评估编码智能体在资源约束下的成本感知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自主编码智能体评估假设无限资源环境，但现实软件工程是资源受限的竞争，忽略计算和时间成本可能导致预算耗尽。
analysis.problem: 如何评估和训练编码智能体在严格资源约束下平衡准确性与成本的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿单智能体和多智能体系统在最优平衡准确性与约束方面表现不佳，表现出发散、路径依赖的行为。
analysis.method: 引入USACOArena，一个基于ACM-ICPC风格的交互式竞技场，采用严格的信用经济机制，每个生成的token、本地测试和经过的秒数都会消耗固定预算。
contributions: 提出USACOArena，一个资源约束下的编码智能体评估框架。
揭示当前智能体在成本感知问题解决中的不足和路径依赖行为。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于编程竞赛类任务，泛化性待验证。
信用经济机制可能无法完全模拟真实软件工程成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出USACOArena，通过信用经济机制评估编码智能体在资源约束下的成本感知能力。

papers.title: PoreDiT: A Scalable Generative Model for Large-Scale Digital Rock Reconstruction
papers.abstract: This manuscript presents PoreDiT, a novel generative model designed for high-efficiency digital rock reconstruction at gigavoxel scales. Addressing the significant challenges in digital rock physics (DRP), particularly the trade-off between resolution and field-of-view (FOV), and the computational bottlenecks associated with traditional deep learning architectures, PoreDiT leverages a three-dimensional (3D) Swin Transformer to break through these limitations. By directly predicting the binary probability field of pore spaces instead of grayscale intensities, the model preserves key topological features critical for pore-scale fluid flow and transport simulations. This approach enhances computational efficiency, enabling the generation of ultra-large-scale ($1024^3$ voxels) digital rock samples on consumer-grade hardware. Furthermore, PoreDiT achieves physical fidelity comparable to previous state-of-the-art methods, including accurate porosity, pore-scale permeability, and Euler characteristics. The model's ability to scale efficiently opens new avenues for large-domain hydrodynamic simulations and provides practical solutions for researchers in pore-scale fluid mechanics, reservoir characterization, and carbon sequestration.

analysis.tldr: PoreDiT利用3D Swin Transformer直接预测孔隙二值概率场，实现千兆体素级数字岩心高效重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 数字岩心物理中分辨率与视场难以兼顾，传统深度学习架构存在计算瓶颈，限制了大规模孔隙尺度流体模拟。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成超大规模（1024^3体素）且保持物理保真度的数字岩心样本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于3D Swin Transformer直接预测孔隙空间的二值概率场，而非灰度强度，从而保留关键拓扑特征并提升计算效率。
contributions: 提出PoreDiT，一种可扩展的生成模型，能在消费级硬件上生成1024^3体素的数字岩心。
通过直接预测二值概率场，在保持物理保真度（孔隙度、渗透率、欧拉示性数）的同时提升效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于二值孔隙结构，对多矿物或复杂纹理的岩心适用性未知。
物理保真度验证可能局限于特定岩石类型或模拟条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PoreDiT利用3D Swin Transformer直接预测孔隙二值概率场，实现千兆体素级数字岩心高效重建。

papers.title: Device-Conditioned Neural Architecture Search for Efficient Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: The growing complexity of visuomotor policies poses significant challenges for deployment with heterogeneous robotic hardware constraints. However, most existing model-efficient approaches for robotic manipulation are device- and model-specific, lack generalizability, and require time-consuming per-device optimization during the adaptation process. In this work, we propose a unified framework named \textbf{D}evice-\textbf{C}onditioned \textbf{Q}uantization-\textbf{F}or-\textbf{A}ll (DC-QFA) which amortizes deployment effort with the device-conditioned quantization-aware training and hardware-constrained architecture search. Specifically, we introduce a single supernet that spans a rich design space over network architectures and mixed-precision bit-widths. It is optimized with latency- and memory-aware regularization, guided by per-device lookup tables. With this supernet, for each target platform, we can perform a once-for-all lightweight search to select an optimal subnet without any per-device re-optimization, which enables more generalizable deployment across heterogeneous hardware, and substantially reduces deployment time. To improve long-horizon stability under low precision, we further introduce multi-step on-policy distillation to mitigate error accumulation during closed-loop execution. Extensive experiments on three representative policy backbones, such as DiffusionPolicy-T, MDT-V, and OpenVLA-OFT, demonstrate that our DC-QFA achieves $2\text{-}3\times$ acceleration on edge devices, consumer-grade GPUs, and cloud platforms, with negligible performance drop in task success. Real-world evaluations on an Inovo robot equipped with a force/torque sensor further validates that our low-bit DC-QFA policies maintain stable, contact-rich manipulation even under severe quantization.

analysis.tldr: 提出设备条件量化感知训练与硬件约束架构搜索的统一框架，实现跨异构硬件的机器人操作策略高效部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉运动策略复杂度增加，部署到不同硬件时现有方法缺乏通用性且需逐设备优化，耗时且效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何实现机器人操作策略在异构硬件（边缘设备、消费级GPU、云平台）上的高效、通用部署，避免逐设备重新优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低精度量化会导致长程闭环执行中的误差累积，影响任务稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出DC-QFA框架，包含设备条件量化感知训练和硬件约束架构搜索：构建覆盖网络架构和混合精度位宽的超级网络，通过延迟和内存感知正则化（基于设备查找表）优化；部署时对每个目标平台进行一次轻量搜索选择最优子网；引入多步策略蒸馏缓解低精度下的误差累积。
contributions: 提出设备条件量化感知训练与硬件约束架构搜索的统一框架，实现跨异构硬件的一次性部署。
引入多步策略蒸馏方法，提升低精度下长程闭环执行的稳定性。
在多种策略骨干和真实机器人上验证，实现2-3倍加速且性能损失可忽略。
analysis.experiments: 在DiffusionPolicy-T、MDT-V、OpenVLA-OFT三种策略骨干上，于边缘设备、消费级GPU和云平台进行实验，取得2-3倍加速且任务成功率几乎无下降；在配备力/扭矩传感器的Inovo机器人上进行真实世界评估，验证了低比特策略在严重量化下仍能保持稳定的接触丰富操作。
limitations: 方法依赖预构建的设备查找表，可能对全新硬件需额外校准。
超级网络训练计算成本较高，但部署阶段轻量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出设备条件量化感知训练与硬件约束架构搜索的统一框架，实现跨异构硬件的机器人操作策略高效部署。

papers.title: MAVEN-T: Multi-Agent enVironment-aware Enhanced Neural Trajectory predictor with Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Trajectory prediction remains a critical yet challenging component in autonomous driving systems, requiring sophisticated reasoning capabilities while meeting strict real-time deployment constraints. While knowledge distillation has demonstrated effectiveness in model compression, existing approaches often fail to preserve complex decision-making capabilities, particularly in dynamic multi-agent scenarios. This paper introduces MAVEN-T, a teacher-student framework that achieves state-of-the-art trajectory prediction through complementary architectural co-design and progressive distillation. The teacher employs hybrid attention mechanisms for maximum representational capacity, while the student uses efficient architectures optimized for deployment. Knowledge transfer is performed via multi-granular distillation with adaptive curriculum learning that dynamically adjusts complexity based on performance. Importantly, the framework incorporates reinforcement learning to overcome the imitation ceiling of traditional distillation, enabling the student to verify, refine, and optimize teacher knowledge through dynamic environmental interaction, potentially achieving more robust decision-making than the teacher itself. Extensive experiments on NGSIM and highD datasets demonstrate 6.2x parameter compression and 3.7x inference speedup while maintaining state-of-the-art accuracy, establishing a new paradigm for deploying sophisticated reasoning models under resource constraints.

analysis.tldr: MAVEN-T 通过教师-学生框架与强化学习，实现轨迹预测的 6.2 倍参数压缩和 3.7 倍推理加速，同时保持 SOTA 精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 轨迹预测在自动驾驶中至关重要，但现有知识蒸馏方法在动态多智能体场景下难以保留复杂决策能力，且模型压缩与精度难以兼得。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高精度轨迹预测的同时，实现模型的高效压缩与实时部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统知识蒸馏存在模仿天花板，学生模型难以超越教师；多智能体动态场景下决策能力易丢失。
analysis.method: 提出 MAVEN-T 教师-学生框架：教师使用混合注意力机制，学生采用高效架构；通过多粒度蒸馏与自适应课程学习进行知识迁移；引入强化学习让学生通过环境交互优化教师知识，突破模仿天花板。
contributions: 提出互补架构协同设计与渐进蒸馏的教师-学生框架，实现 6.2 倍参数压缩和 3.7 倍推理加速。
引入强化学习克服传统蒸馏的模仿天花板，使学生能通过环境交互优化教师知识，甚至超越教师。
analysis.experiments: 在 NGSIM 和 highD 数据集上验证，实现 6.2 倍参数压缩和 3.7 倍推理加速，同时保持 SOTA 精度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集和场景，泛化性需进一步验证。
强化学习训练可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MAVEN-T 通过教师-学生框架与强化学习，实现轨迹预测的 6.2 倍参数压缩和 3.7 倍推理加速，同时保持 SOTA 精度。

papers.title: Visual Late Chunking: An Empirical Study of Contextual Chunking for Efficient Visual Document Retrieval
papers.abstract: Multi-vector models dominate Visual Document Retrieval (VDR) due to their fine-grained matching capabilities, but their high storage and computational costs present a major barrier to practical deployment. In this paper, we propose ColChunk, a plug-and-play framework that introduces multimodal late chunking to construct efficient, contextualized multi-vectors. Unlike existing pruning or fixed-token approaches, ColChunk employs hierarchical clustering on patch-level embeddings, fused with a 2D position prior to ensure spatial-semantic coherence. This adaptive grouping allows for a content-aware representation that preserves global context while drastically reducing the vector count. Evaluations across 24 VDR datasets demonstrate ColChunk achieves over a 90% reduction in storage requirements while simultaneously delivering a 9-point average improvement in nDCG@5 across representative single-vector models. ColChunk provides a practical solution for balancing retrieval accuracy and efficiency in visual document systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出ColChunk框架，通过多模态late chunking将多向量模型压缩90%存储，同时提升检索精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 多向量模型在视觉文档检索中精度高，但存储和计算成本过高，阻碍实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲检索精度的前提下，大幅降低多向量模型的存储和计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ColChunk框架：对patch级嵌入进行层次聚类，融合2D位置先验，构建语义连贯的上下文感知多向量表示。
contributions: 提出ColChunk，一种即插即用的多模态late chunking框架，实现高效上下文多向量构建。
在24个VDR数据集上验证，存储减少90%以上，nDCG@5平均提升9个点。
analysis.experiments: 在24个VDR数据集上评估，对比单向量模型，存储减少90%以上，nDCG@5平均提升9个点。
limitations: 可能对极端长文档或复杂布局的泛化性有限。
层次聚类的计算开销在超大规模场景下可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ColChunk框架，通过多模态late chunking将多向量模型压缩90%存储，同时提升检索精度。

papers.title: Virtual Smart Metering in District Heating Networks via Heterogeneous Spatial-Temporal Graph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Intelligent operation of thermal energy networks aims to improve energy efficiency, reliability, and operational flexibility through data-driven control, predictive optimization, and early fault detection. Achieving these goals relies on sufficient observability, requiring continuous and well-distributed monitoring of thermal and hydraulic states. However, district heating systems are typically sparsely instrumented and frequently affected by sensor faults, limiting monitoring. Virtual sensing offers a cost-effective means to enhance observability, yet its development and validation remain limited in practice. Existing data-driven methods generally assume dense synchronized data, while analytical models rely on simplified hydraulic and thermal assumptions that may not adequately capture the behavior of heterogeneous network topologies. Consequently, modeling the coupled nonlinear dependencies between pressure, flow, and temperature under realistic operating conditions remains challenging. In addition, the lack of publicly available benchmark datasets hinders systematic comparison of virtual sensing approaches. To address these challenges, we propose a heterogeneous spatial-temporal graph neural network (HSTGNN) for constructing virtual smart heat meters. The model incorporates the functional relationships inherent in district heating networks and employs dedicated branches to learn graph structures and temporal dynamics for flow, temperature, and pressure measurements, thereby enabling the joint modeling of cross-variable and spatial correlations. To support further research, we introduce a controlled laboratory dataset collected at the Aalborg Smart Water Infrastructure Laboratory, providing synchronized high-resolution measurements representative of real operating conditions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach significantly outperforms existing baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出异构时空图神经网络用于区域供热网络虚拟智能计量，显著优于现有基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 区域供热网络通常仪器稀疏且传感器故障频发，导致监测不足；现有数据驱动方法依赖密集同步数据，分析模型依赖简化假设，难以捕捉异构网络拓扑的耦合非线性依赖，且缺乏公开基准数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何在区域供热网络中利用稀疏传感器数据，准确虚拟测量压力、流量和温度等热力与水力状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出异构时空图神经网络（HSTGNN），包含专用分支学习流量、温度和压力测量的图结构和时间动态，联合建模跨变量和空间相关性。
contributions: 提出HSTGNN模型，利用供热网络功能关系实现虚拟智能计量。
引入Aalborg智能水基础设施实验室的受控实验室数据集，提供同步高分辨率测量。
analysis.experiments: 在自建实验室数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 仅在实验室数据集上验证，未在真实大规模网络测试。
未讨论模型对传感器故障的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异构时空图神经网络用于区域供热网络虚拟智能计量，显著优于现有基线。

papers.title: Inductive Reasoning for Temporal Knowledge Graphs with Emerging Entities
papers.abstract: Reasoning on Temporal Knowledge Graphs (TKGs) is essential for predicting future events and time-aware facts. While existing methods are effective at capturing relational dynamics, their performance is limited by a closed-world assumption, which fails to account for emerging entities not present in the training. Notably, these entities continuously join the network without historical interactions. Empirical study reveals that emerging entities are widespread in TKGs, comprising roughly 25\% of all entities. The absence of historical interactions of these entities leads to significant performance degradation in reasoning tasks. Whereas, we observe that entities with semantic similarities often exhibit comparable interaction histories, suggesting the presence of transferable temporal patterns. Inspired by this insight, we propose TransFIR (Transferable Inductive Reasoning), a novel framework that leverages historical interaction sequences from semantically similar known entities to support inductive reasoning. Specifically, we propose a codebook-based classifier that categorizes emerging entities into latent semantic clusters, allowing them to adopt reasoning patterns from similar entities. Experimental results demonstrate that TransFIR outperforms all baselines in reasoning on emerging entities, achieving an average improvement of 28.6% in Mean Reciprocal Rank (MRR) across multiple datasets. The implementations are available at https://github.com/zhaodazhuang2333/TransFIR.

analysis.tldr: 提出 TransFIR 框架，利用语义相似实体的历史交互模式对时态知识图谱中的新兴实体进行归纳推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 TKG 推理方法基于封闭世界假设，无法处理训练中未出现的新兴实体，而这些实体在 TKG 中占比约 25%，导致推理性能显著下降。
analysis.problem: 如何对时态知识图谱中缺乏历史交互的新兴实体进行有效的归纳推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 新兴实体在 TKG 中普遍存在（约 25%），且由于缺乏历史交互导致推理性能下降；但语义相似的实体往往具有可比较的交互历史，表明存在可迁移的时态模式。
analysis.method: 提出 TransFIR 框架，包含一个基于码本的分类器，将新兴实体归类到潜在语义簇中，使其能够采用相似已知实体的推理模式。
contributions: 揭示了时态知识图谱中新兴实体的普遍性及其导致的性能退化问题。
提出了 TransFIR 框架，利用语义相似实体的历史交互序列实现归纳推理。
在多个数据集上平均 MRR 提升 28.6%，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，TransFIR 在推理新兴实体任务中平均 MRR 提升 28.6%，优于所有基线。
limitations: 依赖语义相似性假设，可能不适用于语义差异极大的新兴实体。
码本分类器的聚类质量可能影响迁移效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 TransFIR 框架，利用语义相似实体的历史交互模式对时态知识图谱中的新兴实体进行归纳推理。

papers.title: SpecMoE: A Fast and Efficient Mixture-of-Experts Inference via Self-Assisted Speculative Decoding
papers.abstract: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture has emerged as a promising approach to mitigate the rising computational costs of large language models (LLMs) by selectively activating parameters. However, its high memory requirements and sub-optimal parameter efficiency pose significant challenges for efficient deployment. Although CPU-offloaded MoE inference systems have been proposed in the literature, they offer limited efficiency, particularly for large batch sizes. In this work, we propose SpecMoE, a memory-efficient MoE inference system based on our self-assisted speculative decoding algorithm. SpecMoE demonstrates the effectiveness of applying speculative decoding to MoE inference without requiring additional model training or fine-tuning. Our system improves inference throughput by up to $4.30\times$, while significantly reducing bandwidth requirements of both memory and interconnect on memory-constrained systems.

analysis.tldr: SpecMoE 通过自辅助推测解码实现 MoE 模型的高效内存推理，无需额外训练。
analysis.research_motivation: MoE 架构虽能降低 LLM 计算成本，但高内存需求和次优参数效率导致部署困难，现有 CPU 卸载系统在大批量下效率有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练开销的前提下，提升 MoE 模型在内存受限系统中的推理吞吐量和参数效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SpecMoE 系统，基于自辅助推测解码算法，无需额外训练或微调即可加速 MoE 推理。
contributions: 提出 SpecMoE，首个将推测解码应用于 MoE 推理且无需额外训练的系统。
在内存受限系统上实现高达 4.30 倍的推理吞吐量提升，并显著降低内存和互连带宽需求。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定 MoE 架构或硬件配置。
推测解码的加速效果可能受任务类型和批量大小影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpecMoE 通过自辅助推测解码实现 MoE 模型的高效内存推理，无需额外训练。

papers.title: Learning from Emptiness: De-biasing Listwise Rerankers with Content-Agnostic Probability Calibration
papers.abstract: Generative listwise reranking leverages global context for superior retrieval but is plagued by intrinsic position bias, where models exhibit structural sensitivity to input order independent of relevance. Existing mitigations present a dilemma: inference-time aggregation incurs prohibitive latency, while training-based methods often fail to eradicate ingrained priors, particularly in compact models. To resolve this dilemma, we propose CapCal (Content-Agnostic Probability Calibration), a training-free framework that mechanically decouples positional bias from ranking decisions. By estimating the bias distribution via content-free placeholders, CapCal rectifies output logits through an entropy-adaptive contrastive mechanism. Evaluations across 10 benchmarks confirm that CapCal achieves superior performance among training-free methods while preserving single-pass efficiency. Notably, it unlocks the latent potential of lightweight models (e.g., 0.6B), delivering absolute NDCG gains exceeding 10 points and outperforming both permutation-based aggregation and data-augmentation baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出CapCal，一种无需训练的内容无关概率校准方法，通过解耦位置偏差来提升列表式重排序器的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式列表式重排序器存在固有的位置偏差，现有方法要么推理延迟高，要么训练方法无法彻底消除偏差，尤其是小模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加推理延迟的前提下，有效消除列表式重排序器中的位置偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型对输入顺序存在结构敏感性，与相关性无关；训练方法难以根除先验偏差，紧凑模型中尤为明显。
analysis.method: CapCal：通过内容无关占位符估计偏差分布，再利用熵自适应对比机制修正输出logits，无需训练。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的位置偏差校准框架CapCal，通过内容无关占位符估计偏差分布。
引入熵自适应对比机制，在保持单次推理效率的同时显著提升重排序性能，尤其对小模型（0.6B）提升超过10个NDCG点。
analysis.experiments: 在10个基准上评估，CapCal在无需训练的方法中取得最优性能，且保持单次推理效率；轻量模型（0.6B）NDCG绝对提升超过10点，优于排列聚合和数据增强基线。
limitations: 方法依赖于内容无关占位符的构造，可能对特定任务或领域敏感。
未讨论在更大模型或不同架构上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CapCal，一种无需训练的内容无关概率校准方法，通过解耦位置偏差来提升列表式重排序器的性能。

papers.title: A Temporally Augmented Graph Attention Network for Affordance Classification
papers.abstract: Graph attention networks (GATs) provide one of the best frameworks for learning node representations in relational data; but, existing variants such as Graph Attention Network (GAT) mainly operate on static graphs and rely on implicit temporal aggregation when applied to sequential data. In this paper, we introduce Electroencephalography-temporal Graph Attention Network (EEG-tGAT), a temporally augmented formulation of GATv2 that is tailored for affordance classification from interaction sequences. The proposed model incorporates temporal attention to modulate the contribution of different time segments and temporal dropout to regularize learning across temporally correlated observations. The design reflects the assumption that temporal dimensions in affordance data are not semantically uniform and that discriminative information may be unevenly distributed across time. Experimental results on affordance datasets show that EEG-tGAT achieves improved classification performance compared to GATv2. The observed gains helps to conclude that explicitly encoding temporal importance and enforcing temporal robustness introduce inductive biases that are much better aligned with the structure of affordance-driven interaction data. These findings show us that modest architectural changes to graph attention models can help one obtain consistent benefits when temporal relationships play a nontrivial role in the task.

analysis.tldr: 提出EEG-tGAT，通过时间注意力和时间dropout增强GATv2，用于交互序列的affordance分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图注意力网络主要处理静态图，对序列数据中的时间关系处理不足，而affordance分类任务中时间维度信息分布不均匀，需要显式建模时间重要性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计图注意力网络以有效利用交互序列中的时间信息进行affordance分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出affordance数据中的时间维度在语义上不均匀，判别信息可能随时间分布不均。
analysis.method: 在GATv2基础上引入时间注意力机制（调整不同时间段的贡献）和时间dropout（正则化时间相关观测），形成EEG-tGAT。
contributions: 提出EEG-tGAT，一种时间增强的图注意力网络，用于affordance分类。
引入时间注意力和时间dropout，显式编码时间重要性和增强时间鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在affordance数据集上，EEG-tGAT相比GATv2取得了改进的分类性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定affordance数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
时间dropout和注意力机制的超参数敏感性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EEG-tGAT，通过时间注意力和时间dropout增强GATv2，用于交互序列的affordance分类。

papers.title: MOSAIC: Multi-Domain Orthogonal Session Adaptive Intent Capture for Prescient Recommendations
papers.abstract: Capturing user intent across heterogeneous behavioral domains stands as a fundamental challenge in session-based recommender systems. Yet, existing multi-domain approaches frequently fail to isolate the distinct contribution of cross-domain interactions from those arising within individual domains, limiting their ability to build rich and transferable user representations. In this work, we propose MOSAIC, a Multi-Domain Orthogonal Session Adaptive Intent Capture framework that explicitly factorizes user preferences into three orthogonal components: domain-specific, domain-common, and cross-sequence-exclusive representations. Our approach employs a triple-encoder architecture, where each encoder is dedicated to one preference type, enforced through domain masking objectives and adversarial training via a gradient reversal layer. Representational alignment and mutual independence constraints are jointly optimized to ensure clean preference separation. Additionally, a dynamic gating mechanism modulates the relative contribution of each component at every timestep, yielding a unified and temporally adaptive session-level user representation. We conduct extensive experiments on two large-scale real-world benchmarks spanning multiple domains and interaction types. The ablation study validates that each component domain-specific encoding, domain-common modeling, cross-sequence representation, and dynamic gating contributes meaningfully to the overall performance. Experimental results demonstrate that MOSAIC consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in recommendation accuracy, while simultaneously providing interpretable insights into the interplay between domain-specific and cross-domain preference signals. These findings highlight the potential of orthogonal preference decomposition as a principled strategy for next-generation multi-domain recommender systems.

analysis.tldr: MOSAIC通过正交偏好分解和动态门控机制，在多领域会话推荐中实现用户意图的精准捕捉与跨域迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有跨域推荐方法难以区分跨域交互与域内交互的独立贡献，导致用户表征的迁移性和丰富性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何显式分解用户偏好为域特有、域共有和跨序列独占三种正交成分，并动态融合以提升多领域会话推荐的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MOSAIC框架，采用三编码器架构分别建模三种偏好成分，通过域掩码目标和梯度反转层的对抗训练实现正交分解，并利用动态门控机制逐时间步融合各成分。
contributions: 提出正交偏好分解策略，将用户偏好显式分解为域特有、域共有和跨序列独占三种成分。
设计三编码器架构与联合优化目标，通过域掩码和对抗训练确保表征正交性。
引入动态门控机制实现时间自适应的统一会话表征。
analysis.experiments: 在两个大规模真实世界多领域基准数据集上进行了实验，消融研究验证了各组件贡献，MOSAIC在推荐准确率上持续优于最先进基线。
limitations: 可能依赖领域数量与类型，扩展性需进一步验证。
动态门控机制的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MOSAIC通过正交偏好分解和动态门控机制，在多领域会话推荐中实现用户意图的精准捕捉与跨域迁移。

papers.title: Think in Sentences: Explicit Sentence Boundaries Enhance Language Model's Capabilities
papers.abstract: Researchers have explored different ways to improve large language models (LLMs)' capabilities via dummy token insertion in contexts. However, existing works focus solely on the dummy tokens themselves, but fail to leverage the inherent sentence-level structure of natural language. This is a critical oversight, as LLMs acquire linguistic capabilities through exposure to human-generated texts, which are inherently structured at the sentence level. Motivated by this gap, we propose an approach that inserts delimiters at sentence boundaries in LLM inputs, which not only integrates dummy tokens into the context, but also facilitates LLMs with sentence-by-sentence processing behavior during reasoning. Two concrete methods: (1). In-context learning and (2). Supervised fine-tuning are experimented using 7B models to 600B Deepseek-V3. Our results demonstrate consistent improvements across various tasks, with notable gains of up to 7.7\% on GSM8k and 12.5\% on DROP. Furthermore, the fine-tuned LLMs can incorporate sentence awareness evidenced by their internal representations. Our work establishes a simple yet effective technique for enhancing LLM's capabilities, offering promising directions for cognitive-inspired LLM enhancement paradigm.

analysis.tldr: 通过在输入中插入句子边界分隔符，引导LLM逐句推理，显著提升推理和阅读理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究仅关注插入虚拟标记本身，忽略了自然语言固有的句子级结构，而LLM的语言能力正是从这种结构中习得的。
analysis.problem: 如何利用句子边界信息增强LLM的推理和语言理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在LLM输入中插入句子边界分隔符（如句号、换行符），通过上下文学习和监督微调两种方式，引导模型逐句处理信息。
contributions: 提出一种利用句子边界分隔符增强LLM能力的简单有效方法。
在7B到600B规模的模型上验证了该方法在多个任务上的显著提升，最高在GSM8k上提升7.7%，在DROP上提升12.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在7B到600B规模的模型上，使用上下文学习和监督微调两种方法，在GSM8k和DROP等任务上评估，观察到一致改进。
limitations: 方法可能对长文本或复杂推理任务的效果有限。
未讨论不同分隔符选择的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过在输入中插入句子边界分隔符，引导LLM逐句推理，显著提升推理和阅读理解能力。

papers.title: Semantic Manipulation Localization
papers.abstract: Image Manipulation Localization (IML) aims to identify edited regions in an image. However, with the increasing use of modern image editing and generative models, many manipulations no longer exhibit obvious low-level artifacts. Instead, they often involve subtle but meaning-altering edits to an object's attributes, state, or relationships while remaining highly consistent with the surrounding content. This makes conventional IML methods less effective because they mainly rely on artifact detection rather than semantic sensitivity. To address this issue, we introduce Semantic Manipulation Localization (SML), a new task that focuses on localizing subtle semantic edits that significantly change image interpretation. We further construct a dedicated fine-grained benchmark for SML using a semantics-driven manipulation pipeline with pixel-level annotations. Based on this task, we propose TRACE (Targeted Reasoning of Attributed Cognitive Edits), an end-to-end framework that models semantic sensitivity through three progressively coupled components: semantic anchoring, semantic perturbation sensing, and semantic-constrained reasoning. Specifically, TRACE first identifies semantically meaningful regions that support image understanding, then injects perturbation-sensitive frequency cues to capture subtle edits under strong visual consistency, and finally verifies candidate regions through joint reasoning over semantic content and semantic scope. Extensive experiments show that TRACE consistently outperforms existing IML methods on our benchmark and produces more complete, compact, and semantically coherent localization results. These results demonstrate the necessity of moving beyond artifact-based localization and provide a new direction for image forensics in complex semantic editing scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义篡改定位新任务及TRACE框架，通过语义感知推理定位细微语义编辑区域。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像篡改定位方法依赖低级伪影检测，无法应对现代编辑和生成模型产生的语义一致但意义改变的细微编辑。
analysis.problem: 定位图像中改变语义解释的细微语义编辑区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现代图像编辑产生的篡改往往缺乏低级伪影，但改变了对象的属性、状态或关系，与周围内容高度一致，使传统方法失效。
analysis.method: 提出TRACE框架，包含语义锚定、语义扰动感知和语义约束推理三个逐步耦合的组件，通过识别语义区域、注入频率线索和联合推理来定位语义编辑。
contributions: 定义语义篡改定位（SML）新任务，并构建专用细粒度基准数据集。
提出TRACE端到端框架，通过语义感知推理实现语义编辑定位。
实验表明TRACE优于现有IML方法，产生更完整、紧凑且语义一致的定位结果。
analysis.experiments: 在自建基准上对比多种现有IML方法，TRACE在各项指标上均表现更优。
limitations: 基准数据集规模可能有限，需更多样化场景验证。
方法可能对极端语义编辑或对抗性攻击的鲁棒性有待进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义篡改定位新任务及TRACE框架，通过语义感知推理定位细微语义编辑区域。

papers.title: Improving Deep Learning-Based Target Volume Auto-Delineation for Adaptive MR-Guided Radiotherapy in Head and Neck Cancer: Impact of a Volume-Aware Dice Loss
papers.abstract: Background: Manual delineation of target volumes in head and neck cancer (HNC) remains a significant bottleneck in radiotherapy planning, characterized by high inter-observer variability and time consumption. This study evaluates the integration of a Volume-Aware (VA) Dice loss function into a self-configuring deep learning framework to enhance the auto-segmentation of primary tumors (PT) and metastatic lymph nodes (LN) for adaptive MR-guided radiotherapy. We investigate how volume-sensitive weighting affects the detection of small, anatomically complex nodal metastases compared to conventional loss functions. Methods: Utilizing the HNTS-MRG 2024 dataset, we implemented an nnU-Net ResEnc M architecture. We conducted a multi-label segmentation task, comparing a standard Dice loss baseline against two Volume-Aware configurations: a "Dual Mask" setup (VA loss on both PT and LN) and a "Selective LN Mask" setup (VA loss on LN only). Evaluation metrics included volumetric Dice scores, surface-based metrics (SDS, MSD, HD95), and lesion-wise binary detection sensitivity and precision. Results: The Selective LN Mask configuration achieved the highest LN Volumetric Dice Score (0.758 vs. 0.734 baseline) and significantly improved LN Lesion-Wise Detection Sensitivity (84.93% vs. 81.80%). However, a critical trade-off was observed; PT detection precision declined significantly in the selective setup (63.65% vs. 81.27%). The Dual Mask configuration provided the most balanced performance across both targets, maintaining primary tumor precision at 82.04% while improving LN sensitivity to 83.46%. Conclusions: A volume-sensitive loss function mitigated the under-representation of small metastatic lesions in HNC. While selective weighting yielded the best nodal detection, a dual-mask approach is required in multi-label tasks to maintain segmentation accuracy for larger primary tumor volumes.

analysis.tldr: 提出Volume-Aware Dice损失函数，提升头颈癌MR引导放疗中小体积淋巴结的自动分割灵敏度，但需注意多标签任务中主肿瘤精度的权衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 头颈癌放疗中靶区手动勾画耗时且观察者间差异大，尤其是小体积转移淋巴结易被漏检，现有深度学习分割方法对小目标不敏感。
analysis.problem: 如何设计损失函数以提升小体积、解剖结构复杂的转移淋巴结的自动分割灵敏度，同时保持主肿瘤的分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准Dice损失对小体积淋巴结欠分割；选择性加权（仅对淋巴结使用VA损失）虽提升淋巴结灵敏度但导致主肿瘤检测精度显著下降；双掩码加权（对两者均使用VA损失）可平衡性能。
analysis.method: 在nnU-Net ResEnc M框架中引入Volume-Aware Dice损失，通过体积敏感权重调整损失贡献，并对比两种配置：双掩码（PT和LN均加权）和选择性LN掩码（仅LN加权）。
contributions: 提出Volume-Aware Dice损失函数，有效缓解小体积转移淋巴结在分割中的欠表征问题。
系统评估了不同加权策略在多标签分割任务中的性能权衡，发现双掩码配置能平衡主肿瘤和淋巴结的分割精度。
analysis.experiments: 使用HNTS-MRG 2024数据集，对比标准Dice损失与两种VA配置，评估指标包括体积Dice、表面距离（SDS、MSD、HD95）及病灶级检测灵敏度和精度。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集（HNTS-MRG 2024），泛化性需进一步验证。
未探讨其他体积感知损失函数（如Focal Tversky）的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Volume-Aware Dice损失函数，提升头颈癌MR引导放疗中小体积淋巴结的自动分割灵敏度，但需注意多标签任务中主肿瘤精度的权衡。

papers.title: VGA-Bench: A Unified Benchmark and Multi-Model Framework for Video Aesthetics and Generation Quality Evaluation
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of AIGC-based video generation has underscored the critical need for comprehensive evaluation frameworks that go beyond traditional generation quality metrics to encompass aesthetic appeal. However, existing benchmarks remain largely focused on technical fidelity, leaving a significant gap in holistic assessment-particularly with respect to perceptual and artistic qualities. To address this limitation, we introduce VGA-Bench, a unified benchmark for joint evaluation of video generation quality and aesthetic quality. VGA-Bench is built upon a principled three-tier taxonomy: Aesthetic Quality, Aesthetic Tagging, and Generation Quality, each decomposed into multiple fine-grained sub-dimensions to enable systematic assessment. Guided by this taxonomy, we design 1,016 diverse prompts and generate a large-scale dataset of over 60,000 videos using 12 video generation models, ensuring broad coverage across content, style, and artifacts. To enable scalable and automated evaluation, we annotate a subset of the dataset via human labeling and develop three dedicated multi-task neural assessors: VAQA-Net for aesthetic quality prediction, VTag-Net for automatic aesthetic tagging, and VGQA-Net for generation and basic quality attributes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our models achieve reliable alignment with human judgments, offering both accuracy and efficiency. We release VGA-Bench as a public benchmark to foster research in AIGC evaluation, with applications in content moderation, model debugging, and generative model optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出VGA-Bench统一基准，联合评估视频生成质量与美学质量，包含多任务评估器。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成评估基准主要关注技术保真度，缺乏对感知和艺术质量的全面评估，亟需一个兼顾美学与生成质量的统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个系统性的基准，同时评估视频生成的技术质量和美学吸引力，并实现自动化、可扩展的评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建三级分类体系（美学质量、美学标签、生成质量），设计1016个提示词，使用12个生成模型生成6万+视频，通过人工标注子集训练三个多任务神经评估器（VAQA-Net、VTag-Net、VGQA-Net）。
contributions: 提出VGA-Bench统一基准，覆盖美学与生成质量的多维度评估。
构建大规模视频数据集（6万+视频，12个模型生成）。
开发三个专用多任务评估器，实现与人类判断可靠对齐的自动化评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及评估器与人类判断可靠对齐。
limitations: 评估器可能依赖特定数据集分布，泛化性需进一步验证。
人工标注子集规模有限，可能影响评估器性能上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VGA-Bench统一基准，联合评估视频生成质量与美学质量，包含多任务评估器。

papers.title: MR-Coupler: Automated Metamorphic Test Generation via Functional Coupling Analysis
papers.abstract: Metamorphic testing (MT) is a widely recognized technique for alleviating the oracle problem in software testing. However, its adoption is hindered by the difficulty of constructing effective metamorphic relations (MRs), which often require domain-specific or hard-to-obtain knowledge. In this work, we propose a novel approach that leverages the functional coupling between methods, which is readily available in source code, to automatically construct MRs and generate metamorphic test cases (MTCs). Our technique, MR-Coupler, identifies functionally coupled method pairs, employs large language models to generate candidate MTCs, and validates them through test amplification and mutation analysis. In particular, we leverage three functional coupling features to avoid expensive enumeration of possible method pairs, and a novel validation mechanism to reduce false alarms. Our evaluation of MR-Coupler on 100 human-written MTCs and 50 real-world bugs shows that it generates valid MTCs for over 90% of tasks, improves valid MTC generation by 64.90%, and reduces false alarms by 36.56% compared to baselines. Furthermore, the MTCs generated by MR-Coupler detect 44% of the real bugs. Our results highlight the effectiveness of leveraging functional coupling for automated MR construction and the potential of MR-Coupler to facilitate the adoption of MT in practice. We also released the tool and experimental data to support future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出MR-Coupler，利用方法间功能耦合自动生成蜕变测试用例，显著提升有效性并降低误报。
analysis.research_motivation: 蜕变测试（MT）能缓解测试预言问题，但构建有效蜕变关系（MR）需要领域知识，阻碍了其广泛应用。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从源代码中构建有效的蜕变关系并生成蜕变测试用例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 方法间的功能耦合特征可有效指导MR构建，避免穷举方法对；通过测试增强和变异分析可验证候选MTC并减少误报。
analysis.method: 识别功能耦合的方法对，利用大语言模型生成候选MTC，再通过测试增强和变异分析进行验证。
contributions: 提出基于功能耦合的自动MR构建方法，无需领域知识。
设计验证机制减少误报，在100个人工MTC和50个真实bug上评估，有效MTC生成提升64.90%，误报降低36.56%。
analysis.experiments: 在100个人工编写的MTC和50个真实世界bug上评估，生成有效MTC超过90%的任务，检测出44%的真实bug。
limitations: 可能依赖源代码中功能耦合的准确识别。
大语言模型生成候选MTC的质量可能受限于模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MR-Coupler，利用方法间功能耦合自动生成蜕变测试用例，显著提升有效性并降低误报。

papers.title: PhyMix: Towards Physically Consistent Single-Image 3D Indoor Scene Generation with Implicit--Explicit Optimization
papers.abstract: Existing single-image 3D indoor scene generators often produce results that look visually plausible but fail to obey real-world physics, limiting their reliability in robotics, embodied AI, and design. To examine this gap, we introduce a unified Physics Evaluator that measures four main aspects: geometric priors, contact, stability, and deployability, which are further decomposed into nine sub-constraints, establishing the first benchmark to measure physical consistency. Based on this evaluator, our analysis shows that state-of-the-art methods remain largely physics-unaware. To overcome this limitation, we further propose a framework that integrates feedback from the Physics Evaluator into both training and inference, enhancing the physical plausibility of generated scenes. Specifically, we propose PhyMix, which is composed of two complementary components: (i) implicit alignment via Scene-GRPO, a critic-free group-relative policy optimization that leverages the Physics Evaluator as a preference signal and biases sampling towards physically feasible layouts, and (ii) explicit refinement via a plug-and-play Test-Time Optimizer (TTO) that uses differentiable evaluator signals to correct residual violations during generation. Overall, our method unifies evaluation, reward shaping, and inference-time correction, producing 3D indoor scenes that are visually faithful and physically plausible. Extensive synthetic evaluations confirm state-of-the-art performance in both visual fidelity and physical plausibility, and extensive qualitative examples in stylized and real-world images further showcase the robustness of the method. We will release codes and models upon publication.

analysis.tldr: 提出PhyMix框架，通过隐式对齐和显式优化提升单图3D室内场景生成的物理一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单图3D室内场景生成器视觉上合理但物理上不真实，限制了在机器人、具身AI和设计中的可靠性。
analysis.problem: 如何生成物理上一致的3D室内场景，使其同时满足视觉保真度和物理约束（几何先验、接触、稳定性、可部署性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过Physics Evaluator分析发现，现有方法大多缺乏物理感知，生成的场景违反物理规律。
analysis.method: PhyMix包含两个互补组件：隐式对齐（Scene-GRPO，利用Physics Evaluator作为偏好信号进行无评论家组相对策略优化）和显式优化（测试时优化器TTO，使用可微评估器信号纠正生成过程中的残留违规）。
contributions: 提出统一的Physics Evaluator，从几何先验、接触、稳定性和可部署性四个维度衡量物理一致性，并建立首个基准。
提出PhyMix框架，结合隐式对齐（Scene-GRPO）和显式优化（TTO），在训练和推理中集成物理反馈。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据上评估，视觉保真度和物理一致性均达到SOTA；在风格化和真实图像上的定性示例展示了鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖Physics Evaluator的准确性，若评估器有偏差则生成结果可能受限。
测试时优化可能增加推理时间，影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PhyMix框架，通过隐式对齐和显式优化提升单图3D室内场景生成的物理一致性。

papers.title: AITP: Traffic Accident Responsibility Allocation via Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in Traffic Accident Detection (TAD) and Traffic Accident Understanding (TAU). However, existing studies mainly focus on describing and interpreting accident videos, leaving room for deeper causal reasoning and integration of legal knowledge. Traffic Accident Responsibility Allocation (TARA) is a more challenging task that requires multi-step reasoning grounded in traffic regulations. To address this, we introduce AITP (Artificial Intelligence Traffic Police), a multimodal large language model for responsibility reasoning and allocation. AITP enhances reasoning via a Multimodal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT) mechanism and integrates legal knowledge through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). We further present DecaTARA, a decathlon-style benchmark unifying ten interrelated traffic accident reasoning tasks with 67,941 annotated videos and 195,821 question-answer pairs. Extensive experiments show that AITP achieves state-of-the-art performance across responsibility allocation, TAD, and TAU tasks, establishing a new paradigm for reasoning-driven multimodal traffic analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出AITP多模态大模型，结合MCoT和RAG进行交通事故责任分配，并构建DecaTARA基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在交通事故检测和理解上取得进展，但缺乏深层因果推理和法律知识整合，无法完成责任分配这一更具挑战的任务。
analysis.problem: 如何让多模态大模型基于交通法规进行多步推理，实现交通事故责任分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AITP模型，采用多模态思维链（MCoT）增强推理，并通过检索增强生成（RAG）整合法律知识。
contributions: 提出AITP，首个用于交通事故责任分配的多模态大模型。
构建DecaTARA基准，包含10个相关任务、6.8万视频和19.6万问答对。
analysis.experiments: 在责任分配、TAD和TAU任务上达到SOTA，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的法律知识库。
MCoT推理在复杂场景下可能不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AITP多模态大模型，结合MCoT和RAG进行交通事故责任分配，并构建DecaTARA基准。

papers.title: A Dual Cross-Attention Graph Learning Framework For Multimodal MRI-Based Major Depressive Disorder Detection
papers.abstract: Major depressive disorder (MDD) is a prevalent mental disorder associated with complex neurobiological changes that cannot be fully captured using a single imaging modality. The use of multimodal magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) provides a more comprehensive understanding of brain changes by combining structural and functional data. Despite this, the effective integration of these modalities remains challenging. In this study, we propose a dual cross-attention-based multimodal fusion framework that explicitly models bidirectional interactions between structural MRI (sMRI) and resting-state functional MRI (rs-fMRI) representations. The proposed approach is tested on the large-scale REST-meta-MDD dataset using both structural and functional brain atlas configurations. Numerous experiments conducted under a 10-fold stratified cross-validation demonstrated that the proposed fusion algorithm achieves robust and competitive performance across all atlas types. The proposed method consistently outperforms conventional feature-level concatenation for functional atlases, while maintaining comparable performance for structural atlases. The most effective dual cross-attention multimodal model obtained 84.71% accuracy, 86.42% sensitivity, 82.89% specificity, 84.34% precision, and 85.37% F1-score. These findings emphasize the importance of explicitly modeling cross-modal interactions for multimodal neuroimaging-based MDD classification.

analysis.tldr: 提出双交叉注意力图学习框架，融合sMRI和rs-fMRI检测抑郁症，在REST-meta-MDD数据集上达到84.71%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 单模态MRI无法全面捕捉抑郁症的复杂神经生物学变化，多模态MRI虽能提供更全面的信息，但有效融合结构性和功能性数据仍具挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合结构MRI和静息态功能MRI两种模态，以提升抑郁症检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双交叉注意力多模态融合框架，显式建模sMRI和rs-fMRI表征之间的双向交互，结合图学习进行抑郁症分类。
contributions: 提出一种基于双交叉注意力的多模态融合框架，用于抑郁症检测。
在大型REST-meta-MDD数据集上验证了方法有效性，优于传统特征级联方法。
analysis.experiments: 在REST-meta-MDD数据集上进行10折分层交叉验证，使用多种脑图谱配置，最高准确率84.71%，敏感性86.42%，特异性82.89%，精确率84.34%，F1分数85.37%。
limitations: 仅基于REST-meta-MDD数据集，泛化性需在其他数据集验证。
未探讨不同脑图谱选择对结果的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双交叉注意力图学习框架，融合sMRI和rs-fMRI检测抑郁症，在REST-meta-MDD数据集上达到84.71%准确率。

papers.title: CircuitSynth: Reliable Synthetic Data Generation
papers.abstract: The generation of high-fidelity synthetic data is a cornerstone of modern machine learning, yet Large Language Models (LLMs) frequently suffer from hallucinations, logical inconsistencies, and mode collapse when tasked with structured generation. Existing approaches, such as prompting or retrieval-augmented generation, lack the mechanisms to balance linguistic expressivity with formal guarantees regarding validity and coverage. To address this, we propose CircuitSynth, a novel neuro-symbolic framework that decouples semantic reasoning from surface realization. By distilling the reasoning capabilities of a Teacher LLM into a Probabilistic Sentential Decision Diagram (PSDD), CircuitSynth creates a tractable semantic prior that structurally enforces hard logical constraints. Furthermore, we introduce a convex optimization mechanism to rigorously satisfy soft distributional goals. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that CircuitSynth achieves 100% Schema Validity even in complex logic puzzles where unconstrained baselines fail (12.4%) while significantly outperforming state-of-the-art methods in rare-combination coverage.

analysis.tldr: CircuitSynth 通过神经符号框架解耦语义推理与表面实现，实现高保真合成数据生成。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 在结构化生成任务中常出现幻觉、逻辑不一致和模式崩溃，现有方法缺乏平衡语言表达性与形式保证的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既符合硬逻辑约束又满足软分布目标的高保真合成数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CircuitSynth 神经符号框架，将教师 LLM 的推理能力蒸馏为概率化句子决策图（PSDD）作为语义先验，并引入凸优化机制满足软分布目标。
contributions: 提出解耦语义推理与表面实现的神经符号框架 CircuitSynth。
引入 PSDD 和凸优化机制，同时保证硬逻辑约束和软分布目标。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，CircuitSynth 在复杂逻辑谜题中实现 100% 模式有效性（基线仅 12.4%），并在罕见组合覆盖上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖教师 LLM 的质量和 PSDD 的构建复杂度。
凸优化机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CircuitSynth 通过神经符号框架解耦语义推理与表面实现，实现高保真合成数据生成。

papers.title: Dual-Branch Remote Sensing Infrared Image Super-Resolution
