papers.abstract: Remote sensing infrared image super-resolution aims to recover sharper thermal observations from low-resolution inputs while preserving target contours, scene layout, and radiometric stability. Unlike visible-image super-resolution, thermal imagery is weakly textured and more sensitive to unstable local sharpening, which makes complementary local and global modeling especially important. This paper presents our solution to the NTIRE 2026 Infrared Image Super-Resolution Challenge, a dual-branch system that combines a HAT-L branch and a MambaIRv2-L branch. The inference pipeline applies test-time local conversion on HAT, eight-way self-ensemble on MambaIRv2, and fixed equal-weight image-space fusion. We report both the official challenge score and a reproducible evaluation on 12 synthetic times-four thermal samples derived from Caltech Aerial RGB-Thermal, on which the fused output outperforms either single branch in PSNR, SSIM, and the overall Score. The results suggest that infrared super-resolution benefits from explicit complementarity between locally strong transformer restoration and globally stable state-space modeling.

analysis.tldr: 提出双分支遥感红外超分系统，融合HAT-L和MambaIRv2-L，在NTIRE 2026挑战中取得领先。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外图像弱纹理且对局部锐化敏感，现有可见光超分方法难以直接适用，需要兼顾局部细节与全局稳定性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计红外图像超分方法，在恢复清晰热观测的同时保持目标轮廓、场景布局和辐射稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 红外图像弱纹理且对局部锐化敏感，单一模型难以同时满足局部恢复和全局稳定。
analysis.method: 双分支系统：HAT-L分支（局部强Transformer恢复）和MambaIRv2-L分支（全局稳定状态空间建模），测试时对HAT进行局部转换、对MambaIRv2进行八向自集成，最后等权图像空间融合。
contributions: 提出双分支红外超分框架，显式利用局部与全局互补性。
在NTIRE 2026挑战和Caltech Aerial RGB-Thermal数据集上验证了融合策略的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NTIRE 2026红外超分挑战赛和12个合成4倍热样本（来自Caltech Aerial RGB-Thermal）上评估，融合输出在PSNR、SSIM和总体Score上优于单分支。
limitations: 仅测试了4倍下采样场景，其他倍率未验证。
融合权重固定为等权，可能非最优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双分支遥感红外超分系统，融合HAT-L和MambaIRv2-L，在NTIRE 2026挑战中取得领先。

papers.title: Trust Your Memory: Verifiable Control of Smart Homes through Reinforcement Learning with Multi-dimensional Rewards
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become a key foundation for enabling personalized smart home experiences. While existing studies have explored how smart home assistants understand user queries to control devices in real time, their ability to perform memory-driven device control remains challenging from both evaluation and methodological perspectives. In terms of evaluation, existing benchmarks either focus on immediate device control or general open-domain memory retrieval tasks, and therefore cannot effectively evaluate a model's ability to perform memory-driven device control. Methodologically, while memory-driven device control can be approached using Reinforcement Learning, conventional RL methods generally rely on outcome-based supervision (i.e., whether the final task is achieved). This lack of intermediate feedback can lead to sub-optimal performance or local failures in fine-grained memory management tasks (adding, updating, deleting, and utilizing). To address these issues, we first release MemHomeLife, built from anonymized real-world long-term user interaction logs. To enable more fine-grained evaluation of different memory-related subtasks, we further construct MemHome, the first benchmark designed to systematically evaluate memory-driven device control in smart home scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出多维度奖励强化学习方法，结合新基准MemHome，提升智能家居中基于记忆的设备控制能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能家居助手主要关注实时设备控制，缺乏对记忆驱动设备控制的有效评估和方法，导致细粒度记忆管理任务（添加、更新、删除、利用）性能不佳。
analysis.problem: 如何通过强化学习实现智能家居中基于记忆的设备控制，并解决缺乏中间反馈导致的次优性能问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统强化学习依赖结果监督，缺乏中间反馈，导致在细粒度记忆管理任务中表现次优或局部失败。
analysis.method: 提出多维度奖励强化学习方法，结合新基准MemHomeLife和MemHome，实现更细粒度的记忆驱动设备控制。
contributions: 发布基于真实用户长期交互日志的MemHomeLife数据集。
构建首个系统评估记忆驱动设备控制的基准MemHome。
提出多维度奖励强化学习方法，提升记忆管理任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定智能家居场景，泛化性需验证。
多维度奖励设计可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多维度奖励强化学习方法，结合新基准MemHome，提升智能家居中基于记忆的设备控制能力。

papers.title: VGGT-HPE: Reframing Head Pose Estimation as Relative Pose Prediction
papers.abstract: Monocular head pose estimation is traditionally formulated as direct regression from a single image to an absolute pose. This paradigm forces the network to implicitly internalize a dataset-specific canonical reference frame. In this work, we argue that predicting the relative rigid transformation between two observed head configurations is a fundamentally easier and more robust formulation. We introduce VGGT-HPE, a relative head pose estimator built upon a general-purpose geometry foundation model. Finetuned exclusively on synthetic facial renderings, our method sidesteps the need for an implicit anchor by reducing the problem to estimating a geometric displacement from an explicitly provided anchor with a known pose. As a practical benefit, the relative formulation also allows the anchor to be chosen at test time - for instance, a near-neutral frame or a temporally adjacent one - so that the prediction difficulty can be controlled by the application. Despite zero real-world training data, VGGT-HPE achieves state-of-the-art results on the BIWI benchmark, outperforming established absolute regression methods trained on mixed and real datasets. Through controlled easy- and hard-pair benchmarks, we also systematically validate our core hypothesis: relative prediction is intrinsically more accurate than absolute regression, with the advantage scaling alongside the difficulty of the target pose. Project page and code: https://vasilikivas.github.io/VGGT-HPE

analysis.tldr: 将头部姿态估计重新定义为相对姿态预测，仅用合成数据微调几何基础模型，在BIWI基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统单目头部姿态估计将绝对姿态回归作为直接回归任务，迫使网络隐式内化数据集特定的规范参考系，导致泛化性差且依赖大量真实标注数据。
analysis.problem: 解决传统绝对姿态回归方法需要隐式学习参考系、依赖真实数据且精度受限的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相对预测本质上比绝对回归更准确，且优势随目标姿态难度增加而扩大。
analysis.method: 提出VGGT-HPE，基于通用几何基础模型，通过微调合成面部渲染数据，将头部姿态估计转化为从显式提供的锚点（已知姿态）到目标姿态的相对刚性变换预测。
contributions: 提出将头部姿态估计重新定义为相对姿态预测，避免隐式参考系学习。
仅用合成数据微调几何基础模型，在BIWI基准上超越使用混合真实数据训练的绝对回归方法。
通过易/难对基准系统验证了相对预测比绝对回归更准确，且优势随难度增加。
analysis.experiments: 在BIWI基准上达到SOTA，并通过控制实验验证了相对预测的优势。
limitations: 仅评估了BIWI一个基准，泛化性需更多验证。
依赖合成数据，真实场景中可能存在域差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将头部姿态估计重新定义为相对姿态预测，仅用合成数据微调几何基础模型，在BIWI基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Long-Horizon Streaming Video Generation via Hybrid Attention with Decoupled Distillation
papers.abstract: Streaming video generation (SVG) distills a pretrained bidirectional video diffusion model into an autoregressive model equipped with sliding window attention (SWA). However, SWA inevitably loses distant history during long video generation, and its computational overhead remains a critical challenge to real-time deployment. In this work, we propose Hybrid Forcing, which jointly optimizes temporal information retention and computational efficiency through a hybrid attention design. First, we introduce lightweight linear temporal attention to preserve long-range dependencies beyond the sliding window. In particular, we maintain a compact key-value state to incrementally absorb evicted tokens, retaining temporal context with negligible memory and computational overhead. Second, we incorporate block-sparse attention into the local sliding window to reduce redundant computation within short-range modeling, reallocating computational capacity toward more critical dependencies. Finally, we introduce a decoupled distillation strategy tailored to the hybrid attention design. A few-step initial distillation is performed under dense attention, then the distillation of our proposed linear temporal and block-sparse attention is activated for streaming modeling, ensuring stable optimization. Extensive experiments on both short- and long-form video generation benchmarks demonstrate that Hybrid Forcing consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. Notably, our model achieves real-time, unbounded 832x480 video generation at 29.5 FPS on a single NVIDIA H100 GPU without quantization or model compression. The source code and trained models are available at https://github.com/leeruibin/hybrid-forcing.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合注意力机制与解耦蒸馏策略，实现实时、无界的长视频流生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 流式视频生成中滑动窗口注意力丢失长程历史信息且计算开销大，难以实时部署。
analysis.problem: 在长视频流生成中同时保持时间信息保留和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 滑动窗口注意力在长视频生成中不可避免地丢失远距离历史信息，且计算开销成为实时部署的关键挑战。
analysis.method: 提出Hybrid Forcing，包含轻量线性时间注意力保持长程依赖、块稀疏注意力减少局部冗余计算，以及针对混合注意力设计的解耦蒸馏策略。
contributions: 提出混合注意力机制，结合线性时间注意力和块稀疏注意力，兼顾长程依赖与计算效率。
设计解耦蒸馏策略，先密集注意力蒸馏再激活混合注意力蒸馏，确保稳定优化。
实现实时、无界的832x480视频生成，在单张H100上达到29.5 FPS。
analysis.experiments: 在短时和长时视频生成基准上均达到SOTA性能，并实现实时无界视频生成。
limitations: 可能对极长视频的依赖关系建模仍有局限。
解耦蒸馏策略的通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合注意力机制与解耦蒸馏策略，实现实时、无界的长视频流生成。

papers.title: Degradation-Consistent Paired Training for Robust AI-Generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: AI-generated image detectors suffer significant performance degradation under real-world image corruptions such as JPEG compression, Gaussian blur, and resolution downsampling. We observe that state-of-the-art methods, including B-Free, treat degradation robustness as a byproduct of data augmentation rather than an explicit training objective. In this work, we propose Degradation-Consistent Paired Training (DCPT), a simple yet effective training strategy that explicitly enforces robustness through paired consistency constraints. For each training image, we construct a clean view and a degraded view, then impose two constraints: a feature consistency loss that minimizes the cosine distance between clean and degraded representations, and a prediction consistency loss based on symmetric KL divergence that aligns output distributions across views. DCPT adds zero additional parameters and zero inference overhead. Experiments on the Synthbuster benchmark (9 generators, 8 degradation conditions) demonstrate that DCPT improves the degraded-condition average accuracy by 9.1 percentage points compared to an identical baseline without paired training, while sacrificing only 0.9% clean accuracy. The improvement is most pronounced under JPEG compression (+15.7% to +17.9%). Ablation further reveals that adding architectural components leads to overfitting on limited training data, confirming that training objective improvement is more effective than architectural augmentation for degradation robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出退化一致性配对训练（DCPT），通过配对约束显著提升AI生成图像检测器在真实退化下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器在JPEG压缩、高斯模糊等真实退化下性能严重下降，而SOTA方法将退化鲁棒性视为数据增强的副产品，缺乏显式训练目标。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加参数和推理开销的前提下，显式提升AI生成图像检测器对多种图像退化的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到SOTA方法（如B-Free）将退化鲁棒性视为数据增强的副产品而非显式训练目标；消融实验表明添加架构组件会导致过拟合，说明训练目标改进比架构增强更有效。
analysis.method: 提出退化一致性配对训练（DCPT），对每张训练图像构建干净视图和退化视图，施加特征一致性损失（余弦距离）和预测一致性损失（对称KL散度），零额外参数和推理开销。
contributions: 提出DCPT训练策略，通过配对一致性约束显式增强退化鲁棒性，无需额外参数或推理成本。
在Synthbuster基准上（9个生成器、8种退化条件）验证，退化条件下平均准确率提升9.1个百分点，JPEG压缩下提升15.7%-17.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在Synthbuster基准上使用9个生成器和8种退化条件进行实验，与无配对训练的基线对比，报告了退化条件平均准确率提升9.1个百分点、干净准确率仅下降0.9%的结果，并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 仅针对图像退化鲁棒性，未考虑其他类型攻击（如对抗性扰动）。
训练依赖配对数据构建，可能对数据预处理流程有额外要求。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出退化一致性配对训练（DCPT），通过配对约束显著提升AI生成图像检测器在真实退化下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: ABot-Claw: A Foundation for Persistent, Cooperative, and Self-Evolving Robotic Agents
papers.abstract: Current embodied intelligent systems still face a substantial gap between high-level reasoning and low-level physical execution in open-world environments. Although Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models provide strong perception and intuitive responses, their open-loop nature limits long-horizon performance. Agents incorporating System 2 cognitive mechanisms improve planning, but usually operate in closed sandboxes with predefined toolkits and limited real-system control. OpenClaw provides a localized runtime with full system privileges, but lacks the embodied control architecture required for long-duration, multi-robot execution. We therefore propose ABot-Claw, an embodied extension of OpenClaw that integrates: 1) a unified embodiment interface with capability-driven scheduling for heterogeneous robot coordination; 2) a visual-centric cross-embodiment multimodal memory for persistent context retention and grounded retrieval; and 3) a critic-based closed-loop feedback mechanism with a generalist reward model for online progress evaluation, local correction, and replanning. With a decoupled architecture spanning the OpenClaw layer, shared service layer, and robot embodiment layer, ABot-Claw enables real-world interaction, closes the loop from natural language intent to physical action, and supports progressively self-evolving robotic agents in open, dynamic environments.

analysis.tldr: ABot-Claw 通过统一接口、跨具身记忆和闭环反馈，实现持久、协作且自我进化的机器人代理。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前具身智能系统在开放世界中存在高层推理与底层执行之间的鸿沟，现有 VLA 模型开环执行限制长期性能，而集成 System 2 的代理通常局限于封闭沙盒，缺乏对真实系统的长期多机器人控制。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够持久运行、支持异构机器人协作、具备闭环反馈和自我进化能力的具身代理架构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ABot-Claw 是 OpenClaw 的具身扩展，包含三个核心组件：1) 统一具身接口与能力驱动调度，用于异构机器人协调；2) 视觉为中心的跨具身多模态记忆，用于持久上下文保持和检索；3) 基于评论家的闭环反馈机制与通用奖励模型，实现在线进度评估、局部修正和重新规划。架构分为 OpenClaw 层、共享服务层和机器人具身层。
contributions: 提出 ABot-Claw 架构，将 OpenClaw 扩展为支持持久、协作和自我进化的具身代理系统。
设计统一具身接口、跨具身多模态记忆和闭环反馈机制，实现从自然语言意图到物理动作的闭环。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 OpenClaw 平台，泛化性需验证。
闭环反馈机制在复杂动态环境中的实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ABot-Claw 通过统一接口、跨具身记忆和闭环反馈，实现持久、协作且自我进化的机器人代理。

papers.title: Mining Attribute Subspaces for Efficient Fine-tuning of 3D Foundation Models
papers.abstract: With the emergence of 3D foundation models, there is growing interest in fine-tuning them for downstream tasks, where LoRA is the dominant fine-tuning paradigm. As 3D datasets exhibit distinct variations in texture, geometry, camera motion, and lighting, there are interesting fundamental questions: 1) Are there LoRA subspaces associated with each type of variation? 2) Are these subspaces disentangled (i.e., orthogonal to each other)? 3) How do we compute them effectively? This paper provides answers to all these questions. We introduce a robust approach that generates synthetic datasets with controlled variations, fine-tunes a LoRA adapter on each dataset, and extracts a LoRA sub-space associated with each type of variation. We show that these subspaces are approximately disentangled. Integrating them leads to a reduced LoRA subspace that enables efficient LoRA fine-tuning with improved prediction accuracy for downstream tasks. In particular, we show that such a reduced LoRA subspace, despite being derived entirely from synthetic data, generalizes to real datasets. An ablation study validates the effectiveness of the choices in our approach.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从合成数据中提取属性子空间的方法，实现3D基础模型的高效LoRA微调。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D数据集在纹理、几何、相机运动和光照等方面存在显著差异，现有LoRA微调范式未考虑这些属性变化对应的子空间及其解耦性，导致微调效率低、泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何有效计算与3D数据属性变化（纹理、几何、运动、光照）对应的LoRA子空间，并验证其解耦性，以提升下游任务微调的效率和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过合成数据生成的受控变化，发现不同属性对应的LoRA子空间近似解耦（正交），且整合后的子空间能泛化到真实数据集。
analysis.method: 1) 生成具有受控属性变化的合成数据集；2) 对每个数据集微调一个LoRA适配器；3) 提取每个属性对应的LoRA子空间；4) 整合这些子空间得到约简的LoRA子空间，用于高效微调。
contributions: 首次提出并验证了3D基础模型LoRA微调中存在与属性变化相关的解耦子空间。
提出一种从合成数据中提取属性子空间的鲁棒方法，并证明其泛化到真实数据的能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及消融研究验证了方法选择的有效性。
limitations: 子空间解耦性仅近似成立，可能不完全正交。
方法依赖合成数据生成，合成数据与真实数据分布差异可能影响泛化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种从合成数据中提取属性子空间的方法，实现3D基础模型的高效LoRA微调。

papers.title: Global monitoring of methane point sources using deep learning on hyperspectral radiance measurements from EMIT
papers.abstract: Anthropogenic methane (CH4) point sources drive near-term climate forcing, safety hazards, and system inefficiencies. Space-based imaging spectroscopy is emerging as a tool for identifying emissions globally, but existing approaches largely rely on manual plume identification. Here we present the Methane Analysis and Plume Localization with EMIT (MAPL-EMIT) model, an end-to-end vision transformer framework that leverages the complete radiance spectrum from the Earth Surface Mineral Dust Source Investigation (EMIT) instrument to jointly retrieve methane enhancements across all pixels within a scene. This approach brings together spectral and spatial context to significantly lower detection limits. MAPL-EMIT simultaneously supports enhancement quantification, plume delineation, and source localization, even for multiple overlapping plumes. The model was trained on 3.6 million physics-based synthetic plumes injected into global EMIT radiance data. Synthetic evaluation confirms the model's ability to identify plumes with high recall and precision and to capture weaker plumes relative to existing matched-filter approaches. On real-world benchmarks, MAPL-EMIT captures 79% of known hand-annotated NASA L2B plume complexes across a test set of 1084 EMIT granules, while capturing twice as many plausible plumes than identified by human analysts. Further validation against coincident airborne data, top-emitting landfills, and controlled release experiments confirms the model's ability to identify previously uncaptured sources. By incorporating model-generated metrics such as spectral fit scores and estimated noise levels, the framework can further limit false-positive rates. Overall, MAPL-EMIT enables high-throughput implementation on the full EMIT catalog, shifting methane monitoring from labor-intensive workflows to a rapid, scalable paradigm for global plume mapping at the facility scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAPL-EMIT模型，利用EMIT高光谱辐射数据端到端检测甲烷点源，实现高召回率和精确定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 人为甲烷点源驱动短期气候强迫、安全隐患和系统低效，现有空间成像光谱方法依赖人工羽流识别，效率低且难以规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何从EMIT高光谱辐射数据中自动、准确地检测和定位甲烷点源，包括弱羽流和重叠羽流。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 端到端视觉Transformer框架，利用完整辐射光谱联合检索场景内所有像素的甲烷增强，同时支持增强量化、羽流描绘和源定位。
contributions: 提出MAPL-EMIT模型，首个端到端深度学习框架用于EMIT数据甲烷点源检测。
在合成和真实基准上验证，检测率优于现有匹配滤波方法和人工分析。
analysis.experiments: 在1084个EMIT数据块上测试，捕获79%已知NASA L2B羽流复合体，并识别出两倍于人工分析的合理羽流；通过机载数据、垃圾填埋场和受控释放实验进一步验证。
limitations: 依赖合成数据训练，可能无法完全覆盖真实场景多样性。
假阳性率仍需通过模型生成指标进一步控制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAPL-EMIT模型，利用EMIT高光谱辐射数据端到端检测甲烷点源，实现高召回率和精确定位。

papers.title: Ontological Trajectory Forecasting via Finite Semigroup Iteration and Lie Algebra Approximation in Geopolitical Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: We present EL-DRUIN, an ontological reasoning system for geopolitical intelligence analysis that combines formal ontology, finite semigroup algebra, and Lie algebra approximation to forecast long-run relationship trajectories. Current LLM-based political analysis systems operate as summarisation engines, producing outputs bounded by textual pattern matching. EL-DRUIN departs from this paradigm by modelling geopolitical relationships as states in a finite set of named Dynamic Patterns, composing patterns via a semigroup operation whose structure constants are defined by an explicit composition table, and embedding each pattern as a vector in an 8-dimensional semantic Lie algebra space. Forward simulation iterates this semigroup operation, yielding reachable pattern sets at each discrete timestep; convergence to idempotent absorbing states (fixed points of the composition) constitutes the predicted long-run attractor. Bayesian posterior weights combine ontology-derived confidence priors with a Lie similarity term measuring the cosine similarity between the vector sum of composing patterns and the target pattern vector, providing interpretable, calibrated probabilities that are not self-reported by a language model. Bifurcation points -- steps at which two candidate attractors have near-equal posterior mass -- are detected and exposed to downstream analysis. We demonstrate the framework on six geopolitical scenarios including US-China technology decoupling and the Taiwan Strait military coercion trajectory. The architecture is publicly available as an open-source system with a Streamlit frontend exposing full computation traces, Bayesian posterior breakdowns, and 8D ontological state vectors.

analysis.tldr: 提出EL-DRUIN，结合有限半群迭代与李代数近似，在地缘政治知识图谱中进行本体论轨迹预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的政治分析系统仅作为摘要引擎，受限于文本模式匹配，无法进行形式化的关系轨迹预测。
analysis.problem: 如何对地缘政治关系进行形式化建模并预测其长期演化轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将地缘政治关系建模为有限动态模式集合中的状态，通过半群运算组合模式，并将每个模式嵌入8维语义李代数空间；通过前向模拟半群迭代得到可达模式集，收敛到幂等吸收态作为长期吸引子；贝叶斯后验权重结合本体论先验与李相似度项，提供可解释的概率。
contributions: 提出EL-DRUIN，一种结合形式本体论、有限半群代数和李代数逼近的地缘政治推理系统。
在六个地缘政治场景上展示框架，包括美中技术脱钩和台海军事胁迫轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在六个地缘政治场景上进行了演示，包括美中技术脱钩和台海军事胁迫轨迹。摘要未提供定量实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖人工定义的模式和组合表，扩展性受限。
仅在地缘政治领域验证，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EL-DRUIN，结合有限半群迭代与李代数近似，在地缘政治知识图谱中进行本体论轨迹预测。

papers.title: Particle Diffusion Matching: Random Walk Correspondence Search for the Alignment of Standard and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images
papers.abstract: We propose a robust alignment technique for Standard Fundus Images (SFIs) and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images (UWFIs), which are challenging to align due to differences in scale, appearance, and the scarcity of distinctive features. Our method, termed Particle Diffusion Matching (PDM), performs alignment through an iterative Random Walk Correspondence Search (RWCS) guided by a diffusion model. At each iteration, the model estimates displacement vectors for particle points by considering local appearance, the structural distribution of particles, and an estimated global transformation, enabling progressive refinement of correspondences even under difficult conditions. PDM achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple retinal image alignment benchmarks, showing substantial improvement on a primary dataset of SFI-UWFI pairs and demonstrating its effectiveness in real-world clinical scenarios. By providing accurate and scalable correspondence estimation, PDM overcomes the limitations of existing methods and facilitates the integration of complementary retinal image modalities. This diffusion-guided search strategy offers a new direction for improving downstream supervised learning, disease diagnosis, and multi-modal image analysis in ophthalmology.

analysis.tldr: 提出粒子扩散匹配（PDM）方法，通过扩散引导的随机游走对应搜索实现标准与超广角眼底图像的鲁棒对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准眼底图像（SFI）与超广角眼底图像（UWFI）因尺度、外观差异大且显著特征稀疏，现有对齐方法效果不佳，阻碍了多模态眼底图像在临床诊断中的融合应用。
analysis.problem: 解决SFI与UWFI之间因尺度、外观差异及特征稀缺导致的图像对齐困难问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出粒子扩散匹配（PDM），通过迭代随机游走对应搜索（RWCS）结合扩散模型，利用局部外观、粒子结构分布和全局变换估计逐步精化对应关系。
contributions: 提出一种扩散引导的随机游走对应搜索策略，实现SFI与UWFI的鲁棒对齐。
在多个视网膜图像对齐基准上达到最先进性能，并在真实临床场景中验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个视网膜图像对齐基准上评估，主要数据集为SFI-UWFI对，结果显示显著改进，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的预训练质量。
迭代过程可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粒子扩散匹配（PDM）方法，通过扩散引导的随机游走对应搜索实现标准与超广角眼底图像的鲁棒对齐。

papers.title: Active Diffusion Matching: Score-based Iterative Alignment of Cross-Modal Retinal Images
papers.abstract: Objective: The study aims to address the challenge of aligning Standard Fundus Images (SFIs) and Ultra-Widefield Fundus Images (UWFIs), which is difficult due to their substantial differences in viewing range and the amorphous appearance of the retina. Currently, no specialized method exists for this task, and existing image alignment techniques lack accuracy. Methods: We propose Active Diffusion Matching (ADM), a novel cross-modal alignment method. ADM integrates two interdependent score-based diffusion models to jointly estimate global transformations and local deformations via an iterative Langevin Markov chain. This approach facilitates a stochastic, progressive search for optimal alignment. Additionally, custom sampling strategies are introduced to enhance the adaptability of ADM to given input image pairs. Results: Comparative experimental evaluations demonstrate that ADM achieves state-of-the-art alignment accuracy. This was validated on two datasets: a private dataset of SFI-UWFI pairs and a public dataset of SFI-SFI pairs, with mAUC improvements of 5.2 and 0.4 points on the private and public datasets, respectively, compared to existing state-of-the-art methods. Conclusion: ADM effectively bridges the gap in aligning SFIs and UWFIs, providing an innovative solution to a previously unaddressed challenge. The method's ability to jointly optimize global and local alignment makes it highly effective for cross-modal image alignment tasks. Significance: ADM has the potential to transform the integrated analysis of SFIs and UWFIs, enabling better clinical utility and supporting learning-based image enhancements. This advancement could significantly improve diagnostic accuracy and patient outcomes in ophthalmology.

analysis.tldr: 提出Active Diffusion Matching (ADM)，利用两个相互依赖的基于分数的扩散模型通过迭代Langevin马尔可夫链联合优化全局变换和局部变形，实现标准眼底图像与超广角眼底图像的跨模态对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准眼底图像（SFI）和超广角眼底图像（UWFI）在视野范围和视网膜外观上存在显著差异，导致对齐困难，且目前缺乏专门方法，现有图像对齐技术精度不足。
analysis.problem: 解决SFI和UWFI之间的跨模态图像对齐问题，需要同时处理全局变换和局部变形。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Active Diffusion Matching (ADM)，集成两个相互依赖的基于分数的扩散模型，通过迭代Langevin马尔可夫链联合估计全局变换和局部变形，实现随机渐进式最优对齐搜索，并引入自定义采样策略增强适应性。
contributions: 首次提出针对SFI和UWFI跨模态对齐的专门方法ADM。
ADM通过联合优化全局和局部对齐，在私有和公共数据集上达到最先进的对齐精度。
analysis.experiments: 在私有SFI-UWFI数据集和公共SFI-SFI数据集上评估，与现有最先进方法相比，mAUC分别提升5.2和0.4个点。
limitations: 可能依赖特定图像对的质量和分布。
计算成本可能较高，因为涉及迭代扩散过程。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Active Diffusion Matching (ADM)，利用两个相互依赖的基于分数的扩散模型通过迭代Langevin马尔可夫链联合优化全局变换和局部变形，实现标准眼底图像与超广角眼底图像的跨模态对齐。

papers.title: MatRes: Zero-Shot Test-Time Model Adaptation for Simultaneous Matching and Restoration
papers.abstract: Real-world image pairs often exhibit both severe degradations and large viewpoint changes, making image restoration and geometric matching mutually interfering tasks when treated independently. In this work, we propose MatRes, a zero-shot test-time adaptation framework that jointly improves restoration quality and correspondence estimation using only a single low-quality and high-quality image pair. By enforcing conditional similarity at corresponding locations, MatRes updates only lightweight modules while keeping all pretrained components frozen, requiring no offline training or additional supervision. Extensive experiments across diverse combinations show that MatRes yields significant gains in both restoration and geometric alignment compared to using either restoration or matching models alone. MatRes offers a practical and widely applicable solution for real-world scenarios where users commonly capture multiple images of a scene with varying viewpoints and quality, effectively addressing the often-overlooked mutual interference between matching and restoration.

analysis.tldr: 提出零样本测试时自适应框架MatRes，同时提升图像恢复与几何匹配性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实图像对常同时存在严重退化与视角变化，独立处理恢复与匹配会相互干扰，现有方法未有效解决这一互扰问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖离线训练或额外监督的条件下，同时提升低质量图像对的恢复质量与几何对应估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出图像恢复与几何匹配在独立处理时相互干扰，但未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 零样本测试时自适应框架，通过强制对应位置的条件相似性，仅更新轻量模块，保持预训练组件冻结。
contributions: 提出MatRes框架，首次在零样本测试时同时优化恢复与匹配。
仅需一对低质量与高质量图像，无需离线训练或额外监督。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量参考图像的质量。
轻量模块的更新策略可能对极端退化不鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出零样本测试时自适应框架MatRes，同时提升图像恢复与几何匹配性能。

papers.title: Attention-Guided Dual-Stream Learning for Group Engagement Recognition: Fusing Transformer-Encoded Motion Dynamics with Scene Context via Adaptive Gating
papers.abstract: Student engagement is crucial for improving learning outcomes in group activities. Highly engaged students perform better both individually and contribute to overall group success. However, most existing automated engagement recognition methods are designed for online classrooms or estimate engagement at the individual level. Addressing this gap, we propose DualEngage, a novel two-stream framework for group-level engagement recognition from in-classroom videos. It models engagement as a joint function of both individual and group-level behaviors. The primary stream models person-level motion dynamics by detecting and tracking students, extracting dense optical flow with the Recurrent All-Pairs Field Transforms network, encoding temporal motion patterns using a transformer encoder, and finally aggregating per-student representations through attention pooling into a unified representation. The secondary stream captures scene-level spatiotemporal information from the full video clip, leveraging a pretrained three-dimensional Residual Network. The two-stream representations are combined via softmax-gated fusion, which dynamically weights each stream's contribution based on the joint context of both features. DualEngage learns a joint representation of individual actions with overarching group dynamics. We evaluate the proposed approach using fivefold cross-validation on the Classroom Group Engagement Dataset developed by Ocean University of China, achieving an average classification accuracy of 0.9621+/-0.0161 with a macro-averaged F1 of 0.9530+/-0.0204. To understand the contribution of each branch, we further conduct an ablation study comparing single-stream variants against the two-stream model. This work is among the first in classroom engagement recognition to adopt a dual-stream design that explicitly leverages motion cues as an estimator.

analysis.tldr: 提出双流框架DualEngage，融合个体运动动态与场景上下文，实现课堂小组参与度识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动参与度识别方法多针对在线课堂或个体层面，缺乏对小组活动中群体参与度的有效建模。
analysis.problem: 从课堂视频中识别小组层面的参与度，需同时建模个体行为和群体动态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双流框架：主流通过检测跟踪学生、提取光流、Transformer编码个体运动动态，经注意力池化聚合；辅流用3D ResNet提取场景时空特征；通过softmax门控融合动态加权两流。
contributions: 首次在课堂参与度识别中采用显式利用运动线索的双流设计。
提出软门控融合机制动态平衡个体与场景信息。
在中国海洋大学课堂小组参与度数据集上达到96.21%准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在中国海洋大学课堂小组参与度数据集上进行五折交叉验证，平均准确率0.9621±0.0161，宏平均F1为0.9530±0.0204；并进行了消融实验。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
依赖光流计算，可能增加推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双流框架DualEngage，融合个体运动动态与场景上下文，实现课堂小组参与度识别。

papers.title: DocRevive: A Unified Pipeline for Document Text Restoration
papers.abstract: In Document Understanding, the challenge of reconstructing damaged, occluded, or incomplete text remains a critical yet unexplored problem. Subsequent document understanding tasks can benefit from a document reconstruction process. In response, this paper presents a novel unified pipeline combining state-of-the-art Optical Character Recognition (OCR), advanced image analysis, masked language modeling, and diffusion-based models to restore and reconstruct text while preserving visual integrity. We create a synthetic dataset of 30{,}078 degraded document images that simulates diverse document degradation scenarios, setting a benchmark for restoration tasks. Our pipeline detects and recognizes text, identifies degradation with an occlusion detector, and uses an inpainting model for semantically coherent reconstruction. A diffusion-based module seamlessly reintegrates text, matching font, size, and alignment. To evaluate restoration quality, we propose a Unified Context Similarity Metric (UCSM), incorporating edit, semantic, and length similarities with a contextual predictability measure that penalizes deviations when the correct text is contextually obvious. Our work advances document restoration, benefiting archival research and digital preservation while setting a new standard for text reconstruction. The OPRB dataset and code are available at \href{https://huggingface.co/datasets/kpurkayastha/OPRB}{Hugging Face} and \href{https://github.com/kunalpurkayastha/DocRevive}{Github} respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一流水线DocRevive，结合OCR、图像分析、掩码语言建模和扩散模型，用于文档文本恢复，并创建合成数据集OPRB和新评估指标UCSM。
analysis.research_motivation: 文档理解中，受损、遮挡或不完整文本的恢复是一个关键但未充分探索的问题，后续文档理解任务可受益于重建过程。
analysis.problem: 如何统一地检测、识别并语义连贯地重建受损文档图像中的文本，同时保持视觉完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DocRevive流水线：先使用OCR和图像分析检测并识别文本，通过遮挡检测器识别退化区域，然后利用掩码语言模型和扩散模型进行语义连贯的修复和文本重建，匹配字体、大小和对齐。
contributions: 提出统一的文档文本恢复流水线DocRevive，结合OCR、图像分析、掩码语言建模和扩散模型。
创建包含30,078张退化文档图像的合成数据集OPRB，模拟多种退化场景，作为恢复任务基准。
提出统一上下文相似度度量（UCSM），结合编辑、语义和长度相似性以及上下文可预测性惩罚。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成数据集可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的退化多样性。
流水线依赖多个模块的级联，可能引入累积误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一流水线DocRevive，结合OCR、图像分析、掩码语言建模和扩散模型，用于文档文本恢复，并创建合成数据集OPRB和新评估指标UCSM。

papers.title: Learning Hierarchical and Geometry-Aware Graph Representations for Text-to-CAD
papers.abstract: Text-to-CAD code generation is a long-horizon task that translates textual instructions into long sequences of interdependent operations. Existing methods typically decode text directly into executable code (e.g., bpy) without explicitly modeling assembly hierarchy or geometric constraints, which enlarges the search space, accumulates local errors, and often causes cascading failures in complex assemblies. To address this issue, we propose a hierarchical and geometry-aware graph as an intermediate representation. The graph models multi-level parts and components as nodes and encodes explicit geometric constraints as edges. Instead of mapping text directly to code, our framework first predicts structure and constraints, then conditions action sequencing and code generation, thereby improving geometric fidelity and constraint satisfaction. We further introduce a structure-aware progressive curriculum learning strategy that constructs graded tasks through controlled structural edits, explores the model's capability boundary, and synthesizes boundary examples for iterative training. In addition, we build a 12K dataset with instructions, decomposition graphs, action sequences, and bpy code, together with graph- and constraint-oriented evaluation metrics. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently outperforms existing approaches in both geometric fidelity and accurate satisfaction of geometric constraints.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，提升文本到CAD代码生成的几何保真度和约束满足能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到CAD方法直接解码为代码，缺乏对装配层次和几何约束的显式建模，导致搜索空间大、误差累积，复杂装配中易出现级联失败。
analysis.problem: 文本到CAD代码生成中，如何显式建模层次结构和几何约束以提升生成质量和约束满足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接文本到代码的映射在复杂装配中因缺乏结构信息导致级联失败。
analysis.method: 提出层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，先预测结构和约束，再生成动作序列和代码；并引入结构感知渐进课程学习策略。
contributions: 提出层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，显式建模部件层次和几何约束。
设计结构感知渐进课程学习策略，通过可控结构编辑构建分级任务并合成边界样本。
构建12K数据集及图与约束导向的评估指标。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集上实验，方法在几何保真度和约束满足上持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 依赖预定义几何约束类型，可能无法覆盖所有约束。
课程学习策略的编辑规则需人工设计，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次化几何感知图作为中间表示，提升文本到CAD代码生成的几何保真度和约束满足能力。

papers.title: Graph-RHO: Critical-path-aware Heterogeneous Graph Network for Long-Horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling
papers.abstract: Long-horizon Flexible Job-Shop Scheduling~(FJSP) presents a formidable combinatorial challenge due to complex, interdependent decisions spanning extended time horizons. While learning-based Rolling Horizon Optimization~(RHO) has emerged as a promising paradigm to accelerate solving by identifying and fixing invariant operations, its effectiveness is hindered by the structural complexity of FJSP. Existing methods often fail to capture intricate graph-structured dependencies and ignore the asymmetric costs of prediction errors, in which misclassifying critical-path operations is significantly more detrimental than misclassifying non-critical ones. Furthermore, dynamic shifts in predictive confidence during the rolling process make static pruning thresholds inadequate. To address these limitations, we propose Graph-RHO, a novel critical-path-aware graph-based RHO framework. First, we introduce a topology-aware heterogeneous graph network that encodes subproblems as operation-machine graphs with multi-relational edges, leveraging edge-feature-aware message passing to predict operation stability. Second, we incorporate a critical-path-aware mechanism that injects inductive biases during training to distinguish highly sensitive bottleneck operations from robust ones. Third, we devise an adaptive thresholding strategy that dynamically calibrates decision boundaries based on online uncertainty estimation to align model predictions with the solver's search space. Extensive experiments on standard benchmarks demonstrate that \mbox{Graph-RHO} establishes a new state of the art in solution quality and computational efficiency. Remarkably, it exhibits exceptional zero-shot generalization, reducing solve time by over 30\% on large-scale instances (2000 operations) while achieving superior solution quality. Our code is available \href{https://github.com/IntelliSensing/Graph-RHO}{here}.

analysis.tldr: 提出Graph-RHO，一种关键路径感知的异构图网络，用于长时域柔性作业车间调度，显著提升求解质量和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 长时域柔性作业车间调度（FJSP）因决策复杂且时间跨度大而极具挑战性，现有基于滚动时域优化（RHO）的方法难以捕捉图结构依赖，且忽略关键路径与非关键路径上预测误差的不对称代价。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够感知关键路径、自适应调整决策边界的图网络框架，以提升长时域FJSP的求解质量和计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1）现有方法忽略关键路径操作误分类的代价远高于非关键路径；2）滚动过程中预测置信度动态变化，静态剪枝阈值不适用。
analysis.method: 提出Graph-RHO框架，包含三部分：1）拓扑感知异构图网络，将子问题编码为操作-机器图，利用边特征感知消息传递预测操作稳定性；2）关键路径感知机制，在训练中注入归纳偏置以区分瓶颈操作；3）自适应阈值策略，基于在线不确定性估计动态校准决策边界。
contributions: 提出拓扑感知异构图网络，有效编码FJSP子问题的图结构依赖。
引入关键路径感知机制和自适应阈值策略，显著提升求解质量和效率。
在标准基准上达到新SOTA，零样本泛化下大规模实例求解时间减少30%以上。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上进行大量实验，结果显示Graph-RHO在解质量和计算效率上达到新SOTA，且在大规模实例（2000操作）上零样本泛化，求解时间减少超过30%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定图网络设计，泛化到其他调度问题需调整。
自适应阈值策略的计算开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Graph-RHO，一种关键路径感知的异构图网络，用于长时域柔性作业车间调度，显著提升求解质量和效率。

papers.title: Spotlight and Shadow: Attention-Guided Dual-Anchor Introspective Decoding for MLLM Hallucination Mitigation
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable reasoning capabilities yet continue to suffer from hallucination, where generated text contradicts visual content. In this paper, we introduce Dual-Anchor Introspective Decoding (DaID), a novel contrastive decoding framework that dynamically calibrates each token generation by mining the model's internal perceptual discrepancies. Specifically, DaID identifies a Spotlight layer to amplify visual factual signals and a Shadow layer to suppress textual inertia. By leveraging visual attention distributions to guide this dual-anchor selection process, our method ensures precise, token-specific adaptation. Experimental results across multiple benchmarks and MLLMs demonstrate that DaID significantly mitigates hallucination while enhancing general reasoning capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出注意力引导的双锚点内省解码方法，通过挖掘模型内部感知差异来缓解多模态大模型的幻觉问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在生成文本时经常出现与视觉内容不符的幻觉现象，现有方法难以动态校准每个token的生成。
analysis.problem: 如何利用模型内部注意力分布差异，在解码阶段动态抑制幻觉并增强视觉事实信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型不同层对视觉和文本信息的感知存在差异，部分层更关注视觉事实（Spotlight），部分层更受文本惯性影响（Shadow）。
analysis.method: 提出DaID框架，通过视觉注意力分布自动选择Spotlight层（放大视觉信号）和Shadow层（抑制文本惯性），在解码时进行对比式校准。
contributions: 提出注意力引导的双锚点选择机制，无需额外训练即可动态定位事实层和惯性层。
设计对比解码框架，通过层间差异校准每个token的生成概率，同时缓解幻觉并提升推理能力。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准测试和多种MLLM上验证，DaID显著缓解幻觉并增强通用推理能力。
limitations: 依赖模型内部注意力分布的可区分性，可能不适用于注意力分布模糊的模型。
双锚点选择策略可能增加解码计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出注意力引导的双锚点内省解码方法，通过挖掘模型内部感知差异来缓解多模态大模型的幻觉问题。

papers.title: Full Feature Spiking Neural Network Simulation on Micro-Controllers for Neuromorphic Applications at the Edge
papers.abstract: Microcontroller units (MCU), which have an order of magnitude lower Size, Weight and Power (SWaP) than standard computers, makes them suitable for applications at the edge. Neuromorphic computing, which can realize low SWaP, relies on Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs). Until now, software based simulations of SNNs required GPU-based workstations, application classified core processors such as the ARM Cortex-A53, or specialized hardware like Intel's Loihi. In the present work, we demonstrate that the SNN simulator CARLsim can run its full feature set on a MCU RP2350 with 8 MB memory. We accomplished this by utilizing IEEE 16-bit float point numbers, which reduced memory requirements without loss of function. We were able to run the Synfire4 benchmark which comprises 1200 neurons. The accuracy was 97.5% compared to the standard single precision numbers. Furthermore, we show that CARLsim runs a Synfire4 benchmark scaled-down to 186 neurons on a MCU in real-time at only 20 mW. Compared to the smallest application class ARM processor used by Raspberry in their Pi Zero 2 W, our MCU implementation is five times more energy efficient for the SNN itself, and an order of magnitude better when compared to the complete SoC (MCU/CPU + Board).

analysis.tldr: 在微控制器上实现全功能脉冲神经网络模拟，能耗仅为ARM处理器的1/5。
analysis.research_motivation: 微控制器（MCU）具有极低的尺寸、重量和功耗（SWaP），适合边缘应用；但脉冲神经网络（SNN）模拟通常依赖GPU或专用硬件，限制了其在资源受限设备上的部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在低功耗MCU上高效运行全功能SNN模拟，同时保持精度和实时性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用IEEE 16位浮点数（half-precision）减少内存需求，将SNN模拟器CARLsim移植到RP2350 MCU（8MB内存），并运行Synfire4基准测试。
contributions: 首次在MCU上实现全功能SNN模拟器CARLsim，支持完整特征集。
通过16位浮点数在保持97.5%精度的同时降低内存占用，并实现实时运行（20mW）。
与ARM Cortex-A53相比，SNN部分能效提升5倍，完整SoC能效提升一个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在RP2350 MCU上运行Synfire4基准（1200神经元），精度为单精度浮点的97.5%；缩放到186神经元时实时运行功耗仅20mW。
limitations: 仅测试了Synfire4基准，未涉及更复杂的SNN任务。
16位浮点精度可能不适用于所有SNN应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在微控制器上实现全功能脉冲神经网络模拟，能耗仅为ARM处理器的1/5。

papers.title: ASPIRin: Action Space Projection for Interactivity-Optimized Reinforcement Learning in Full-Duplex Speech Language Models
papers.abstract: End-to-end full-duplex Speech Language Models (SLMs) require precise turn-taking for natural interaction. However, optimizing temporal dynamics via standard raw-token reinforcement learning (RL) degrades semantic quality, causing severe generative collapse and repetition. We propose ASPIRin, an interactivity-optimized RL framework that explicitly decouples when to speak from what to say. Using Action Space Projection, ASPIRin maps the text vocabulary into a coarse-grained binary state (active speech vs. inactive silence). By applying Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with rule-based rewards, it balances user interruption and response latency. Empirical evaluations show ASPIRin optimizes interactivity across turn-taking, backchanneling, and pause handling. Crucially, isolating timing from token selection preserves semantic coherence and reduces the portion of duplicate n-grams by over 50% compared to standard GRPO, effectively eliminating degenerative repetition.

analysis.tldr: 提出ASPIRin框架，通过动作空间投影将文本词汇映射为二值状态，解耦语音模型中的说话时机与内容，优化全双工交互性并减少生成重复。
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端全双工语音语言模型需要精确的轮换控制以实现自然交互，但标准原始token强化学习优化时间动态会严重退化语义质量，导致生成崩溃和重复。
analysis.problem: 如何在强化学习框架中解耦语音模型的说话时机（何时说）与内容（说什么），以同时优化交互性并保持语义质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准GRPO优化时序时，语义质量退化，出现严重生成崩溃和重复n-gram。
analysis.method: 提出ASPIRin框架，使用动作空间投影将文本词汇映射为粗粒度二值状态（活跃语音vs静默），并应用基于规则的奖励的GRPO来平衡用户打断和响应延迟。
contributions: 提出ASPIRin，一种交互性优化的RL框架，显式解耦语音模型中的说话时机与内容。
通过动作空间投影和GRPO，在优化轮换、反馈和停顿处理的同时，将重复n-gram比例降低50%以上。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及经验评估显示ASPIRin优化了交互性，且相比标准GRPO减少了超过50%的重复n-gram。
limitations: 可能仅在特定语音模型架构上验证，泛化性未知。
二值动作空间可能限制更细粒度的交互控制。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ASPIRin框架，通过动作空间投影将文本词汇映射为二值状态，解耦语音模型中的说话时机与内容，优化全双工交互性并减少生成重复。

papers.title: On The Application of Linear Attention in Multimodal Transformers
papers.abstract: Multimodal Transformers serve as the backbone for state-of-the-art vision-language models, yet their quadratic attention complexity remains a critical barrier to scalability. In this work, we investigate the viability of Linear Attention (LA) as a high-efficiency alternative within multimodal frameworks. By integrating LA, we reduce the computational overhead from quadratic to linear relative to sequence length while preserving competitive performance. We evaluate our approach across ViT-S/16, ViT-B/16, and ViT-L/16 architectures trained on the LAION-400M dataset, with validation focused on ImageNet-21K zero-shot accuracy. Our systematic evaluation demonstrates that Linear Attention not only yields significant computational savings but also adheres to the same scaling laws as standard softmax attention. These findings position Linear Attention as a robust, scalable solution for next-generation multimodal Transformers tasked with processing increasingly large and complex datasets.

analysis.tldr: 线性注意力机制在多模态Transformer中实现线性复杂度，保持性能并遵循缩放定律。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态Transformer的二次注意力复杂度限制了其可扩展性，需要高效替代方案。
analysis.problem: 解决多模态Transformer中注意力机制计算复杂度高的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 线性注意力在保持竞争性能的同时，遵循与标准softmax注意力相同的缩放定律。
analysis.method: 将线性注意力（Linear Attention）集成到多模态Transformer框架中，替代标准softmax注意力。
contributions: 验证了线性注意力在多模态Transformer中的可行性，实现计算复杂度从二次降至线性。
发现线性注意力遵循与标准注意力相同的缩放定律，表明其可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在ViT-S/16、ViT-B/16、ViT-L/16架构上使用LAION-400M数据集训练，并在ImageNet-21K零样本准确率上验证。
limitations: 摘要未提供与其他高效注意力方法的对比。
仅验证了图像-文本模态，未涉及其他多模态组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 线性注意力机制在多模态Transformer中实现线性复杂度，保持性能并遵循缩放定律。

papers.title: U$^{2}$Flow: Uncertainty-Aware Unsupervised Optical Flow Estimation
papers.abstract: Unsupervised optical flow methods typically lack reliable uncertainty estimation, limiting their robustness and interpretability. We propose U$^{2}$Flow, the first recurrent unsupervised framework that jointly estimates optical flow and per-pixel uncertainty. The core innovation is a decoupled learning strategy that derives uncertainty supervision from augmentation consistency via a Laplace-based maximum likelihood objective, enabling stable training without ground truth. The predicted uncertainty is further integrated into the network to guide adaptive flow refinement and dynamically modulate the regional smoothness loss. Furthermore, we introduce an uncertainty-guided bidirectional flow fusion mechanism that enhances robustness in challenging regions. Extensive experiments on KITTI and Sintel demonstrate that U$^{2}$Flow achieves state-of-the-art performance among unsupervised methods while producing highly reliable uncertainty maps, validating the effectiveness of our joint estimation paradigm. The code is available at https://github.com/sunzunyi/U2FLOW.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个无监督光流与逐像素不确定性联合估计的循环框架，通过解耦学习策略实现稳定训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督光流方法缺乏可靠的不确定性估计，限制了其鲁棒性和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖真实标签的情况下，联合估计光流和逐像素不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出U$^{2}$Flow，采用循环架构，通过解耦学习策略从增强一致性中导出不确定性监督，并利用不确定性指导自适应流精化和区域平滑损失，以及不确定性引导的双向流融合机制。
contributions: 首个无监督光流与不确定性联合估计的循环框架
提出解耦学习策略，利用拉普拉斯最大似然目标从增强一致性中学习不确定性
不确定性用于指导流精化和损失调制，以及双向流融合增强鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI和Sintel数据集上，U$^{2}$Flow在无监督方法中达到最先进性能，并生成高可靠性不确定性图。
limitations: 可能对复杂运动场景的泛化能力有限
计算开销可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个无监督光流与逐像素不确定性联合估计的循环框架，通过解耦学习策略实现稳定训练。

papers.title: LoopGuard: Breaking Self-Reinforcing Attention Loops via Dynamic KV Cache Intervention
papers.abstract: Through systematic experiments on long-context generation, we observe a damaging failure mode in which decoding can collapse into persistent repetition loops. We find that this degeneration is driven by collapsed attention patterns, where a subset of heads locks onto a narrow suffix of the history, and is further stabilized by inference-time KV cache reuse. Crucially, since many existing KV cache policies rely on attention-based importance, this collapse can produce spuriously high scores for repetitive tokens, causing cache management to inadvertently amplify repetition. To study this phenomenon in a controlled and reproducible manner, we introduce LoopBench, a benchmark with explicit loop-inducing conditions and loop-oriented metrics that quantify repetition severity and generation instability beyond downstream task scores. Building on these insights, we propose LoopGuard, a lightweight, plug-in KV cache guard that detects loop onset online and disrupts the feedback cycle by pruning repetitive tail spans under a fixed cache budget. Experiments on LoopBench show that LoopGuard reduces loop incidence by over 90 percentage points, while restoring output diversity and reducing token waste.

analysis.tldr: 提出LoopGuard，通过动态KV缓存干预打破自强化注意力循环，显著减少长文本生成中的重复循环问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 长文本生成中解码会陷入重复循环，现有KV缓存策略因依赖注意力重要性反而放大重复，亟需轻量级干预方法。
analysis.problem: 解决长文本生成中由注意力塌缩和KV缓存重用导致的持续重复循环问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到重复循环由注意力塌缩驱动（部分头锁定历史后缀），且KV缓存重用进一步稳定该模式；现有缓存策略因注意力重要性评分给重复token高分而无意中放大重复。
analysis.method: LoopGuard：轻量级即插即用KV缓存守卫，在线检测循环起始，通过修剪重复尾部跨度来打破反馈循环，在固定缓存预算下操作。
contributions: 系统揭示长文本生成中自强化注意力循环的机制（注意力塌缩+KV缓存重用）。
提出LoopGuard，一种轻量级KV缓存干预方法，在线检测并打破重复循环。
引入LoopBench基准，包含显式循环诱导条件和循环导向指标。
analysis.experiments: 在LoopBench上实验，LoopGuard将循环发生率降低超过90个百分点，恢复输出多样性并减少token浪费。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的重复循环模式。
在线检测的延迟和计算开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LoopGuard，通过动态KV缓存干预打破自强化注意力循环，显著减少长文本生成中的重复循环问题。

papers.title: Intra-finger Variability of Diffusion-based Latent Fingerprint Generation
papers.abstract: The primary goal of this work is to systematically evaluate the intra-finger variability of synthetic fingerprints (particularly latent prints) generated using a state-of-the-art diffusion model. Specifically, we focus on enhancing the latent style diversity of the generative model by constructing a comprehensive \textit{latent style bank} curated from seven diverse datasets, which enables the precise synthesis of latent prints with over 40 distinct styles encapsulating different surfaces and processing techniques. We also implement a semi-automated framework to understand the integrity of fingerprint ridges and minutiae in the generated impressions. Our analysis indicates that though the generation process largely preserves the identity, a small number of local inconsistencies (addition and removal of minutiae) are introduced, especially when there are poor quality regions in the reference image. Furthermore, mismatch between the reference image and the chosen style embedding that guides the generation process introduces global inconsistencies in the form of hallucinated ridge patterns. These insights highlight the limitations of existing synthetic fingerprint generators and the need to further improve these models to simultaneously enhance both diversity and identity consistency.

analysis.tldr: 系统评估扩散模型生成潜指纹的指内变异性，发现局部和全局不一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成指纹生成在法医应用中至关重要，但现有方法在保持身份一致性的同时难以实现风格多样性，且缺乏对生成指纹指内变异性的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 评估扩散模型生成潜指纹时，在增强风格多样性的前提下，指纹脊线和细节点的身份一致性是否得到保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成过程大致保留身份，但引入少量局部不一致（细节点的添加/删除），尤其在参考图像质量差的区域；参考图像与风格嵌入不匹配会导致全局不一致（幻觉脊线模式）。
analysis.method: 构建包含7个数据集的潜风格库，实现40多种风格合成；采用半自动框架评估指纹脊线和细节点的完整性。
contributions: 构建了涵盖7个数据集的潜风格库，支持40多种潜指纹风格合成。
系统分析了扩散模型生成潜指纹的指内变异性，揭示了局部和全局不一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了单一扩散模型，可能不适用于其他生成方法。
半自动框架可能无法完全捕捉所有不一致性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统评估扩散模型生成潜指纹的指内变异性，发现局部和全局不一致性。

papers.title: Counting to Four is still a Chore for VLMs
papers.abstract: Vision--language models (VLMs) have achieved impressive performance on complex multimodal reasoning tasks, yet they still fail on simple grounding skills such as object counting. Existing evaluations mostly assess only final outputs, offering limited insight into where these failures arise inside the model. In this work, we present an empirical study of VLM counting behavior through both behavioral and mechanistic analysis. We introduce COUNTINGTRICKS, a controlled evaluation suite of simple shape-based counting cases designed to expose vulnerabilities under different patchification layouts and adversarial prompting conditions. Using attention analysis and component-wise probing, we show that count-relevant visual evidence is strongest in the modality projection stage but degrades substantially in later language layers, where models become more susceptible to text priors. Motivated by this finding, we further evaluate Modality Attention Share (MAS), a lightweight intervention that encourages a minimum budget of visual attention during answer generation. Our results suggest that counting failures in VLMs stem not only from visual perception limits, but also from the underuse of visual evidence during language-stage reasoning. Code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/leduy99/-CVPRW26-Modality-Attention-Share.

analysis.tldr: VLMs在物体计数任务上表现不佳，原因在于语言阶段对视觉证据利用不足，而非仅视觉感知限制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM评估多关注最终输出，缺乏对内部失败机制的深入分析，而计数作为基础视觉技能，其失败原因值得探究。
analysis.problem: VLM在简单物体计数任务中表现不佳，且现有评估无法揭示模型内部失败根源。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过注意力分析和组件探测发现，计数相关的视觉证据在模态投影阶段最强，但在后续语言层中显著退化，模型更易受文本先验影响。
analysis.method: 提出COUNTINGTRICKS评估套件和Modality Attention Share (MAS)轻量干预方法，通过控制分块布局和对抗提示暴露漏洞，并强制语言阶段保留最小视觉注意力预算。
contributions: 构建了COUNTINGTRICKS评估套件，系统揭示VLM在计数任务上的脆弱性。
通过机制分析发现计数失败源于语言阶段对视觉证据的利用不足，并提出MAS干预方法缓解该问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: MAS干预可能影响其他任务性能，需进一步验证。
分析仅基于简单形状计数，复杂场景下的泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在物体计数任务上表现不佳，原因在于语言阶段对视觉证据利用不足，而非仅视觉感知限制。

papers.title: Compact single-shot ranging and near-far imaging using metasurfaces
papers.abstract: We present a metasurface imaging system capable of simultaneously capturing two images at close range (1-2~cm) and an additional image at long range (about 40~cm) on a shared photosensor. The close-range image pair focuses at 1.4~cm and 2.0~cm, respectively, which forms a focal stack, enabling passive ranging with an accuracy of $\pm$1~mm from 12~mm to 20~mm through a computationally efficient depth-from-defocus algorithm for a simplified scenario. The entire system is compact, with a total track length of 15~mm, making it suitable for seamless integration into edge platforms for defense and other resource-constrained applications.

analysis.tldr: 利用超表面实现紧凑型单次测距与近远场成像。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统成像系统在近远场同时成像和深度估计时往往体积庞大或需要多次曝光，难以满足边缘平台等资源受限场景的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个紧凑的光学系统，能够在单次拍摄中同时获取近场（1-2 cm）和远场（约40 cm）图像，并实现高精度被动测距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用超表面设计，在共享光传感器上同时捕获两个近场图像（焦距分别为1.4 cm和2.0 cm）和一个远场图像（约40 cm），近场图像形成焦栈，通过计算高效的离焦深度算法实现被动测距。
contributions: 提出一种基于超表面的紧凑成像系统，实现单次拍摄下的近远场多图像同时捕获。
利用近场焦栈和离焦深度算法，在12-20 mm范围内达到±1 mm的测距精度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 测距范围仅限于12-20 mm，远场未提供测距功能。
深度估计算法针对简化场景，可能对复杂场景适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用超表面实现紧凑型单次测距与近远场成像。

papers.title: Computational Implementation of a Model of Category-Theoretic Metaphor Comprehension
papers.abstract: In this study, we developed a computational implementation for a model of metaphor comprehension based on the theory of indeterminate natural transformation (TINT) proposed by Fuyama et al. We simplified the algorithms implementing the model to be closer to the original theory and verified it through data fitting and simulations. The outputs of the algorithms are evaluated with three measures: data-fitting with experimental data, the systematicity of the metaphor comprehension result, and the novelty of the comprehension (i.e. the correspondence of the associative structure of the source and target of the metaphor). The improved algorithm outperformed the existing ones in all the three measures.

analysis.tldr: 基于范畴论不定自然变换的隐喻理解计算模型，在数据拟合、系统性和新颖性上优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 隐喻理解是认知科学的重要问题，现有计算模型在理论忠实度和性能上存在不足，需要更贴近原始理论的实现。
analysis.problem: 如何实现一个基于范畴论不定自然变换（TINT）的隐喻理解模型，并提升其数据拟合、系统性和新颖性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 简化了TINT模型算法的实现，使其更贴近原始理论，并通过数据拟合和仿真验证。
contributions: 提出了一个更忠实于TINT理论的隐喻理解计算实现。
在数据拟合、系统性和新颖性三个指标上超越了现有算法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定隐喻数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
计算复杂度可能较高，未提及效率分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于范畴论不定自然变换的隐喻理解计算模型，在数据拟合、系统性和新颖性上优于现有方法。

papers.title: AI Achieves a Perfect LSAT Score
papers.abstract: This paper reports the first documented instance of a language model achieving a perfect score on an officially disclosed Law School Admission Test (LSAT). Controlled experiments on eight reasoning models show that varying the prompt, shuffling answer choices, and sampling multiple responses have no meaningful effect as drivers of performance. Ablating the thinking phase that models generate before answering, however, lowers frontier accuracy by up to 8 percentage points, predominantly in logical reasoning. Distilled models produce full thinking traces in the same format yet plateau far below frontier performance. A pilot process reward model fine-tuned via QLoRA on official LSAT explanations narrows this gap through Best-of-5 selection, with gains again predominantly in logical reasoning. The gatekeeper of elite legal education since 1948, the LSAT has not merely been passed but answered without a single error by models that reason. The upper bound of the cognitive capacities it has tested is no longer exclusive to human cognition.

analysis.tldr: 首个语言模型在LSAT考试中取得满分，推理阶段对逻辑推理性能至关重要。
analysis.research_motivation: LSAT作为精英法律教育的门槛考试，长期被认为测试人类认知能力上限，探索AI能否达到完美表现具有里程碑意义。
analysis.problem: 语言模型能否在LSAT考试中取得满分，以及影响其性能的关键因素是什么。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 提示词变化、选项打乱和多次采样对性能无显著影响，但去除思考阶段会降低准确率，尤其在逻辑推理部分；蒸馏模型虽产生完整思考轨迹但性能远低于前沿模型。
analysis.method: 对8个推理模型进行受控实验，包括提示词变化、选项打乱、多次采样、消融思考阶段，并训练过程奖励模型（PRM）通过Best-of-5选择提升性能。
contributions: 首次报告语言模型在LSAT考试中取得满分
系统分析推理阶段对逻辑推理性能的关键作用
展示过程奖励模型通过Best-of-5选择可缩小蒸馏模型与前沿模型的差距
analysis.experiments: 在8个推理模型上进行受控实验，包括提示词变化、选项打乱、多次采样、消融思考阶段，以及训练过程奖励模型（QLoRA微调）进行Best-of-5选择。
limitations: 仅针对LSAT考试，泛化性未知
过程奖励模型仅在官方解释上微调，可能依赖特定数据
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个语言模型在LSAT考试中取得满分，推理阶段对逻辑推理性能至关重要。

papers.title: Closed-Form Concept Erasure via Double Projections
papers.abstract: While modern generative models such as diffusion-based architectures have enabled impressive creative capabilities, they also raise important safety and ethical risks. These concerns have led to growing interest in concept erasure, the process of removing unwanted concepts from model representations. Existing approaches often achieve strong erasure performance but rely on iterative optimization and may inadvertently distort unrelated concepts. In this work, we present a simple yet principled alternative: a linear transformation framework that achieves concept erasure analytically, without any training. Our method adapts a pretrained model through two sequential, closed-form steps: first, computing a proxy projection of the target concept, and second, applying a constrained transformation within the left null space of known concept directions. This design yields a deterministic and geometrically interpretable procedure for safe, efficient, and theory-grounded concept removal. Across a wide range of experiments, including object and style erasure on multiple Stable Diffusion variants and the flow-matching model (FLUX), our approach matches or surpasses the performance of state-of-the-art methods while preserving non-target concepts more faithfully. Requiring only a few seconds to apply, it offers a lightweight and drop-in tool for controlled model editing, advancing the goal of safer and more responsible generative models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的闭式线性变换方法，通过双重投影实现概念擦除，在扩散模型中高效且保真。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型带来安全伦理风险，需要有效移除不希望的概念，但现有方法依赖迭代优化且可能扭曲无关概念。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练、不损害无关概念的前提下，高效地从模型表示中移除特定概念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两步闭式线性变换：先计算目标概念的代理投影，再在已知概念方向的左零空间内施加约束变换。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的闭式概念擦除框架，具有确定性和几何可解释性。
在多个扩散模型变体和FLUX上匹配或超越SOTA，同时更保真地保留非目标概念。
analysis.experiments: 在多个Stable Diffusion变体和FLUX模型上进行物体和风格擦除实验，与SOTA方法对比。
limitations: 仅适用于线性变换，可能无法处理非线性概念纠缠。
依赖已知概念方向，未知概念可能难以处理。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的闭式线性变换方法，通过双重投影实现概念擦除，在扩散模型中高效且保真。

papers.title: CoSToM:Causal-oriented Steering for Intrinsic Theory-of-Mind Alignment in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to attribute mental states to others, is a hallmark of social intelligence. While large language models (LLMs) demonstrate promising performance on standard ToM benchmarks, we observe that they often fail to generalize to complex task-specific scenarios, relying heavily on prompt scaffolding to mimic reasoning. The critical misalignment between the internal knowledge and external behavior raises a fundamental question: Do LLMs truly possess intrinsic cognition, and can they externalize this internal knowledge into stable, high-quality behaviors? To answer this, we introduce CoSToM (Causal-oriented Steering for ToM alignment), a framework that transitions from mechanistic interpretation to active intervention. First, we employ causal tracing to map the internal distribution of ToM features, empirically uncovering the internal layers' characteristics in encoding fundamental ToM semantics. Building on this insight, we implement a lightweight alignment framework via targeted activation steering within these ToM-critical layers. Experiments demonstrate that CoSToM significantly enhances human-like social reasoning capabilities and downstream dialogue quality.

analysis.tldr: CoSToM通过因果追踪和激活干预对齐LLM的内在心智理论能力，提升社交推理和对话质量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在标准ToM基准上表现良好，但在复杂任务场景中泛化能力差，依赖提示工程模仿推理，内部知识与外部行为存在错位，需要验证LLM是否真正具备内在认知并能稳定外化。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM在心智理论任务中内部知识表征与外部行为不一致的问题，实现从机制解释到主动干预的对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到LLM在标准ToM基准上表现良好，但在复杂任务场景中泛化失败，依赖提示脚手架模仿推理，内部知识与外部行为存在关键错位。
analysis.method: 提出CoSToM框架，首先通过因果追踪映射ToM特征的内部分布，揭示编码ToM语义的关键层；然后在这些关键层实施轻量级激活干预对齐。
contributions: 首次通过因果追踪揭示LLM内部层编码ToM语义的特征分布
提出轻量级激活干预框架CoSToM，实现从机制解释到主动干预的ToM对齐
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定模型架构上验证，泛化性未知
激活干预的长期稳定性和对其它能力的影响未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoSToM通过因果追踪和激活干预对齐LLM的内在心智理论能力，提升社交推理和对话质量。

papers.title: Prompt Relay: Inference-Time Temporal Control for Multi-Event Video Generation
papers.abstract: Video diffusion models have achieved remarkable progress in generating high-quality videos. However, these models struggle to represent the temporal succession of multiple events in real-world videos and lack explicit mechanisms to control when semantic concepts appear, how long they persist, and the order in which multiple events occur. Such control is especially important for movie-grade video synthesis, where coherent storytelling depends on precise timing, duration, and transitions between events. When using a single paragraph-style prompt to describe a sequence of complex events, models often exhibit semantic entanglement, where concepts intended for different moments in the video bleed into one another, resulting in poor text-video alignment. To address these limitations, we propose Prompt Relay, an inference-time, plug-and-play method to enable fine-grained temporal control in multi-event video generation, requiring no architectural modifications and no additional computational overhead. Prompt Relay introduces a penalty into the cross-attention mechanism, so that each temporal segment attends only to its assigned prompt, allowing the model to represent one semantic concept at a time and thereby improving temporal prompt alignment, reducing semantic interference, and enhancing visual quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prompt Relay，一种推理时即插即用的方法，通过交叉注意力惩罚实现多事件视频生成中细粒度的时间控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频扩散模型难以表示多事件的时间顺序，缺乏控制语义概念出现时间、持续时间和顺序的机制，导致语义纠缠和文本-视频对齐差。
analysis.problem: 多事件视频生成中缺乏细粒度时间控制，模型无法准确按时间顺序呈现多个语义概念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 使用单段落提示描述复杂事件序列时，模型出现语义纠缠，不同时刻的概念相互干扰，导致文本-视频对齐差。
analysis.method: Prompt Relay在推理时向交叉注意力机制引入惩罚项，使每个时间片段仅关注其分配的提示，从而一次只表示一个语义概念。
contributions: 提出Prompt Relay，一种无需架构修改和额外计算开销的推理时即插即用方法。
通过交叉注意力惩罚实现细粒度时间控制，改善时间提示对齐、减少语义干扰并提升视觉质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的时间段划分，对复杂动态事件适应性有限。
惩罚机制可能影响生成视频的连贯性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prompt Relay，一种推理时即插即用的方法，通过交叉注意力惩罚实现多事件视频生成中细粒度的时间控制。

papers.title: The AI Telco Engineer: Toward Autonomous Discovery of Wireless Communications Algorithms
papers.abstract: Agentic AI is rapidly transforming the way research is conducted, from prototyping ideas to reproducing results found in the literature. In this paper, we explore the ability of agentic AI to autonomously design wireless communication algorithms. To that end, we implement a dedicated framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) to iteratively generate, evaluate, and refine candidate algorithms. We evaluate the framework on three tasks spanning the physical (PHY) and medium access control (MAC) layers: statistics-agnostic channel estimation, channel estimation with known covariance, and link adaptation. Our results show that, in a matter of hours, the framework produces algorithms that are competitive with and, in some cases, outperforming conventional baselines. Moreover, unlike neural network-based approaches, the generated algorithms are fully explainable and extensible. This work represents a first step toward the autonomous discovery of novel wireless communication algorithms, and we look forward to the progress our community makes in this direction.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于LLM的智能体框架，可自主设计无线通信算法，在信道估计和链路自适应任务上达到或超越传统基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 无线通信算法设计依赖专家经验，耗时且难以探索大量可能性；现有自动化方法（如神经网络）缺乏可解释性和可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用智能体AI自主发现并优化无线通信算法，使其在性能上媲美甚至超越传统方法，同时保持可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建一个专用框架，利用LLM迭代生成、评估和优化候选算法，覆盖物理层和MAC层的三个任务。
contributions: 首次展示智能体AI在无线通信算法自主设计中的潜力
生成的算法完全可解释且可扩展，优于神经网络方法
analysis.experiments: 在三个任务（统计无关信道估计、已知协方差信道估计、链路自适应）上评估，结果在数小时内产生与基线竞争或更优的算法。
limitations: 仅验证了三个特定任务，泛化性未知
依赖LLM的生成质量，可能受限于模型能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于LLM的智能体框架，可自主设计无线通信算法，在信道估计和链路自适应任务上达到或超越传统基线。

papers.title: SinkTrack: Attention Sink based Context Anchoring for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) suffer from hallucination and context forgetting. Prior studies suggest that attention drift is a primary cause of these problems, where LLMs' focus shifts towards newly generated tokens and away from the initial input context. To counteract this, we make use of a related, intrinsic characteristic of LLMs: attention sink -- the tendency to consistently allocate high attention to the very first token (i.e., <BOS>) of a sequence. Concretely, we propose an advanced context anchoring method, SinkTrack, which treats <BOS> as an information anchor and injects key contextual features (such as those derived from the input image or instruction) into its representation. As such, LLM remains anchored to the initial input context throughout the entire generation process. SinkTrack is training-free, plug-and-play, and introduces negligible inference overhead. Experiments demonstrate that SinkTrack mitigates hallucination and context forgetting across both textual (e.g., +21.6% on SQuAD2.0 with Llama3.1-8B-Instruct) and multi-modal (e.g., +22.8% on M3CoT with Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct) tasks. Its consistent gains across different architectures and scales underscore the robustness and generalizability. We also analyze its underlying working mechanism from the perspective of information delivery. Our source code is available at https://github.com/67L1/SinkTrack.

analysis.tldr: 利用注意力汇机制将关键上下文特征注入<BOS>令牌，无需训练即可缓解LLM幻觉和上下文遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM存在幻觉和上下文遗忘问题，先前研究表明注意力漂移是主要原因，即模型注意力从初始输入转向新生成的令牌。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练开销的前提下，使LLM在整个生成过程中保持对初始输入上下文的关注，从而缓解幻觉和上下文遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到LLM存在注意力汇现象，即始终对序列第一个令牌（<BOS>）分配高注意力。
analysis.method: 提出SinkTrack，将<BOS>作为信息锚点，将关键上下文特征（如图像或指令特征）注入其表示中，无需训练且即插即用。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、即插即用的上下文锚定方法SinkTrack，利用注意力汇机制缓解幻觉和上下文遗忘。
在文本和多模态任务上验证了有效性，并分析了其信息传递的工作机制。
analysis.experiments: 在文本任务（SQuAD2.0上+21.6%准确率）和多模态任务（M3CoT上+22.8%）上进行了实验，展示了跨架构和规模的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖于<BOS>令牌的注意力汇特性，对于没有该特性的模型可能不适用。
注入上下文特征的方式可能受限于特征提取质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用注意力汇机制将关键上下文特征注入<BOS>令牌，无需训练即可缓解LLM幻觉和上下文遗忘。

papers.title: LVSum: A Benchmark for Timestamp-Aware Long Video Summarization
papers.abstract: Long video summarization presents significant challenges for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs), particularly in maintaining temporal fidelity over extended durations and producing summaries that are both semantically and temporally grounded. In this work, we present LVSum, a human-annotated benchmark designed specifically for evaluating long video summarization with fine-grained temporal alignment. LVSum comprises diverse long-form videos across 13 domains, each paired with human-generated summaries containing precise temporal references. We conduct a comprehensive evaluation of both proprietary and open-source MLLMs on LVSum, assessing performance using newly introduced LLM-based metrics for content relevance and modality coherence, alongside standard evaluation metrics. Our experiments reveal systematic gaps in temporal understanding among existing MLLMs and offer insights that establish a new foundation for advancing temporal reasoning in long video summarization.

analysis.tldr: LVSum是一个用于评估长视频摘要中时间对齐能力的新基准，揭示了现有多模态大模型在时间理解上的系统性不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频摘要面临时间保真度挑战，现有MLLM在长时间跨度下难以生成语义和时间上均准确的摘要，缺乏专门评估时间对齐的基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个包含细粒度时间标注的长视频摘要基准来评估MLLM的时间理解能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现现有MLLM在时间理解上存在系统性差距，摘要未提供具体失败模式细节。
analysis.method: 构建了包含13个领域、人工标注时间戳的长视频摘要基准LVSum，并引入基于LLM的评估指标（内容相关性和模态一致性）。
contributions: 提出了LVSum，首个专注于长视频摘要时间对齐的人工标注基准。
系统评估了多种MLLM，揭示了时间理解上的不足，并建立了新的评估基础。
analysis.experiments: 在LVSum上评估了多个闭源和开源MLLM，使用新提出的LLM指标和标准指标。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准覆盖领域有限（13个），可能不全面。
评估指标依赖LLM，可能存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LVSum是一个用于评估长视频摘要中时间对齐能力的新基准，揭示了现有多模态大模型在时间理解上的系统性不足。

papers.title: FREE-Switch: Frequency-based Dynamic LoRA Switch for Style Transfer
papers.abstract: With the growing availability of open-sourced adapters trained on the same diffusion backbone for diverse scenes and objects, combining these pretrained weights enables low-cost customized generation. However, most existing model merging methods are designed for classification or text generation, and when applied to image generation, they suffer from content drift due to error accumulation across multiple diffusion steps. For image-oriented methods, training-based approaches are computationally expensive and unsuitable for edge deployment, while training-free ones use uniform fusion strategies that ignore inter-adapter differences, leading to detail degradation. We find that since different adapters are specialized for generating different types of content, the contribution of each diffusion step carries different significance for each adapter. Accordingly, we propose a frequency-domain importance-driven dynamic LoRA switch method. Furthermore, we observe that maintaining semantic consistency across adapters effectively mitigates detail loss; thus, we design an automatic Generation Alignment mechanism to align generation intents at the semantic level. Experiments demonstrate that our FREE-Switch (Frequency-based Efficient and Dynamic LoRA Switch) framework efficiently combines adapters for different objects and styles, substantially reducing the training cost of high-quality customized generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换方法，结合语义对齐机制，实现高效、低成本的定制化图像生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型合并方法在图像生成中因扩散步骤误差累积导致内容漂移，且训练方法计算成本高，无训练方法忽略适配器间差异导致细节退化。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、低成本地组合多个预训练LoRA适配器，实现高质量定制化图像生成，同时避免内容漂移和细节退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同适配器擅长生成不同类型内容，每个扩散步骤对不同适配器的贡献不同；保持适配器间语义一致性可有效缓解细节损失。
analysis.method: 提出FREE-Switch框架，包含频率域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换方法和自动生成对齐机制，在语义层面对齐生成意图。
contributions: 提出频率域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换方法，根据每个扩散步骤对不同适配器的重要性动态选择适配器。
设计自动生成对齐机制，在语义层面保持适配器间一致性，减少细节损失。
实验证明该方法能高效组合不同对象和风格的适配器，显著降低定制化生成的训练成本。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练适配器的质量和多样性。
频率域切换的实时性在边缘设备上可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率域重要性驱动的动态LoRA切换方法，结合语义对齐机制，实现高效、低成本的定制化图像生成。

papers.title: What and Where to Adapt: Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning for Machine Vision Compression via Synergistic Adapters
papers.abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning of pre-trained codecs is a promising direction in image compression for human and machine vision. While most existing works have primarily focused on tuning the feature structure within the encoder-decoder backbones, the adaptation of the statistical semantics within the entropy model has received limited attention despite its function of predicting the probability distribution of latent features. Our analysis reveals that naive adapter insertion into the entropy model can lead to suboptimal outcomes, underscoring that the effectiveness of adapter-based tuning depends critically on the coordination between adapter type and placement across the compression pipeline. Therefore, we introduce Structure-Semantics Co-Tuning (S2-CoT), a novel framework that achieves this coordination via two specialized, synergistic adapters: the Structural Fidelity Adapter (SFA) and the Semantic Context Adapter (SCA). SFA is integrated into the encoder-decoder to preserve high-fidelity representations by dynamically fusing spatial and frequency information; meanwhile, the SCA adapts the entropy model to align with SFA-tuned features by refining the channel context for more efficient statistical coding. Through joint optimization, S2-CoT turns potential performance degradation into synergistic gains, achieving state-of-the-art results across four diverse base codecs with only a small fraction of trainable parameters, closely matching full fine-tuning performance. Code is available at https://github.com/Brock-bit4/S2-CoT.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构-语义协同微调框架，通过两种适配器协同优化编解码器与熵模型，实现高效图像压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法主要关注编码器-解码器的特征结构，忽视了熵模型中统计语义的适配，导致性能次优。
analysis.problem: 如何协调适配器类型与放置位置，同时优化特征结构和统计语义，实现高效的机器视觉图像压缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，将适配器简单插入熵模型会导致次优结果，适配效果关键取决于适配器类型与放置位置的协调。
analysis.method: 提出结构-语义协同微调框架，包含结构保真适配器（SFA）和语义上下文适配器（SCA），分别集成到编码器-解码器和熵模型中，通过联合优化实现协同增益。
contributions: 揭示了适配器类型与放置位置协调的重要性，并分析了熵模型适配的挑战。
提出S2-CoT框架，通过SFA和SCA协同优化特征结构与统计语义。
在四种基础编解码器上达到SOTA，仅用少量可训练参数接近全微调性能。
analysis.experiments: 在四种不同基础编解码器上进行实验，达到最先进结果，仅用少量可训练参数。
limitations: 可能依赖特定编解码器架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论在更复杂任务（如视频压缩）上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构-语义协同微调框架，通过两种适配器协同优化编解码器与熵模型，实现高效图像压缩。

papers.title: FinTrace: Holistic Trajectory-Level Evaluation of LLM Tool Calling for Long-Horizon Financial Tasks
papers.abstract: Recent studies demonstrate that tool-calling capability enables large language models (LLMs) to interact with external environments for long-horizon financial tasks. While existing benchmarks have begun evaluating financial tool calling, they focus on limited scenarios and rely on call-level metrics that fail to capture trajectory-level reasoning quality. To address this gap, we introduce FinTrace, a benchmark comprising 800 expert-annotated trajectories spanning 34 real-world financial task categories across multiple difficulty levels. FinTrace employs a rubric-based evaluation protocol with nine metrics organized along four axes -- action correctness, execution efficiency, process quality, and output quality -- enabling fine-grained assessment of LLM tool-calling behavior. Our evaluation of 13 LLMs reveals that while frontier models achieve strong tool selection, all models struggle with information utilization and final answer quality, exposing a critical gap between invoking the right tools and reasoning effectively over their outputs. To move beyond diagnosis, we construct FinTrace-Training, the first trajectory-level preference dataset for financial tool-calling, containing 8,196 curated trajectories with tool-augmented contexts and preference pairs. We fine-tune Qwen-3.5-9B using supervised fine-tuning followed by direct preference optimization (DPO) and show that training on FinTrace-Training consistently improves intermediate reasoning metrics, with DPO more effectively suppressing failure modes. However, end-to-end answer quality remains a bottleneck, indicating that trajectory-level improvements do not yet fully propagate to final output quality.

analysis.tldr: FinTrace 是一个针对金融领域长时任务中 LLM 工具调用的轨迹级评估基准，揭示了模型在信息利用和最终答案质量上的瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有金融工具调用基准局限于有限场景且依赖调用级指标，无法捕捉轨迹级推理质量，难以评估模型在长时金融任务中的真实表现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够全面评估 LLM 在长时金融任务中工具调用轨迹级推理质量的基准和训练数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估发现前沿模型在工具选择上表现良好，但所有模型在信息利用和最终答案质量上存在困难，表明调用正确工具与有效推理其输出之间存在关键差距。
analysis.method: 构建包含 800 条专家标注轨迹的 FinTrace 基准，采用基于量规的评估协议（9 个指标，4 个维度）；并构建 FinTrace-Training 轨迹级偏好数据集，使用 SFT 和 DPO 微调 Qwen-3.5-9B。
contributions: 提出 FinTrace 基准，包含 800 条专家标注轨迹，覆盖 34 个真实金融任务类别，支持轨迹级细粒度评估。
构建 FinTrace-Training，首个金融工具调用轨迹级偏好数据集，包含 8196 条轨迹和偏好对。
实验表明 DPO 训练能有效抑制失败模式，但最终答案质量仍是瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在 13 个 LLM 上评估，并基于 FinTrace-Training 对 Qwen-3.5-9B 进行 SFT 和 DPO 微调，结果显示中间推理指标提升，但端到端答案质量改进有限。
limitations: 仅针对金融领域，泛化性未知。
轨迹级改进未能完全转化为最终答案质量，需要进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FinTrace 是一个针对金融领域长时任务中 LLM 工具调用的轨迹级评估基准，揭示了模型在信息利用和最终答案质量上的瓶颈。

papers.title: Demographic and Linguistic Bias Evaluation in Omnimodal Language Models
papers.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive evaluation of demographic and linguistic biases in omnimodal language models that process text, images, audio, and video within a single framework.
