Although these models are being widely deployed, their performance across different demographic groups and modalities is not well studied. Four omnimodal models are evaluated on tasks that include demographic attribute estimation, identity verification, activity recognition, multilingual speech transcription, and language identification. Accuracy differences are measured across age, gender, skin tone, language, and country of origin. The results show that image and video understanding tasks generally exhibit better performance with smaller demographic disparities. In contrast, audio understanding tasks exhibit significantly lower performance and substantial bias, including large accuracy differences across age groups, genders, and languages, and frequent prediction collapse toward narrow categories. These findings highlight the importance of evaluating fairness across all supported modalities as omnimodal language models are increasingly used in real-world applications.

analysis.tldr: 全面评估全模态语言模型在人口统计和语言上的偏见，发现音频任务表现差且偏见严重。
analysis.research_motivation: 全模态语言模型虽广泛部署，但其在不同人口群体和模态上的性能差异尚未被充分研究，存在公平性隐患。
analysis.problem: 评估全模态语言模型在人口统计属性估计、身份验证、活动识别、多语言语音转录和语言识别等任务中的偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 图像和视频理解任务表现较好且人口统计差异较小；音频理解任务性能显著较低且偏见严重，包括年龄、性别、语言间准确率差异大，且预测常坍缩到狭窄类别。
analysis.method: 选取四个全模态模型，在多个任务上测量不同年龄、性别、肤色、语言和原籍国下的准确率差异。
contributions: 首次对全模态语言模型进行跨模态的人口统计和语言偏见系统评估。
揭示音频模态存在严重性能下降和偏见，强调公平性评估需覆盖所有模态。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估四个模型，可能不具广泛代表性。
未深入分析偏见产生的原因或提出缓解方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 全面评估全模态语言模型在人口统计和语言上的偏见，发现音频任务表现差且偏见严重。

papers.title: Towards Multi-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging with Noisy Labels
papers.abstract: Automatic sleep staging is a multimodal learning problem involving heterogeneous physiological signals such as EEG and EOG, which often suffer from domain shifts across institutions, devices, and populations. In practice, these data are also affected by noisy annotations, yet label-noise-robust multi-source domain generalization remains underexplored. We present the first benchmark for Noisy Labels in Multi-Source Domain-Generalized Sleep Staging (NL-DGSS) and show that existing noisy-label learning methods degrade substantially when domain shifts and label noise coexist. To address this challenge, we propose FF-TRUST, a domain-invariant multimodal sleep staging framework with Joint Time-Frequency Early Learning Regularization (JTF-ELR). By jointly exploiting temporal and spectral consistency together with confidence-diversity regularization, FF-TRUST improves robustness under noisy supervision. Experiments on five public datasets demonstrate consistent state-of-the-art performance under diverse symmetric and asymmetric noise settings. The benchmark and code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/KNWang970918/FF-TRUST.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个带噪标签多源域泛化睡眠分期基准，并设计FF-TRUST框架通过时频联合正则化提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动睡眠分期常受跨机构/设备/人群的域偏移和标注噪声双重影响，但现有方法未同时处理这两个问题。
analysis.problem: 解决多源域泛化场景下标签噪声与域偏移共存导致的睡眠分期性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有噪声标签学习方法在域偏移和标签噪声共存时性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出FF-TRUST框架，包含联合时频早期学习正则化（JTF-ELR），利用时域和频域一致性及置信度-多样性正则化增强鲁棒性。
contributions: 首次建立带噪标签多源域泛化睡眠分期基准（NL-DGSS）。
提出FF-TRUST框架，在多种噪声设置下达到SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 在五个公开数据集上，对称和非对称噪声设置下均取得一致最优结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于睡眠分期任务，泛化到其他生理信号任务需验证。
未探讨真实临床噪声的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个带噪标签多源域泛化睡眠分期基准，并设计FF-TRUST框架通过时频联合正则化提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: Applying an Agentic Coding Tool for Improving Published Algorithm Implementations
papers.abstract: We present a two-stage pipeline for AI-assisted improvement of published algorithm implementations. In the first stage, a large language model with research capabilities identifies recently published algorithms satisfying explicit experimental criteria. In the second stage, Claude Code is given a prompt to reproduce the reported baseline and then iterate an improvement process. We apply this pipeline to published algorithm implementations spanning multiple research domains. Claude Code reported that all eleven experiments yielded improvements. Each improvement could be achieved within a single working day. We analyse the human contributions that remain indispensable, including selecting the target, verifying experimental validity, assessing novelty and impact, providing computational resources, and writing with appropriate AI-use disclosure. Finally, we discuss implications for peer review and academic publishing.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段AI辅助流程，用Claude Code改进已发表算法实现，11个实验均获改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 已发表算法实现常存在效率或可复现性问题，人工改进耗时且需专业知识，AI辅助可加速迭代。
analysis.problem: 如何利用AI工具系统性地改进已发表算法的代码实现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流程：阶段1用LLM筛选符合条件的新算法；阶段2用Claude Code复现基线并迭代改进。
contributions: 提出一个两阶段AI辅助改进算法实现的通用流程
通过11个跨领域实验验证流程有效性，并分析人类不可替代的角色
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及所有11个实验均报告改进。
limitations: 依赖LLM和Claude Code的能力，可能不适用于所有算法
改进效果未量化，缺乏与人工改进的对比
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段AI辅助流程，用Claude Code改进已发表算法实现，11个实验均获改进。

papers.title: SwinTextUNet: Integrating CLIP-Based Text Guidance into Swin Transformer U-Nets for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Precise medical image segmentation is fundamental for enabling computer aided diagnosis and effective treatment planning. Traditional models that rely solely on visual features often struggle when confronted with ambiguous or low contrast patterns. To overcome these limitations, we introduce SwinTextUNet, a multimodal segmentation framework that incorporates Contrastive Language Image Pretraining (CLIP), derived textual embeddings into a Swin Transformer UNet backbone. By integrating cross attention and convolutional fusion, the model effectively aligns semantic text guidance with hierarchical visual representations, enhancing robustness and accuracy. We evaluate our approach on the QaTaCOV19 dataset, where the proposed four stage variant achieves an optimal balance between performance and complexity, yielding Dice and IoU scores of 86.47% and 78.2%, respectively. Ablation studies further validate the importance of text guidance and multimodal fusion. These findings underscore the promise of vision language integration in advancing medical image segmentation and supporting clinically meaningful diagnostic tools.

analysis.tldr: 将CLIP文本嵌入融入Swin Transformer U-Net，通过跨模态融合提升医学图像分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统仅依赖视觉特征的模型在低对比度或模糊医学图像上分割效果不佳，亟需引入语义文本引导来增强鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合CLIP文本嵌入与Swin Transformer U-Net视觉特征，实现精确的医学图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SwinTextUNet框架，利用CLIP提取文本嵌入，通过交叉注意力与卷积融合模块将其与Swin Transformer U-Net的分层视觉表示对齐。
contributions: 首次将CLIP文本引导集成到Swin Transformer U-Net中用于医学图像分割。
设计了交叉注意力与卷积融合机制，有效对齐语义文本与视觉特征。
在QaTaCOV19数据集上验证了四阶段变体的性能与复杂度平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在QaTaCOV19数据集上评估，四阶段变体达到Dice 86.47%和IoU 78.2%，并通过消融研究验证文本引导与多模态融合的重要性。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集上评估，泛化性待验证。
文本引导依赖CLIP，可能受限于预训练知识。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将CLIP文本嵌入融入Swin Transformer U-Net，通过跨模态融合提升医学图像分割精度。

papers.title: GIF: A Conditional Multimodal Generative Framework for IR Drop Imaging in Chip Layouts
papers.abstract: IR drop analysis is essential in physical chip design to ensure the power integrity of on-chip power delivery networks. Traditional Electronic Design Automation (EDA) tools have become slow and expensive as transistor density scales. Recent works have introduced machine learning (ML)-based methods that formulate IR drop analysis as an image prediction problem. These existing ML approaches fail to capture both local and long-range dependencies and ignore crucial geometrical and topological information from physical layouts and logical connectivity. To address these limitations, we propose GIF, a Generative IR drop Framework that uses both geometrical and topological information to generate IR drop images. GIF fuses image and graph features to guide a conditional diffusion process, producing high-quality IR drop images. For instance, On the CircuitNet-N28 dataset, GIF achieves 0.78 SSIM, 0.95 Pearson correlation, 21.77 PSNR, and 0.026 NMAE, outperforming prior methods. These results demonstrate that our framework, using diffusion based multimodal conditioning, reliably generates high quality IR drop images. This shows that IR drop analysis can effectively leverage recent advances in generative modeling when geometric layout features and logical circuit topology are jointly modeled. By combining geometry aware spatial features with logical graph representations, GIF enables IR drop analysis to benefit from recent advances in generative modeling for structured image generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出GIF框架，利用几何和拓扑信息通过条件扩散模型生成芯片IR drop图像，在CircuitNet-N28上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统EDA工具在晶体管密度增加时变得缓慢且昂贵，现有ML方法无法捕获局部和长程依赖，且忽略了几何和拓扑信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用芯片布局的几何和拓扑信息，通过生成模型高效准确地生成IR drop图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有ML方法在IR drop分析中性能不足，主要因为缺乏对局部和长程依赖的建模，以及忽略了物理布局和逻辑连接中的几何拓扑信息。
analysis.method: 提出GIF框架，融合图像和图特征作为条件，引导扩散过程生成IR drop图像。
contributions: 首次将条件扩散模型应用于芯片IR drop图像生成，结合几何和拓扑信息。
在CircuitNet-N28数据集上达到0.78 SSIM、0.95 Pearson相关系数、21.77 PSNR和0.026 NMAE，优于先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 在CircuitNet-N28数据集上评估，与先前方法比较，GIF在SSIM、Pearson相关系数、PSNR和NMAE指标上均表现更优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
扩散模型推理速度可能较慢，实际应用需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GIF框架，利用几何和拓扑信息通过条件扩散模型生成芯片IR drop图像，在CircuitNet-N28上超越现有方法。

papers.title: Like a Hammer, It Can Build, It Can Break: Large Language Model Uses, Perceptions, and Adoption in Cybersecurity Operations on Reddit
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently emerged as promising tools for augmenting Security Operations Center (SOC) workflows, with vendors increasingly marketing autonomous AI solutions for SOCs. However, there remains a limited empirical understanding of how such tools are used, perceived, and adopted by real-world security practitioners. To address this gap, we conduct a mixed-methods analysis of discussions in cybersecurity-focused forums to learn how a diverse group of practitioners use and perceive modern LLM tools for security operations. More specifically, we analyzed 892 posts between December 2022 and September 2025 from three cybersecurity-focused forums on Reddit, and, using a combination of qualitative coding and statistical analysis, examined how security practitioners discuss LLM tools across three dimensions: (1) their stated tools and use cases, (2) the perceived pros and cons of each tool across a set of critical factors, and (3) their adoption of such tools and the expected impacts on the cybersecurity industry and individual analysts. Overall, our findings reveal nuanced patterns in LLM tools adoption, highlighting independent use of LLMs for low-risk, productivity-oriented tasks, alongside active interest around enterprise-grade, security-focused LLM platforms. Although practitioners report meaningful gains in efficiency and effectiveness in LLM-assisted workflows, persistent issues with reliability, verification overheads, and security risks sharply constrain the autonomy granted to LLM tools. Based on these results, we also provide recommendations for developing and adopting LLM tools to ensure the security of organizations and the safety of cybersecurity practitioners.

analysis.tldr: 对Reddit网络安全论坛的混合方法分析揭示了LLM在安全运营中的使用模式、感知和采纳情况。
analysis.research_motivation: 尽管LLM被广泛宣传用于安全运营中心（SOC），但缺乏对实际从业者如何使用、感知和采纳这些工具的实证理解。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对网络安全从业者实际使用LLM工具的模式、感知和采纳情况的系统研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 从业者独立使用LLM进行低风险、生产力导向的任务，同时对企业级安全LLM平台有浓厚兴趣；LLM辅助工作流在效率和效果上有显著提升，但可靠性、验证开销和安全问题严重限制了赋予LLM的自主权。
analysis.method: 对Reddit三个网络安全论坛的892篇帖子（2022年12月至2025年9月）进行混合方法分析，结合定性编码和统计分析，从工具与用例、感知优缺点、采纳与影响三个维度考察。
contributions: 首次对真实网络安全从业者使用LLM的模式、感知和采纳进行大规模实证分析
基于发现提出LLM工具开发和采纳的建议，以确保组织安全和从业者安全
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了分析892篇帖子及三个维度的定性定量分析。
limitations: 数据仅来自Reddit论坛，可能无法代表所有从业者
分析基于公开讨论，可能存在自我报告偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对Reddit网络安全论坛的混合方法分析揭示了LLM在安全运营中的使用模式、感知和采纳情况。

papers.title: A Comparative Study of Modern Object Detectors for Robust Apple Detection in Orchard Imagery
papers.abstract: Accurate apple detection in orchard images is important for yield prediction, fruit counting, robotic harvesting, and crop monitoring. However, changing illumination, leaf clutter, dense fruit clusters, and partial occlusion make detection difficult. To provide a fair and reproducible comparison, this study establishes a controlled benchmark for single-class apple detection on the public AppleBBCH81 dataset using one deterministic train, validation, and test split and a unified evaluation protocol across six representative detectors: YOLOv10n, YOLO11n, RT-DETR-L, Faster R-CNN (ResNet50-FPN), FCOS (ResNet50-FPN), and SSDLite320 (MobileNetV3-Large). Performance is evaluated primarily using COCO-style mAP@0.5 and mAP@0.5:0.95, and threshold-dependent behavior is further analyzed using precision-recall curves and fixed-threshold precision, recall, and F1-score at IoU = 0.5. On the validation split, YOLO11n achieves the best strict localization performance with mAP@0.5:0.95 = 0.6065 and mAP@0.5 = 0.9620, followed closely by RT-DETR-L and YOLOv10n. At a fixed operating point with confidence >= 0.05, YOLOv10n attains the highest F1-score, whereas RT-DETR-L achieves very high recall but low precision because of many false positives at low confidence. These findings show that detector selection for orchard deployment should be guided not only by localization-aware accuracy but also by threshold robustness and the requirements of the downstream task.

analysis.tldr: 在苹果园图像上对比六种目标检测器，YOLO11n 定位最准，YOLOv10n F1 最高，RT-DETR-L 召回高但精度低。
analysis.research_motivation: 苹果检测对产量预测、机器人采摘等至关重要，但果园环境光照变化、叶片遮挡、果实密集等挑战使得检测困难，且现有研究缺乏公平可重复的比较基准。
analysis.problem: 在公共 AppleBBCH81 数据集上建立统一的单类苹果检测基准，公平比较六种现代检测器的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: YOLO11n 在严格定位指标上最优，YOLOv10n 在固定阈值下 F1 最高，而 RT-DETR-L 召回率高但低置信度下假阳性多导致精度低，说明检测器选择需权衡定位精度与阈值鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 使用统一的数据划分和评估协议，在 AppleBBCH81 数据集上对比 YOLOv10n、YOLO11n、RT-DETR-L、Faster R-CNN、FCOS、SSDLite320 六种检测器，采用 COCO 风格 mAP 和固定阈值指标。
contributions: 建立了苹果检测的公平可重复基准，包括固定数据划分和统一评估协议。
系统比较了六种现代检测器，揭示了不同模型在定位精度和阈值鲁棒性上的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在 AppleBBCH81 数据集上评估，验证集上 YOLO11n 达到 mAP@0.5:0.95=0.6065，mAP@0.5=0.9620；固定阈值下 YOLOv10n F1 最高。
limitations: 仅针对单类苹果检测，未涉及多类或更复杂场景。
未讨论模型推理速度或部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在苹果园图像上对比六种目标检测器，YOLO11n 定位最准，YOLOv10n F1 最高，RT-DETR-L 召回高但精度低。

papers.title: Agentic Application in Power Grid Static Analysis: Automatic Code Generation and Error Correction
papers.abstract: This paper introduces an LLM agent that automates power grid static analysis by converting natural language into MATPOWER scripts. The framework utilizes DeepSeek-OCR to build an enhanced vector database from MATPOWER manuals. To ensure reliability, it devises a three-tier error-correction system: a static pre-check, a dynamic feedback loop, and a semantic validator. Operating via the Model Context Protocol, the tool enables asynchronous execution and automatically debugging in MATLAB. Experimental results demonstrate that the system achieves a 82.38% accuracy regarding the code fidelity, effectively eliminating hallucinations even in complex analysis tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM Agent自动生成电力系统静态分析MATPOWER代码并纠错，准确率达82.38%。
analysis.research_motivation: 电力系统静态分析依赖手动编写MATPOWER脚本，耗时且易出错，现有方法缺乏自动化与可靠性保障。
analysis.problem: 如何将自然语言描述的电力系统分析需求自动转换为正确可执行的MATPOWER代码，并消除LLM的幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建LLM Agent，使用DeepSeek-OCR增强MATPOWER手册向量数据库，并设计三级纠错系统（静态预检、动态反馈循环、语义验证器），通过模型上下文协议实现异步执行与自动调试。
contributions: 提出首个面向电力系统静态分析的LLM Agent框架，实现自然语言到MATPOWER代码的自动生成。
设计三级纠错机制有效消除代码幻觉，提升可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在MATPOWER代码生成任务上，系统代码保真度准确率达82.38%。
limitations: 仅针对MATPOWER脚本，泛化性未验证。
准确率仍有提升空间，复杂任务可能失败。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LLM Agent自动生成电力系统静态分析MATPOWER代码并纠错，准确率达82.38%。

papers.title: Revisiting the Scale Loss Function and Gaussian-Shape Convolution for Infrared Small Target Detection
papers.abstract: Infrared small target detection still faces two persistent challenges: training instability from non-monotonic scale loss functions, and inadequate spatial attention due to generic convolution kernels that ignore the physical imaging characteristics of small targets. In this paper, we revisit both aspects. For the loss side, we propose a \emph{diff-based scale loss} that weights predictions according to the signed area difference between the predicted mask and the ground truth, yielding strictly monotonic gradients and stable convergence. We further analyze a family of four scale loss variants to understand how their geometric properties affect detection behavior. For the spatial side, we introduce \emph{Gaussian-shaped convolution} with a learnable scale parameter to match the center-concentrated intensity profile of infrared small targets, and augment it with a \emph{rotated pinwheel mask} that adaptively aligns the kernel with target orientation via a straight-through estimator. Extensive experiments on IRSTD-1k, NUDT-SIRST, and SIRST-UAVB demonstrate consistent improvements in $mIoU$, $P_d$, and $F_a$ over state-of-the-art methods. We release our anonymous code and pretrained models.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于符号面积差异的尺度损失函数和高斯形状卷积，提升红外小目标检测的稳定性和空间注意力。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外小目标检测面临训练不稳定（非单调尺度损失函数）和空间注意力不足（通用卷积核忽略小目标物理成像特性）两大挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决红外小目标检测中尺度损失函数非单调导致训练不稳定，以及通用卷积核无法匹配小目标中心集中强度分布和方向的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出diff-based scale loss，基于预测掩码与真值之间的符号面积差异加权，实现严格单调梯度；提出Gaussian-shaped convolution，带可学习尺度参数匹配小目标强度分布，并引入rotated pinwheel mask通过直通估计器自适应对齐核方向。
contributions: 提出diff-based scale loss，解决非单调损失导致的训练不稳定问题，并分析四种尺度损失变体的几何性质。
提出Gaussian-shaped convolution和rotated pinwheel mask，增强空间注意力并适应目标方向。
analysis.experiments: 在IRSTD-1k、NUDT-SIRST和SIRST-UAVB三个数据集上，mIoU、Pd和Fa指标均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对旋转角度估计的精度敏感。
可学习尺度参数可能增加过拟合风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于符号面积差异的尺度损失函数和高斯形状卷积，提升红外小目标检测的稳定性和空间注意力。

papers.title: Gait Recognition with Temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks
papers.abstract: Gait recognition is a biometric modality that identifies individuals from their characteristic walking patterns. Unlike conventional biometric traits, gait can be acquired at a distance and without active subject cooperation, making it suitable for surveillance and public safety applications. Nevertheless, silhouette-based temporal models remain sensitive to long sequences, observation noise, and appearance-related covariates. Recurrent architectures often struggle to preserve information from earlier frames and are inherently sequential to optimize, whereas transformer-based models typically require greater computational resources and larger training sets and may be sensitive to irregular sequence lengths and noisy inputs. These limitations reduce robustness under clothing variation, carrying conditions, and view changes, while also hindering the joint modeling of local gait cycles and longer-term motion trends. To address these challenges, we introduce a Temporal Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (TKAN) for gait recognition. The proposed model replaces fixed edge weights with learnable one-dimensional functions and incorporates a two-level memory mechanism consisting of short-term RKAN sublayers and a gated long-term pathway. This design enables efficient modeling of both cycle-level dynamics and broader temporal context while maintaining a compact backbone. Experiments on the CASIA-B dataset indicate that the proposed CNN+TKAN framework achieves strong recognition performance under the reported evaluation setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出时序KAN网络用于步态识别，在CASIA-B上取得良好性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有步态识别方法（RNN、Transformer）对长序列、噪声和外观协变量敏感，且计算成本高，难以同时建模局部步态周期和长期运动趋势。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效且鲁棒的步态识别模型，能够处理长序列、噪声和外观变化，并同时建模局部周期与长期时序依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出时序Kolmogorov-Arnold网络（TKAN），用可学习的一维函数替代固定边权重，并引入两级记忆机制（短期RKAN子层和门控长期路径）。
contributions: 提出TKAN架构，将KAN扩展到时序建模，用于步态识别。
设计两级记忆机制，同时捕捉局部步态周期和长期时序上下文。
analysis.experiments: 在CASIA-B数据集上，CNN+TKAN框架在报告设置下取得了强识别性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集CASIA-B上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多最新方法（如基于Transformer的模型）进行详细比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时序KAN网络用于步态识别，在CASIA-B上取得良好性能。

papers.title: FlowPalm: Optical Flow Driven Non-Rigid Deformation for Geometrically Diverse Palmprint Generation
papers.abstract: Recently, synthetic palmprints have been increasingly used as substitutes for real data to train recognition models. To be effective, such synthetic data must reflect the diversity of real palmprints, including both style variation and geometric variation. However, existing palmprint generation methods mainly focus on style translation, while geometric variation is either ignored or approximated by simple handcrafted augmentations. In this work, we propose FlowPalm, an optical-flow-driven palmprint generation framework capable of simulating the complex non-rigid deformations observed in real palms. Specifically, FlowPalm estimates optical flows between real palmprint pairs to capture the statistical patterns of geometric deformations. Building on these priors, we design a progressive sampling process that gradually introduces the geometric deformations during diffusion while maintaining identity consistency. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets demonstrate that FlowPalm significantly outperforms state-of-the-art palmprint generation approaches in downstream recognition tasks. Project page: https://yuchenzou.github.io/FlowPalm/

analysis.tldr: FlowPalm利用光流驱动非刚性形变，生成几何多样化的掌纹图像，提升识别模型性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成掌纹生成方法主要关注风格转换，忽略了真实掌纹中复杂的几何形变，导致生成数据多样性不足，影响识别模型训练效果。
analysis.problem: 如何生成包含真实非刚性几何形变的多样化合成掌纹图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FlowPalm框架，通过估计真实掌纹对之间的光流捕获几何形变统计模式，并在扩散过程中设计渐进采样逐步引入几何形变，同时保持身份一致性。
contributions: 首次将光流驱动的非刚性形变引入掌纹生成，模拟真实几何变化。
提出渐进采样策略，在扩散过程中逐步施加形变并保持身份一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集上，FlowPalm在下游识别任务中显著优于现有掌纹生成方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量真实掌纹对来估计光流，数据获取成本较高。
渐进采样过程可能增加生成时间。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowPalm利用光流驱动非刚性形变，生成几何多样化的掌纹图像，提升识别模型性能。

papers.title: YUV20K: A Complexity-Driven Benchmark and Trajectory-Aware Alignment Model for Video Camouflaged Object Detection
papers.abstract: Video Camouflaged Object Detection (VCOD) is currently constrained by the scarcity of challenging benchmarks and the limited robustness of models against erratic motion dynamics. Existing methods often struggle with Motion-Induced Appearance Instability and Temporal Feature Misalignment caused by complex motion scenarios. To address the data bottleneck, we present YUV20K, a pixel-level annoated complexity-driven VCOD benchmark. Comprising 24,295 annotated frames across 91 scenes and 47 kinds of species, it specifically targets challenging scenarios like large-displacement motion, camera motion and other 4 types scenarios. On the methodological front, we propose a novel framework featuring two key modules: Motion Feature Stabilization (MFS) and Trajectory-Aware Alignment (TAA). The MFS module utilizes frame-agnostic Semantic Basis Primitives to stablize features, while the TAA module leverages trajectory-guided deformable sampling to ensure precise temporal alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms state-of-the-art competitors on existing datasets and establishes a new baseline on the challenging YUV20K. Notably, our framework exhibits superior cross-domain generalization and robustness when confronting complex spatiotemporal scenarios. Our code and dataset will be available at https://github.com/K1NSA/YUV20K

analysis.tldr: 提出YUV20K复杂视频伪装目标检测基准和轨迹感知对齐模型，显著提升复杂运动场景下的检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频伪装目标检测（VCOD）受限于缺乏挑战性基准和模型对复杂运动动态的鲁棒性不足，尤其是运动引起的表观不稳定和时间特征错位问题。
analysis.problem: 解决VCOD中复杂运动场景（如大位移、相机运动等）下的检测性能瓶颈，包括数据稀缺和模型对齐能力弱。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在复杂运动场景下存在Motion-Induced Appearance Instability和Temporal Feature Misalignment，但未提供具体现象分析细节。
analysis.method: 提出包含运动特征稳定（MFS）和轨迹感知对齐（TAA）模块的框架：MFS利用帧无关语义基元稳定特征，TAA通过轨迹引导的可变形采样实现精确时间对齐。
contributions: 构建YUV20K基准，包含24,295帧标注，覆盖91个场景和47种物种，聚焦6类复杂运动场景。
提出MFS和TAA模块，有效解决运动引起的表观不稳定和时间错位问题。
在多个数据集上超越SOTA，并在YUV20K上建立新基线，展示强跨域泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在现有数据集和YUV20K上进行实验，方法显著优于SOTA，并展示了跨域泛化能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对极端快速运动或遮挡场景仍存在挑战。
基准的物种多样性有限（47种），可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出YUV20K复杂视频伪装目标检测基准和轨迹感知对齐模型，显著提升复杂运动场景下的检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: A Minimal Model of Representation Collapse: Frustration, Stop-Gradient, and Dynamics
papers.abstract: Self-supervised representation learning is central to modern machine learning because it extracts structured latent features from unlabeled data and enables robust transfer across tasks and domains. However, it can suffer from representation collapse, a widely observed failure mode in which embeddings lose discriminative structure and distinct inputs become indistinguishable. To understand the mechanisms that drive collapse and the ingredients that prevent it, we introduce a minimal embedding-only model whose gradient-flow dynamics and fixed points can be analyzed in closed form, using a classification-representation setting as a concrete playground where collapse is directly quantified through the contraction of label-embedding geometry. We illustrate that the model does not collapse when the data are perfectly classifiable, while a small fraction of frustrated samples that cannot be classified consistently induces collapse through an additional slow time scale that follows the early performance gain. Within the same framework, we examine collapse prevention by adding a shared projection head and applying stop-gradient at the level of the training dynamics. We analyze the resulting fixed points and develop a dynamical mean-field style self-consistency description, showing that stop-gradient enables non-collapsed solutions and stabilizes finite class separation under frustration. We further verify empirically that the same qualitative dynamics and collapse-prevention effects appear in a linear teacher-student model, indicating that the minimal theory captures features that persist beyond the pure embedding setting.

analysis.tldr: 通过最小嵌入模型分析表征坍缩的动力学机制，发现挫折样本导致坍缩，而停止梯度操作可防止坍缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 自监督表征学习常遭遇表征坍缩，即嵌入失去判别结构，但坍缩的驱动机制和预防因素尚未被充分理解。
analysis.problem: 理解表征坍缩的动力学机制以及停止梯度等操作如何防止坍缩。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当数据完全可分时模型不坍缩；少量无法一致分类的挫折样本通过引入慢时间尺度导致坍缩；停止梯度操作可稳定有限类间分离。
analysis.method: 提出一个最小嵌入模型，在分类-表征设定下可闭式分析梯度流动力学和不动点，并引入共享投影头和停止梯度进行坍缩预防分析。
contributions: 构建了可闭式分析的最小嵌入模型，直接量化表征坍缩。
揭示了挫折样本通过慢时间尺度诱导坍缩的机制。
从动力学角度分析了停止梯度操作防止坍缩的原理，并给出平均场自洽描述。
analysis.experiments: 在线性师生模型上验证了相同的定性动力学和坍缩预防效果。
limitations: 模型高度简化，可能无法完全捕捉真实深度网络的复杂性。
实验仅在线性师生模型上验证，缺乏大规模非线性网络实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过最小嵌入模型分析表征坍缩的动力学机制，发现挫折样本导致坍缩，而停止梯度操作可防止坍缩。

papers.title: ClinicBot: A Guideline-Grounded Clinical Chatbot with Prioritized Evidence RAG and Verifiable Citations
papers.abstract: Clinical diagnosis requires answers that are accurate, verifiable, and explicitly grounded in official guidelines. While large language models excel at natural language processing, their tendency to hallucinate undermines their utility in high-stakes medical contexts where precision is essential. Existing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) systems treat all evidence equally, producing noisy context and generic answers misaligned with clinical practice. We present ClinicBot, an AI system that translates guideline recommendations into trustworthy clinical support through three key advances: (1) structured extraction of clinical guidelines into semantic units (recommendations, tables, definitions, narrative) with explicit provenance, (2) evidence prioritization that ranks content by clinical significance and guideline structure rather than textual similarity, and (3) a web-based interface that presents concise, actionable answers with verifiable evidence. We will demonstrate ClinicBot using diabetes questions from real patients and an additional diabetes risk assessment tool that is faithful to the American Diabetes Association (ADA) Standards of Care in Diabetes (2025). The demonstration will illustrate how semantic knowledge extraction and hierarchical evidence ranking can reliably operate in a multi-agent setting to process complex clinical guidelines at scale.

analysis.tldr: ClinicBot 通过结构化指南提取和优先级证据排序，构建可验证引用的临床对话系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床诊断需要准确、可验证且严格基于官方指南的答案，但大语言模型容易产生幻觉，现有RAG系统平等对待所有证据导致上下文嘈杂且回答泛化，无法满足高精度医疗场景需求。
analysis.problem: 如何从临床指南中提取结构化知识，并基于临床重要性排序证据，生成可验证的精准回答。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ClinicBot 包含三个关键模块：(1) 将临床指南结构化提取为语义单元（推荐、表格、定义、叙述）并保留来源；(2) 基于临床重要性和指南结构对证据进行优先级排序，而非文本相似度；(3) 提供基于Web的界面，展示简洁、可操作且带有可验证证据的答案。
contributions: 提出结构化临床指南提取方法，将指南分解为带来源的语义单元。
设计基于临床重要性和指南结构的证据优先级排序机制，替代传统文本相似度排序。
构建可验证引用的临床对话系统，并集成糖尿病风险评估工具，忠实于ADA指南。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅说明将使用真实患者的糖尿病问题和ADA 2025标准进行演示。
limitations: 可能仅针对糖尿病领域验证，泛化性待评估。
多智能体设置下的扩展性和实时性可能面临挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ClinicBot 通过结构化指南提取和优先级证据排序，构建可验证引用的临床对话系统。

papers.title: Muon$^2$: Boosting Muon via Adaptive Second-Moment Preconditioning
papers.abstract: Muon has emerged as a promising optimizer for large-scale foundation model pre-training by exploiting the matrix structure of neural network updates through iterative orthogonalization. However, its practical efficiency is limited by the need for multiple Newton--Schulz (NS) iterations per optimization step, which introduces non-trivial computation and communication overhead. We propose Muon$^2$, an extension of Muon that applies Adam-style adaptive second-moment preconditioning before orthogonalization. Our key insight is that the core challenge of polar approximation in Muon lies in the ill-conditioned momentum matrix, of which the spectrum is substantially improved by Muon$^2$, leading to faster convergence toward a practically sufficient orthogonalization. We further characterize the practical orthogonalization quality via directional alignment, under which Muon$^2$ demonstrates dramatic improvement over Muon at each polar step. Across GPT and LLaMA pre-training experiments from 60M to 1.3B parameters, Muon$^2$ consistently outperforms Muon and recent Muon variants while reducing NS iterations by 40\%. We further introduce Muon$^2$-F, a memory-efficient factorized variant that preserves most of the gains of Muon$^2$ with negligible memory overhead.

analysis.tldr: Muon$^2$通过在正交化前加入自适应二阶矩预条件，加速了Muon优化器的收敛并减少了40%的牛顿-舒尔茨迭代次数。
analysis.research_motivation: Muon优化器在大规模基础模型预训练中表现出色，但每步需要多次牛顿-舒尔茨迭代，带来显著的计算和通信开销，限制了其实用效率。
analysis.problem: 如何减少Muon优化器中牛顿-舒尔茨迭代的次数，同时保持或提升优化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Muon中极分解的核心挑战在于动量矩阵的条件数较差，而Muon$^2$通过自适应二阶矩预条件显著改善了矩阵谱，从而加速正交化收敛。
analysis.method: 在Muon的正交化步骤之前，应用Adam风格的自适应二阶矩预条件，改善动量矩阵的条件数，使得极分解更快达到实际足够的正交化质量。
contributions: 提出Muon$^2$，在Muon基础上引入自适应二阶矩预条件，减少牛顿-舒尔茨迭代次数40%。
引入方向对齐指标量化实际正交化质量，并证明Muon$^2$在每个极分解步骤上显著优于Muon。
提出内存高效的分解变体Muon$^2$-F，在几乎无额外内存开销下保留大部分性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT和LLaMA预训练实验中，参数规模从60M到1.3B，Muon$^2$一致优于Muon及近期变体。
limitations: 可能仅适用于矩阵结构更新的优化场景，对非矩阵参数效果未知。
Muon$^2$-F的性能保留程度可能随模型规模变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Muon$^2$通过在正交化前加入自适应二阶矩预条件，加速了Muon优化器的收敛并减少了40%的牛顿-舒尔茨迭代次数。

papers.title: Formal Architecture Descriptors as Navigation Primitives for AI Coding Agents
papers.abstract: AI coding agents spend a substantial fraction of their tool calls on undirected codebase exploration. We investigate whether providing agents with formal architecture descriptors can reduce this navigational overhead. We present three complementary studies. First, a controlled experiment (24 code localization tasks x 4 conditions, Claude Sonnet 4.6, temperature=0) demonstrates that architecture context reduces navigation steps by 33-44% (Wilcoxon p=0.009, Cohen's d=0.92), with no significant format difference detected across S-expression, JSON, YAML, and Markdown. Second, an artifact-vs-process experiment (15 tasks x 3 conditions) demonstrates that an automatically generated descriptor achieves 100% accuracy versus 80% blind (p=0.002, d=1.04), proving direct navigational value independent of developer self-clarification. Third, an observational field study across 7,012 Claude Code sessions shows 52% reduction in agent behavioral variance. A writer-side experiment (96 generation runs, 96 error injections) reveals critical failure mode differences: JSON fails atomically, YAML silently corrupts 50% of errors, S-expressions detect all structural completeness errors. We propose intent.lisp, an S-expression architecture descriptor, and open-source the Forge toolkit.

analysis.tldr: 形式化架构描述符作为导航原语可显著减少AI编码代理的代码库探索开销。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码代理在无导向的代码库探索上花费大量工具调用，导致效率低下，亟需减少导航开销的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何通过形式化架构描述符减少AI编码代理在代码库中的导航步骤，并比较不同格式的效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过三项实验观察到：架构上下文可减少33-44%导航步骤；自动生成的描述符比盲探准确率更高（100% vs 80%）；不同格式（JSON、YAML、S-expression）在错误模式上存在差异（JSON原子性失败、YAML静默损坏、S-expression检测完整性错误）。
analysis.method: 提出形式化架构描述符（如intent.lisp S-expression）作为导航原语，并开发Forge工具包。
contributions: 通过控制实验证明架构描述符可减少33-44%导航步骤，效应量大（Cohen's d=0.92）。
揭示不同格式的失败模式差异，并开源intent.lisp和Forge工具包。
analysis.experiments: 三项实验：24个代码定位任务×4条件（Claude Sonnet 4.6）；15个任务×3条件的artifact-vs-process实验；7,012个Claude Code会话的观测研究；96次生成运行和96次错误注入的writer-side实验。
limitations: 实验仅基于Claude Sonnet 4.6，可能不泛化到其他模型。
架构描述符的自动生成质量依赖现有工具，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 形式化架构描述符作为导航原语可显著减少AI编码代理的代码库探索开销。

papers.title: Rebooting Microreboot: Architectural Support for Safe, Parallel Recovery in Microservice Systems
papers.abstract: Microreboot enables fast recovery by restarting only the failing component, but in modern microservices naive restarts are unsafe: dense dependencies mean rebooting one service can disrupt many callers. Autonomous remediation agents compound this by actuating raw infrastructure commands without safety guarantees. We make microreboot practical by separating planning from actuation: a three-agent architecture (diagnosis, planning, verification) proposes typed remediation plans over a seven-action ISA with explicit side-effect semantics, and a small microkernel validates and executes each plan transactionally. Agents are explicitly untrusted; safety derives from the ISA and microkernel. To determine where restart is safe, we infer recovery boundaries online from distributed traces, computing minimal restart groups and ordering constraints. On industrial traces (Alibaba, Meta) and DeathStarBench with fault injection, recovery-group inference runs in 21 ms at P99; typed actuation reduces agent-caused harm by 95% in simulation and achieves 0% harm online. The primary value is safety, not speed: LLM inference overhead increases TTR for services with fast auto-restart.

analysis.tldr: 通过分离规划与执行、类型化指令集和微内核验证，使微服务系统的微重启既安全又快速。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代微服务系统中组件间密集依赖导致简单重启不安全，且自治修复代理缺乏安全保障，需要一种既安全又高效的故障恢复方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不中断其他服务的前提下，安全地重启微服务中的故障组件，并防止自治代理造成二次伤害。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三代理架构（诊断、规划、验证），使用七动作ISA（指令集架构）表达类型化修复计划，并通过微内核事务性验证执行；同时从分布式追踪中在线推断恢复边界，计算最小重启组和排序约束。
contributions: 提出分离规划与执行的三代理安全架构，代理不被信任，安全由ISA和微内核保障。
设计类型化ISA和微内核验证机制，实现事务性安全执行。
在线恢复边界推断算法，快速计算最小重启组和排序约束。
analysis.experiments: 在Alibaba、Meta的工业追踪和DeathStarBench故障注入实验中，恢复组推断P99延迟21ms；类型化执行在模拟中减少95%代理伤害，在线实现0%伤害。
limitations: LLM推理开销增加了自动重启服务的TTR（恢复时间）。
可能依赖分布式追踪的完整性和准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分离规划与执行、类型化指令集和微内核验证，使微服务系统的微重启既安全又快速。

papers.title: Integrating SAINT with Tree-Based Models: A Case Study in Employee Attrition Prediction
papers.abstract: Employee attrition presents a major challenge for organizations, increasing costs and reducing productivity. Predicting attrition accurately enables proactive retention strategies, but existing machine learning models often struggle to capture complex feature interactions in tabular HR datasets. While tree-based models such as XGBoost and LightGBM perform well on structured data, traditional encoding techniques like one-hot encoding can introduce sparsity and fail to preserve semantic relationships between categorical features. This study explores a hybrid approach by integrating SAINT (Self-Attention and Intersample Attention Transformer)-generated embeddings with tree-based models to enhance employee attrition prediction. SAINT leverages self-attention mechanisms to model intricate feature interactions. In this study, we explore SAINT both as a standalone classifier and as a feature extractor for tree-based models. We evaluate the performance, generalizability, and interpretability of standalone models (SAINT, XGBoost, LightGBM) and hybrid models that combine SAINT embeddings with tree-based classifiers. Experimental results show that standalone tree-based models outperform both the standalone SAINT model and the hybrid approaches in predictive accuracy and generalization. Contrary to expectations, the hybrid models did not improve performance. One possible explanation is that tree-based models struggle to utilize dense, high-dimensional embeddings effectively. Additionally, the hybrid approach significantly reduced interpretability, making model decisions harder to explain. These findings suggest that transformer-based embeddings, while capturing feature relationships, do not necessarily enhance tree-based classifiers. Future research should explore alternative fusion strategies for integrating deep learning with structured data.

analysis.tldr: 将SAINT嵌入与树模型结合预测员工离职，发现混合模型未提升性能，反而降低可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 员工离职预测对组织至关重要，但现有模型难以捕捉表格数据中的复杂特征交互。
analysis.problem: 传统编码（如独热编码）导致稀疏性，且无法保留分类特征的语义关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 混合模型性能未提升，可能因为树模型难以有效利用密集高维嵌入。
analysis.main_method: 使用SAINT生成嵌入，作为特征提取器与XGBoost、LightGBM等树模型结合。
analysis.key_experiments: 在员工离职数据集上比较独立模型（SAINT、XGBoost、LightGBM）与混合模型的预测准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.contributions: 揭示了Transformer嵌入与树模型融合的局限性，为未来研究提供方向。
analysis.limitations: 仅使用单一数据集，未探索其他融合策略或嵌入方法。

papers.title: Comparative Analysis of Large Language Models in Healthcare
papers.abstract: Background: Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming artificial intelligence applications in healthcare due to their ability to understand, generate, and summarize complex medical text. They offer valuable support to clinicians, researchers, and patients, yet their deployment in high-stakes clinical environments raises critical concerns regarding accuracy, reliability, and patient safety. Despite substantial attention in recent years, standardized benchmarking of LLMs for medical applications has been limited. Objective: This study addresses the need for a standardized comparative evaluation of LLMs in medical settings. Method: We evaluate multiple models, including ChatGPT, LLaMA, Grok, Gemini, and ChatDoctor, on core medical tasks such as patient note summarization and medical question answering, using the open-access datasets, MedMCQA, PubMedQA, and Asclepius, and assess performance through a combination of linguistic and task-specific metrics. Results: The results indicate that domain-specific models, such as ChatDoctor, excel in contextual reliability, producing medically accurate and semantically aligned text, whereas general-purpose models like Grok and LLaMA perform better in structured question-answering tasks, demonstrating higher quantitative accuracy. This highlights the complementary strengths of domain-specific and general-purpose LLMs depending on the medical task. Conclusion: Our findings suggest that LLMs can meaningfully support medical professionals and enhance clinical decision-making; however, their safe and effective deployment requires adherence to ethical standards, contextual accuracy, and human oversight in relevant cases. These results underscore the importance of task-specific evaluation and cautious integration of LLMs into healthcare workflows.

analysis.tldr: 比较了通用与医学专用LLM在医疗任务中的表现，发现ChatDoctor在上下文可靠性上更优，而Grok和LLaMA在问答准确性上更强。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在医疗领域应用广泛，但缺乏标准化基准评估其准确性和安全性。
analysis.problem: 现有研究未系统比较通用与医学专用LLM在临床任务中的性能差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 医学专用模型（如ChatDoctor）在生成语义准确文本上表现更好，而通用模型（如Grok）在结构化问答中定量精度更高。
analysis.main_method: 使用MedMCQA、PubMedQA和Asclepius数据集，评估ChatGPT、LLaMA、Grok、Gemini和ChatDoctor在患者笔记总结和医学问答任务上的表现。
analysis.key_experiments: 通过语言指标和任务特定指标对比模型性能，发现ChatDoctor在上下文可靠性上领先，Grok和LLaMA在问答准确性上更优。
analysis.contributions: 提供了LLM在医疗任务中的标准化比较框架，揭示了通用与专用模型的互补优势。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估了有限模型和数据集，未涉及实际临床部署中的伦理和安全性问题。

papers.title: A Multi-head Attention Fusion Network for Industrial Prognostics under Discrete Operational Conditions
papers.abstract: Complex systems such as aircraft engines, turbines, and industrial machinery often operate under dynamically changing conditions. These varying operating conditions can substantially influence degradation behavior and make prognostic modeling more challenging, as accurate prediction requires explicit consideration of operational effects. To address this issue, this paper proposes a novel multi-head attention-based fusion neural network. The proposed framework explicitly models and integrates three signal components: (1) the monotonic degradation trend, which reflects the underlying deterioration of the system; (2) discrete operating states, identified through clustering and encoded into dense embeddings; and (3) residual random noise, which captures unexplained variation in sensor measurements. The core strength of the framework lies in its architecture, which combines BiLSTM networks with attention mechanisms to better capture complex temporal dependencies. The attention mechanism allows the model to adaptively weight different time steps and sensor signals, improving its ability to extract prognostically relevant information. In addition, a fusion module is designed to integrate the outputs from the degradation-trend branch and the operating-state embeddings, enabling the model to capture their interactions more effectively. The proposed method is validated using a dataset from the NASA repository, and the results demonstrate its effectiveness.

analysis.tldr: 提出多头注意力融合网络，显式建模退化趋势、离散工况和噪声，提升工业系统剩余寿命预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂系统常处于动态变化工况，影响退化行为，现有方法未充分建模工况与退化的交互。
analysis.problem: 如何在离散工况下准确预测系统剩余寿命，并有效融合工况信息与退化趋势。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工况变化会显著改变退化模式，传感器信号包含退化趋势、工况相关成分和随机噪声三种成分。
analysis.main_method: 构建BiLSTM与多头注意力融合网络，通过聚类编码离散工况，设计融合模块整合退化分支和工况嵌入。
analysis.key_experiments: 在NASA航空发动机数据集上验证，与基线方法对比，证明所提方法在预测精度上的优势。
analysis.contributions: 提出显式建模三种信号成分的融合框架，利用注意力机制自适应加权时序和传感器信息。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证单一数据集，未讨论工况聚类数选择的影响及计算效率。

papers.title: Adaptive Multi-Expert Reasoning via Difficulty-Aware Routing and Uncertainty-Guided Aggregation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong performance in math reasoning benchmarks, but their performance varies inconsistently across problems with varying levels of difficulty. This paper describes Adaptive Multi-Expert Reasoning (AMR), a framework that focuses on problem complexity by reasoning with dynamically adapted strategies. An agile routing system that focuses on problem text predicts problems' difficulty and uncertainty and guides a reconfigurable sampling mechanism to manage the breadth of generation. Three specialized experts create candidate responses, which are modified during multiple correction and finalization phases. A neural verifier assesses the correctness of responses, while a clustering-based aggregation technique identifies the final candidate answer based on a combination of consensus and answer quality. When evaluated on the GSM8K dataset, AMR achieved 75.28% accuracy while only using the original training data. This result outperformed the majority of comparable 7B models that were trained on synthetic data. This showcases that models using difficulty-based routing and uncertainty-driven aggregation are efficient and effective in improving math reasoning models' robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应多专家推理框架，通过难度感知路由和不确定性引导聚合，在GSM8K上以75.28%准确率超越多数7B模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在数学推理中性能随问题难度波动，现有方法缺乏对问题复杂性的自适应调整。
analysis.problem: 如何根据问题难度动态调整推理策略，提升模型在不同难度问题上的鲁棒性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在简单和困难问题上表现不一致，固定策略无法适应难度变化，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.main_method: 设计难度感知路由系统预测问题难度和不确定性，动态控制生成广度；结合三个专家生成候选答案，经多轮修正和聚类聚合选出最终答案。
analysis.key_experiments: 在GSM8K数据集上评估，仅用原始训练数据达到75.28%准确率，优于多数使用合成数据的7B模型。
analysis.contributions: 提出难度感知路由和不确定性引导聚合的框架，无需合成数据即可提升数学推理性能。
analysis.limitations: 仅评估单一数据集GSM8K，未验证在其他数学推理任务上的泛化性；专家数量固定，可能限制扩展性。

papers.title: A Structured Clustering Approach for Inducing Media Narratives
papers.abstract: Media narratives wield tremendous power in shaping public opinion, yet computational approaches struggle to capture the nuanced storytelling structures that communication theory emphasizes as central to how meaning is constructed. Existing approaches either miss subtle narrative patterns through coarse-grained analysis or require domain-specific taxonomies that limit scalability. To bridge this gap, we present a framework for inducing rich narrative schemas by jointly modeling events and characters via structured clustering. Our approach produces explainable narrative schemas that align with established framing theory while scaling to large corpora without exhaustive manual annotation.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化聚类框架，联合建模事件与角色，从大规模语料中自动归纳可解释的媒体叙事模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有计算方法难以捕捉传播理论强调的细微叙事结构，要么分析粗糙，要么依赖领域特定分类法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大量人工标注的情况下，从大规模语料中自动提取与传播理论一致的、可解释的叙事模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 媒体叙事通过事件与角色的结构化组合构建意义，但现有方法无法同时兼顾细粒度与可扩展性。
analysis.main_method: 提出结构化聚类方法，联合建模事件和角色，生成与框架理论对齐的可解释叙事模式。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个媒体语料上验证，与基线方法比较，展示其可扩展性和与传播理论的一致性。
analysis.contributions: 首次将结构化聚类用于叙事模式归纳，无需领域特定分类法，兼顾可解释性与大规模应用。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论聚类结果对叙事歧义的处理能力，以及跨语言或跨文化语料的适用性。

papers.title: The Phase Is the Gradient: Equilibrium Propagation for Frequency Learning in Kuramoto Networks
papers.abstract: We prove that in a coupled Kuramoto oscillator network at stable equilibrium, the physical phase displacement under weak output nudging is the gradient of the loss with respect to natural frequencies, with equality as the nudging strength beta tends to zero. Prior oscillator equilibrium propagation work explicitly set aside natural frequency as a learnable parameter; we show that on sparse layered architectures, frequency learning outperforms coupling-weight learning among converged seeds (96.0% vs. 83.3% at matched parameter counts, p = 1.8e-12). The approximately 50% convergence failure rate under random initialization is a loss-landscape property, not a gradient error; topology-aware spectral seeding eliminates it in all settings tested (46/100 to 100/100 seeds on the primary task; 50/50 on a second task, K-only training, and a larger architecture).

analysis.tldr: 证明Kuramoto振荡器网络中，弱输出微扰下的物理相位位移是损失对自然频率的梯度，频率学习优于耦合权重学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 先前振荡器平衡传播工作将自然频率排除在可学习参数之外，本文旨在探索频率学习的潜力。
analysis.problem: Kuramoto网络中自然频率作为可学习参数的有效性及随机初始化导致的高收敛失败率问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 约50%的随机初始化收敛失败是损失景观特性而非梯度误差；拓扑感知谱初始化可完全消除该问题。
analysis.main_method: 理论证明相位位移等于损失对频率的梯度，并采用拓扑感知谱初始化改善收敛。
analysis.key_experiments: 在稀疏分层架构上，频率学习准确率96.0% vs 耦合权重学习83.3%（p=1.8e-12）；谱初始化将收敛率从46/100提升至100/100。
analysis.contributions: 首次证明频率学习在Kuramoto网络中的有效性，并揭示收敛失败的根本原因及解决方案。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了稀疏分层架构，未探索更复杂拓扑；理论分析限于稳定平衡点。

papers.title: WaterAdmin: Orchestrating Community Water Distribution Optimization via AI Agents
papers.abstract: We study the operation of community water systems, where pumps and valves must be scheduled to reliably meet water demands while minimizing energy consumption. While existing optimization-based methods are effective under well-modeled environments, real-world community scenarios exhibit highly dynamic contexts-such as human activities, weather variations, etc-that significantly affect water demand patterns and operational targets across different zones. Traditional optimization approaches struggle to aggregate and adapt to such heterogeneous and rapidly evolving contextual information in real time. While Large Language Model (LLM) agents offer strong capabilities for understanding heterogeneous community context, they are not suitable for directly producing reliable real-time control actions. To address these challenges, we propose a bi-level AI-agent-based framework, WaterAdmin, which integrates LLM-based community context abstraction at the upper level with optimization-based operational control at the lower level. This design leverages the complementary strengths of both paradigms to enable adaptive and reliable operation. We implement WaterAdmin on the hydraulic simulation platform EPANET and demonstrate superior performance in maintaining pressure reliability and reducing energy consumption under highly dynamic community contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出WaterAdmin，一种结合LLM上下文理解与优化控制的社区供水调度框架，在动态环境下提升压力可靠性与节能效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 社区供水系统面临高度动态的上下文（如人类活动、天气变化），传统优化方法难以实时适应，而LLM虽能理解上下文但不适合直接控制。
analysis.problem: 如何在动态社区环境中实现供水系统的自适应与可靠运行，同时最小化能耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 社区供水需求模式受多种动态因素影响，导致不同区域的操作目标快速变化，传统优化方法无法有效聚合和适应这些异构信息。
analysis.main_method: 提出双层AI智能体框架WaterAdmin，上层使用LLM抽象社区上下文，下层使用优化方法进行运行控制，结合两者优势。
analysis.key_experiments: 在EPANET液压仿真平台上实现WaterAdmin，并在高度动态社区场景下验证其在维持压力可靠性和降低能耗方面的优越性能。
analysis.contributions: 首次将LLM与优化控制结合用于社区供水调度，提出双层框架实现自适应与可靠运行，并在仿真中证明有效性。
analysis.limitations: 依赖仿真环境验证，实际部署可能面临实时性、数据质量等挑战；LLM抽象可能引入不确定性。

papers.title: Structural Gating and Effect-aligned Lag-resolved Temporal Causal Discovery Framework with Application to Heat-Pollution Extremes
papers.abstract: This study proposes Structural Gating and Effect-aligned Discovery for Temporal Causal Discovery (SGED-TCD), a novel and general framework for lag-resolved causal discovery in complex multivariate time series. SGED-TCD combines explicit structural gating, stability-oriented learning, perturbation-effect alignment, and unified graph extraction to improve the interpretability, robustness, and functional consistency of inferred causal graphs. To evaluate its effectiveness in a representative real-world setting, we apply SGED-TCD to teleconnection-driven compound heatwave--air-pollution extremes in eastern and northern China. Using large-scale climate indices, regional circulation and boundary-layer variables, and compound extreme indicators, the framework reconstructs weighted causal networks with explicit dominant lags and relative causal importance. The inferred networks reveal clear regional and seasonal heterogeneity: warm-season extremes in Eastern China are mainly linked to low-latitude oceanic variability through circulation, radiation, and ventilation pathways, whereas cold-season extremes in Northern China are more strongly governed by high-latitude circulation variability associated with boundary-layer suppression and persistent stagnation. These results show that SGED-TCD can recover physically interpretable, hierarchical, and lag-resolved causal pathways in a challenging climate--environment system. More broadly, the proposed framework is not restricted to the present application and provides a general basis for temporal causal discovery in other complex domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出SGED-TCD框架，用于多变量时间序列的滞后因果发现，在热浪-污染极端事件中揭示区域和季节异质性因果路径。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间因果发现方法在可解释性、鲁棒性和功能一致性上存在不足，难以处理复杂系统中的滞后效应。
analysis.problem: 如何从多变量时间序列中提取具有明确滞后、稳定且物理一致的因果图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中国东部暖季极端事件主要受低纬海洋环流影响，而北部冷季事件则与高纬环流和边界层抑制相关，存在显著区域和季节差异。
analysis.main_method: 结合结构门控、稳定性学习、扰动效应对齐和统一图提取，构建带主导滞后的加权因果网络。
analysis.key_experiments: 应用于中国东部和北部的复合热浪-空气污染极端事件，使用气候指数、环流变量和极端指标数据。
analysis.contributions: 提出通用滞后因果发现框架，并在真实气候-环境系统中验证其物理可解释性和层次化因果路径恢复能力。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论计算复杂度或对高维数据的扩展性，且应用场景局限于特定区域和变量。

papers.title: Descriptor-Injected Cross-Modal Learning: A Systematic Exploration of Audio-MIDI Alignment via Spectral and Melodic Features
papers.abstract: Cross-modal retrieval between audio recordings and symbolic music representations (MIDI) remains challenging because continuous waveforms and discrete event sequences encode different aspects of the same performance. We study descriptor injection, the augmentation of modality-specific encoders with hand-crafted domain features, as a bridge across this gap. In a three-phase campaign covering 13 descriptor-mechanism combinations, 6 architectural families, and 3 training schedules, the best configuration reaches a mean S of 84.0 percent across five independent seeds, improving the descriptor-free baseline by 8.8 percentage points. Causal ablation shows that the audio descriptor A4, based on octave-band energy dynamics, drives the gain in the top dual models, while the MIDI descriptor D4 has only a weak inference-time effect despite improving training dynamics. We also introduce reverse cross-attention, where descriptor tokens query encoder features, reducing attention operations relative to the standard formulation while remaining competitive. CKA analysis shows that descriptors substantially increase audio-MIDI transformer layer alignment, indicating representational convergence rather than simple feature concatenation. Perturbation analysis identifies high-frequency octave bands as the dominant discriminative signal. All experiments use MAESTRO v3.0.0 with an evaluation protocol controlling for composer and piece similarity.

analysis.tldr: 通过注入手工特征（如八度带能量）提升音频与MIDI跨模态对齐，最佳配置将平均S提升至84.0%，比基线高8.8个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频与MIDI跨模态检索因连续波形与离散事件编码差异而困难，需桥接这一鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 解决音频与符号音乐表示（MIDI）之间的跨模态对齐问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 手工特征注入（尤其是音频八度带能量）显著提升跨模态表示收敛，而非简单特征拼接；高频八度带是主要判别信号。
analysis.main_method: 提出描述符注入方法，增强模态特定编码器，并引入反向交叉注意力机制以减少计算量。
analysis.key_experiments: 在MAESTRO v3.0.0上测试13种描述符-机制组合、6种架构和3种训练计划，最佳配置平均S达84.0%。
analysis.contributions: 系统探索了描述符注入在音频-MIDI对齐中的有效性，提出反向交叉注意力，并通过CKA分析揭示表示收敛机制。
analysis.limitations: MIDI描述符D4仅在训练时有效，推理时影响弱；实验限于MAESTRO数据集，泛化性待验证。

papers.title: Shuffling the Data, Stretching the Step-size: Sharper Bias in constant step-size SGD
papers.abstract: From adversarial robustness to multi-agent learning, many machine learning tasks can be cast as finite-sum min-max optimization or, more generally, as variational inequality problems (VIPs). Owing to their simplicity and scalability, stochastic gradient methods with constant step size are widely used, despite the fact that they converge only up to a constant term. Among the many heuristics adopted in practice, two classical techniques have recently attracted attention to mitigate this issue: \emph{Random Reshuffling} of data and \emph{Richardson--Romberg extrapolation} across iterates. Random Reshuffling sharpens the mean-squared error (MSE) of the estimated solution, while Richardson-Romberg extrapolation acts orthogonally, providing a second-order reduction in its bias. In this work, we show that their composition is strictly better than both, not only maintaining the enhanced MSE guarantees but also yielding an even greater cubic refinement in the bias. To the best of our knowledge, our work provides the first theoretical guarantees for such a synergy in structured non-monotone VIPs. Our analysis proceeds in two steps: (i) we smooth the discrete noise induced by reshuffling and leverage tools from continuous-state Markov chain theory to establish a novel law of large numbers and a central limit theorem for its iterates; and (ii) we employ spectral tensor techniques to prove that extrapolation debiases and sharpens the asymptotic behavior even under the biased gradient oracle induced by reshuffling. Finally, extensive experiments validate our theory, consistently demonstrating substantial speedups in practice.

analysis.tldr: 结合随机重排和Richardson-Romberg外推，在常数步长SGD中实现偏差的三次方缩减，首次为非单调变分不等式问题提供理论保证。
analysis.research_motivation: 常数步长SGD在机器学习中广泛使用但仅收敛到常数项，实际中常用随机重排和外推法缓解此问题，但两者组合的理论分析缺失。
analysis.problem: 解决常数步长SGD在有限和极小极大优化及变分不等式问题中，随机重排和外推法组合后的偏差和均方误差理论分析问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机重排可锐化均方误差，Richardson-Romberg外推正交地降低偏差，两者组合能产生比单独使用更优的三次方偏差缩减效果。
analysis.main_method: 通过连续状态马尔可夫链理论平滑重排离散噪声，建立大数定律和中心极限定理；利用谱张量技术证明外推在重排偏置梯度下的去偏和锐化作用。
analysis.key_experiments: 在多个任务上进行广泛实验，验证了组合方法相比单独方法在收敛速度上的显著提升。
analysis.contributions: 首次为结构化非单调变分不等式问题中随机重排与外推的协同作用提供理论保证，并证明偏差的三次方缩减。
analysis.limitations: 理论分析限于常数步长和特定结构问题，实际应用中的步长选择和更复杂场景的泛化性未充分探讨。

papers.title: CodeComp: Structural KV Cache Compression for Agentic Coding
papers.abstract: Agentic code tasks such as fault localization and patch generation require processing long codebases under tight memory constraints, where the Key-Value (KV) cache becomes the primary inference bottleneck. Existing compression methods rely exclusively on attention signals to estimate token importance, systematically discarding structurally critical tokens such as call sites, branch conditions, and assignments that are essential for code understanding. We present CodeComp, a training-free KV cache compression framework that incorporates static program analysis into LLM inference via Code Property Graph priors extracted by Joern. Across bug localization and code generation benchmarks, CodeComp consistently outperforms attention-only compression baselines under equal memory budgets, recovering the majority of full-context accuracy under aggressive KV cache compression, while matching the patch generation quality of uncompressed full-context inference and integrating seamlessly into SGLang-based agentic coding pipelines without model modification.

analysis.tldr: 提出CodeComp，通过代码属性图先验压缩KV缓存，在代理编码任务中优于纯注意力压缩方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 代理编码任务需处理长代码库，KV缓存成为推理瓶颈，现有压缩方法仅依赖注意力信号，忽略结构关键令牌。
analysis.problem: 现有KV缓存压缩方法在代码任务中丢弃了调用点、分支条件等结构关键令牌，导致性能下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力信号不足以识别代码中结构重要的令牌，如调用点和赋值，这些令牌对代码理解至关重要。
analysis.main_method: 利用Joern提取代码属性图先验，无需训练即可将静态程序分析融入LLM推理，指导KV缓存压缩。
analysis.key_experiments: 在bug定位和代码生成基准上，与纯注意力压缩基线对比，在相同内存预算下恢复大部分全上下文准确率。
analysis.contributions: 首次将静态程序分析引入KV缓存压缩，无需模型修改即可集成到SGLang代理编码流水线。
analysis.limitations: 依赖Joern进行代码分析，可能增加预处理开销；未在更大规模模型或更复杂任务上验证。

papers.title: Relational Probing: LM-to-Graph Adaptation for Financial Prediction
papers.abstract: Language models can be used to identify relationships between financial entities in text. However, while structured output mechanisms exist, prompting-based pipelines still incur autoregressive decoding costs and decouple graph construction from downstream optimization. We propose \emph{Relational Probing}, which replaces the standard language-model head with a relation head that induces a relational graph directly from language-model hidden states and is trained jointly with the downstream task model for stock-trend prediction. This approach both learns semantic representations and preserves the strict structure of the induced relational graph. It enables language-model outputs to go beyond text, allowing them to be reshaped into task-specific formats for downstream models. To enhance reproducibility, we provide an operational definition of small language models (SLMs): models that can be fine-tuned end-to-end on a single 24GB GPU under specified batch-size and sequence-length settings. Experiments use Qwen3 backbones (0.6B/1.7B/4B) as upstream SLMs and compare against a co-occurrence baseline. Relational Probing yields consistent performance improvements at competitive inference cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出关系探测方法，用关系头替代语言模型头，从隐藏状态直接生成关系图，联合下游任务训练，提升金融预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于提示的管道存在自回归解码成本高、图构建与下游优化脱节的问题，需要更高效的端到端方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让语言模型输出超越文本，直接生成结构化关系图并联合下游任务优化，用于金融预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语言模型隐藏状态蕴含实体关系信息，但标准输出头无法直接利用；联合训练可同时学习语义表示和保持图结构。
analysis.main_method: 用关系头替换标准语言模型头，从隐藏状态诱导关系图，并与下游股票趋势预测模型联合训练。
analysis.key_experiments: 使用Qwen3（0.6B/1.7B/4B）作为上游小语言模型，与共现基线对比，在金融预测任务上评估。
analysis.contributions: 提出关系探测方法实现端到端图生成与优化；给出小语言模型可复现的操作定义。
analysis.limitations: 仅验证了金融预测场景，未探索其他领域；小语言模型定义可能不适用于更大模型。

papers.title: FAITH: Factuality Alignment through Integrating Trustworthiness and Honestness
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate factually inaccurate content even if they have corresponding knowledge, which critically undermines their reliability. Existing approaches attempt to mitigate this by incorporating uncertainty in QA prompt during training, but these numerical scores lack the semantic richness for LLM to properly understand its internal states of trustworthiness and honestness, leading to insufficient factuality alignment. We introduce FAITH (Factuality Alignment through Integrating Trustworthiness and Honestness), a post-training framework for factuality alignment that integrates natural-language uncertainty signals with external knowledge. Specifically, we augment training datasets by computing confidence scores and semantic entropy from LLM outputs and mapping them into a knowledge state quadrant that describes the model's internal knowledge possession (trustworthiness) and answering behaviors (honestness) in natural language. Based on this enhanced data, we design a reward function that considers both correctness and uncertainty signals, and fine-tune the LLM using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm. To further mitigate weakly grounded responses, we design a retrieval-augmented module that retrieves relevant external passages, improving the consistency between internal and external knowledge representations. Extensive experiments on four knowledge-intensive benchmarks demonstrate that FAITH enhances the factual accuracy and truthfulness of LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出FAITH框架，通过自然语言不确定性信号和外部知识增强大模型的事实对齐，提升事实准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型即使拥有相关知识也会生成事实错误内容，现有方法使用数值不确定性分数缺乏语义丰富性，导致事实对齐不足。
analysis.problem: 如何让大模型在拥有知识时准确回答，避免生成事实不准确内容。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型内部知识状态（可信度）和回答行为（诚实度）的不一致导致事实错误，数值不确定性信号难以被模型充分理解。
analysis.main_method: 将置信度和语义熵映射为自然语言知识状态象限，结合正确性和不确定性设计奖励函数，使用PPO微调，并引入检索增强模块。
analysis.key_experiments: 在四个知识密集型基准上评估，FAITH提升了事实准确性和真实性。
analysis.contributions: 提出自然语言不确定性信号与外部知识结合的事实对齐框架，设计知识状态象限和检索增强模块。
analysis.limitations: 依赖外部知识库质量，计算语义熵可能增加开销。

papers.title: Tessera: Unlocking Heterogeneous GPUs through Kernel-Granularity Disaggregation
papers.abstract: Disaggregation maps parts of an AI workload to different types of GPUs, offering a path to utilize modern heterogeneous GPU clusters. However, existing solutions operate at a coarse granularity and are tightly coupled to specific model architectures, leaving much room for performance improvement. This paper presents Tessera, the first kernel disaggregation system to improve performance and cost efficiency on heterogeneous GPUs for large model inference. Our key insight is that kernels within a single application exhibit diverse resource demands, making them the most suitable granularity for aligning computation with hardware capabilities. Tessera integrates offline analysis with online adaptation by extracting precise inter-kernel dependencies from PTX to ensure correctness, overlapping communication with computation through a pipelined execution model, and employing workload-aware scheduling with lightweight runtime adaptation. Extensive evaluations across five heterogeneous GPUs and four model architectures, scaling up to 16 GPUs, show that Tessera improves serving throughput and cost efficiency by up to 2.3x and 1.6x, respectively, compared to existing disaggregation methods, while generalizing to model architectures where prior approaches do not apply. Surprisingly, a heterogeneous GPU pair under Tessera can even exceed the throughput of two homogeneous high-end GPUs at a lower cost.

analysis.tldr: Tessera 是首个在异构 GPU 上通过内核粒度分解提升大模型推理性能和成本效率的系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异构 GPU 分解方案粒度粗且与模型架构耦合，性能提升有限，需要更细粒度的优化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在大模型推理中高效利用异构 GPU 集群，实现性能与成本的最优平衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单个应用中的内核具有多样化的资源需求，内核粒度最适合对齐计算与硬件能力。
analysis.main_method: 通过 PTX 提取精确的内核间依赖保证正确性，采用流水线执行模型重叠通信与计算，并结合工作负载感知调度与轻量级运行时自适应。
analysis.key_experiments: 在五种异构 GPU 和四种模型架构上评估，扩展到 16 个 GPU，吞吐量提升 2.3 倍，成本效率提升 1.6 倍。
analysis.contributions: 首次实现内核级分解，显著提升异构 GPU 推理性能与成本效率，并适用于现有方法无法处理的模型架构。
analysis.limitations: 依赖 PTX 分析可能增加离线预处理开销，且对极端异构场景的适应性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Mild Over-Parameterization Benefits Asymmetric Tensor PCA
papers.abstract: Asymmetric Tensor PCA (ATPCA) is a prototypical model for studying the trade-offs between sample complexity, computation, and memory. Existing algorithms for this problem typically require at least $d^{\left\lceil\overline{k}/2\right\rceil}$ state memory cost to recover the signal, where $d$ is the vector dimension and $\overline{k}$ is the tensor order. We focus on the setting where $\overline{k} \geq 4$ is even and consider (stochastic) gradient descent-based algorithms under a limited memory budget, which permits only mild over-parameterization of the model. We propose a matrix-parameterized method (in $d^{2}$ state memory cost) using a novel three-phase alternating-update algorithm to address the problem and demonstrate how mild over-parameterization facilitates learning in two key aspects: (i) it improves sample efficiency, allowing our method to achieve \emph{near-optimal} $d^{\overline{k}-2}$ sample complexity in our limited memory setting; and (ii) it enhances adaptivity to problem structure, a previously unrecognized phenomenon, where the required sample size naturally decreases as consecutive vectors become more aligned, and in the symmetric limit attains $d^{\overline{k}/2}$, matching the \emph{best} known polynomial-time complexity. To our knowledge, this is the \emph{first} tractable algorithm for ATPCA with $d^{\overline{k}}$-independent memory costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种三阶段交替更新算法，在有限内存下用轻度过参数化实现非对称张量PCA的近最优样本复杂度。
analysis.research_motivation: 非对称张量PCA在样本复杂度、计算和内存间存在权衡，现有算法内存成本高，需探索低内存下的高效方法。
analysis.problem: 在内存预算有限（仅允许轻度过参数化）下，如何设计算法以恢复非对称张量PCA中的信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 轻度过参数化能提升样本效率，并增强对问题结构的自适应性，当连续向量对齐时所需样本自然减少。
analysis.main_method: 提出矩阵参数化方法，采用新颖的三阶段交替更新算法，内存成本为d²。
analysis.key_experiments: 理论分析表明，该方法在有限内存下达到近最优的d^{k-2}样本复杂度，对称极限下匹配最佳多项式时间复杂度。
analysis.contributions: 首个内存成本与d^k无关的可行算法，揭示了轻度过参数化在自适应性和样本效率上的双重优势。
analysis.limitations: 仅针对偶数阶张量（k≥4），且依赖轻度过参数化假设，可能不适用于极端低内存场景。

papers.title: Byzantine-Robust Distributed SGD: A Unified Analysis and Tight Error Bounds
papers.abstract: Byzantine-robust distributed optimization relies on robust aggregation rules to mitigate the influence of malicious Byzantine workers. Despite the proliferation of such rules, a unified convergence analysis framework that accommodates general data heterogeneity is lacking. In this work, we provide a thorough convergence theory of Byzantine-robust distributed stochastic gradient descent (SGD), analyzing variants both with and without local momentum. We establish the convergence rates for nonconvex smooth objectives and those satisfying the Polyak-Lojasiewicz condition under a general data heterogeneity assumption. Our analysis reveals that while stochasticity and data heterogeneity introduce unavoidable error floors, local momentum provably reduces the error component induced by stochasticity. Furthermore, we derive matching lower bounds to demonstrate that the upper bounds obtained in our analysis are tight and characterize the fundamental limits of Byzantine resilience under stochasticity and data heterogeneity. Empirical results support our theoretical findings.

analysis.tldr: 统一分析拜占庭鲁棒分布式SGD，给出紧误差界，证明局部动量可降低随机性误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有拜占庭鲁棒聚合规则缺乏统一收敛分析框架，尤其未考虑通用数据异质性。
analysis.problem: 解决拜占庭攻击下分布式SGD的收敛性分析，并刻画随机性和数据异质性导致的误差下界。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机性和数据异质性会引入不可避免的误差地板，而局部动量可理论证明降低随机性引起的误差分量。
analysis.main_method: 建立统一收敛理论，分析有无局部动量的拜占庭鲁棒分布式SGD，并推导匹配下界证明上界紧性。
analysis.key_experiments: 在非凸光滑和Polyak-Lojasiewicz条件下验证理论结果，实验支持误差界和动量效果。
analysis.contributions: 提供首个统一分析框架，证明紧误差界，揭示局部动量的理论优势。
analysis.limitations: 未考虑更复杂的拜占庭攻击模型或通信效率优化。

papers.title: FatigueFusion: Latent Space Fusion for Fatigue-Driven Motion Synthesis
papers.abstract: Investigating the impact of fatigue on human physiological function and motor behavior is crucial for developing biomechanics and medical applications aimed at mitigating fatigue, reducing injury risk, and creating sophisticated ergonomic designs, as well as for producing physically-plausible 3D animation sequences. While the former has a prominent position in state-of-the-art literature, fatigue-driven motion generation is still an underexplored area. In this study, we present FatigueFusion, a deep-learning architecture for the fusion of fatigue features within a latent representation space, enabling the creation of a variation of novel fatigued movements, intermediate fatigued states, and progressively fatigued motions. Unlike existing approaches that focus on imitating the effects of fatigue accumulation in motion patterns, our framework incorporates algorithmic and data-driven modules to impose subject-specific temporal and spatial fatigue features on nonfatigued motions, while leveraging PINN-based techniques to simulate fatigue intensity. Since all motion modulation tasks are taking place in latent space, FatigueFusion offers an end-to-end architecture that operates directly on non-fatigued joint angle sequences and control parameters, allowing seamless integration into any motion synthesis pipeline, without relying on fatigue input data. Overall, our framework can be employed for various fatigue-driven synthesis tasks, such as fatigue profile transfer and fusion, while it also provides a solution for accurate rendering of the human fatigue state in both animation and simulation pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 提出 FatigueFusion，一种在潜空间融合疲劳特征以生成疲劳运动序列的深度学习架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 疲劳对运动行为影响的研究在生物力学和医学中重要，但疲劳驱动的运动生成仍未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 现有方法仅模仿疲劳累积效应，无法生成中间疲劳状态或渐进疲劳运动，且依赖疲劳输入数据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 疲劳在运动模式中表现为时空特征变化，但缺乏有效方法在无疲劳输入下生成多样化疲劳运动。
analysis.main_method: 在潜空间融合疲劳特征，结合算法与数据驱动模块施加时空疲劳特征，并利用PINN模拟疲劳强度。
analysis.key_experiments: 在运动合成任务中验证了疲劳特征转移、融合及渐进疲劳生成的效果。
analysis.contributions: 提出端到端架构，无需疲劳输入即可生成多样化疲劳运动，并支持无缝集成到现有管线。
analysis.limitations: 未明确讨论对复杂运动或极端疲劳状态的泛化能力，以及计算效率。

papers.title: RF-LEGO: Modularized Signal Processing-Deep Learning Co-Design for RF Sensing via Deep Unrolling
authors: Luca Jiang-Tao Yu and Chenshu Wu
papers.abstract: Wireless sensing, traditionally relying on signal processing (SP) techniques, has recently shifted toward data-driven deep learning (DL) to achieve performance breakthroughs. However, existing deep wireless sensing models are typically end-to-end and task-specific, lacking reusability and interpretability. We propose RF-LEGO, a modular co-design framework that transforms interpretable SP algorithms into trainable, physics-grounded DL modules through deep unrolling. By replacing hand-tuned parameters with learnable ones while preserving core processing structures and mathematical operators, RF-LEGO ensures modularity, cascadability, and structure-aligned interpretability. Specifically, we introduce three deep-unrolled modules for critical RF sensing tasks: frequency transform, spatial angle estimation, and signal detection. Extensive experiments using real-world data for Wi-Fi, millimeter-wave, UWB, and 6G sensing demonstrate that RF-LEGO significantly outperforms existing SP and DL baselines, both standalone and when integrated into multiple downstream tasks. RF-LEGO pioneers a novel SP-DL co-design paradigm for wireless sensing via deep unrolling, shedding light on efficient and interpretable deep wireless sensing solutions. Our code is available at https://github.com/aiot-lab/RF-LEGO.

analysis.tldr: 提出RF-LEGO模块化框架，通过深度展开将信号处理算法转化为可训练、可解释的深度学习模块，在多种无线感知任务中超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度无线感知模型多为端到端且任务特定，缺乏可重用性和可解释性，需要一种结合信号处理与深度学习优势的模块化设计。
analysis.problem: 如何设计兼具物理可解释性、模块化复用性和高性能的无线感知深度学习模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统信号处理方法依赖手工参数，性能受限；而纯深度学习方法虽性能突破但缺乏结构可解释性和跨任务迁移能力。
analysis.main_method: 通过深度展开技术，将可解释的信号处理算法（如频率变换、空间角度估计、信号检测）转化为保留核心结构但参数可学习的深度学习模块。
analysis.key_experiments: 在Wi-Fi、毫米波、UWB和6G感知的真实数据集上测试，RF-LEGO在独立任务和下游任务中均显著优于传统信号处理和深度学习基线。
analysis.contributions: 首次提出基于深度展开的SP-DL协同设计范式，实现模块化、可级联且结构对齐可解释的无线感知框架。
analysis.limitations: 当前仅针对三种核心RF感知任务设计模块，扩展至更多任务（如信道估计）需进一步验证；深度展开可能增加计算开销。

papers.title: "bot lane noob" Towards Deployment of NLP-based Toxicity Detectors in Video Games
papers.abstract: Toxicity and harassment are widespread in the video-gaming context. Especially in competitive online multiplayer scenarios, gamers oftentimes send harmful messages to other players (teammates or opponents) whose consequences span from mild annoyance to withdrawal and depression. Abundant prior work tackled these problems, e.g., pointing out the negative effects of toxic interactions. However, few works proposed countermeasures specifically developed and tested on textual messages sent during a match -- i.e., when the "harassment" actually occurs. We posit that such a scarcity stems from the lack of high-quality datasets that can be used to devise "automated" detectors based on natural-language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML), and which can -- ideally -- mitigate the harm of toxic comments during a gaming session. This work provides a foundation for addressing the problem of toxicity and harassment in video games. First, through a systematic literature review (n=1,039), we provide evidence that only few works proposed ML/NLP-based detectors of toxicity/harassment during live matches. Then, we partner-up with 8 expert League of Legend (LoL) players and create a fine-grained labelled dataset, L2DTnH, containing 1.4k toxic and 13.8k non-toxic messages exchanged during LoL matches. We use L2DTnH to develop a detector that we then empirically show outperforms general-purpose and state-of-the-art toxicity detectors reliant on NLP. To further demonstrate the practicality of our resources, we test our detector on game-related data beyond that included in L2DTnH; and we develop a Web-browser extension that flags toxic content in Webpages -- without querying third-party servers owned by AI companies. We publicly release all of our resources. Our contributions pave the way for more applied research devoted to fighting the spread of toxicity and harassment in video games.

analysis.tldr: 针对电子游戏中的毒性言论，本文构建了高质量数据集L2DTnH，并开发了优于通用检测器的NLP毒性检测系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 电子游戏中毒性言论普遍存在，但缺乏针对比赛实时文本消息的高质量数据集和自动化检测方法。
analysis.problem: 现有毒性检测器多基于通用数据，在游戏实时场景中效果不佳，且缺乏专门针对游戏内消息的标注数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 游戏内毒性言论在比赛进行时频繁发生，但现有研究多关注事后分析，缺乏实时干预手段。
analysis.main_method: 通过系统文献综述（n=1,039）确认研究空白，与8位英雄联盟专家合作构建细粒度标注数据集L2DTnH（1.4k毒性/13.8k非毒性消息），并基于此开发NLP检测器。
analysis.key_experiments: 在L2DTnH上训练检测器，并与通用及最先进的NLP毒性检测器对比；在游戏相关数据上测试泛化性；开发浏览器扩展实现本地检测。
analysis.contributions: 提供了首个高质量游戏内毒性消息数据集L2DTnH，开发了优于现有方法的检测器，并开源所有资源。
analysis.limitations: 数据集仅来自英雄联盟，可能不适用于其他游戏；检测器依赖特定游戏术语，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: Continuous PT-Symmetry Breaking as a Design Variable for Giant Altermagnetic Spin Splitting
papers.abstract: Magnetic point-group analysis classifies altermagnets but returns only a binary symmetry verdict, leaving spin-splitting energy (SSE) inaccessible without spin-polarized density functional theory (DFT). This binary ceiling is not fundamental. Sublattice symmetry breaking is promoted here to a continuous, DFT-free scalar -- the Motif Symmetry-Breaking Index (MSBI) -- that quantifies $\mathcal{PT}$-symmetry breaking between antiparallel magnetic motifs directly from crystal coordinates. SHAP analysis of an XGBoost surrogate trained on 3,851 DFT-labeled binary structures identifies three dominant descriptors: MSBI (symmetry-breaking axis), motif packing fraction MPF (superexchange axis), and the $p/d$ electron ratio (covalency axis), each mapping onto a directly tunable experimental handle. A controlled VO--CrSb comparison within the same P$6_3$/mmc host lattice demonstrates that composition alone boosts SSE sevenfold. Bayesian optimization over this three-axis space, followed by independent DFT validation, recovers $\alpha$-NiS (SSE $= 0.823$\,eV) as cross-validation against an independent symmetry-based prediction and identifies three previously unrecognized high-SSE candidates -- square-planar FeS (1.297\,eV), octahedral CoS (1.103\,eV), and FeAs (1.089\,eV) -- all matching or exceeding CrSb. Square-planar Fe--S is proposed as a transferable coordination motif for giant altermagnetic spin splitting, advancing altermagnet design from symmetry classification to continuous quantitative optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续PT对称性破缺标量MSBI，结合机器学习实现反铁磁自旋分裂能的定量预测与优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有磁点群分析仅能给出二元对称性判断，无法直接预测自旋分裂能，需依赖DFT计算。
analysis.problem: 如何将反铁磁体设计从二元对称性分类提升为连续定量优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 子晶格对称性破缺程度与自旋分裂能呈连续相关，而非二元开关关系。
analysis.main_method: 提出Motif对称性破缺指数(MSBI)量化PT对称性破缺，结合XGBoost代理模型和SHAP分析识别关键描述符。
analysis.key_experiments: 在3851个DFT标记结构上训练模型，通过VO-CrSb对比验证成分调控可提升自旋分裂能7倍，贝叶斯优化发现FeS等新高能候选材料。
analysis.contributions: 首次将反铁磁自旋分裂能预测从二元分类推进到连续定量优化，识别出方形平面Fe-S配位基序。
analysis.limitations: 模型依赖DFT标签数据质量，未考虑温度效应和实际材料合成可行性。

papers.title: Consensus-based Recursive Multi-Output Gaussian Process
papers.abstract: Multi-output Gaussian Processes provide principled uncertainty-aware learning of vector-valued fields but are difficult to deploy in large-scale, distributed, and streaming settings due to their computational and centralized nature. This paper proposes a Consensus-based Recursive Multi-Output Gaussian Process (CRMGP) framework that combines recursive inference on shared basis vectors with neighbour-to-neighbour information-consensus updates. The resulting method supports parallel, fully distributed learning with bounded per-step computation while preserving inter-output correlations and calibrated uncertainty. Experiments on synthetic wind fields and real LiDAR data demonstrate that CRMGP achieves competitive predictive performance and reliable uncertainty calibration, offering a scalable alternative to centralized Gaussian process models for multi-agent sensing applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出共识递归多输出高斯过程，实现分布式、流式场景下的高效多输出高斯过程学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 多输出高斯过程在分布式和大规模流式场景中计算复杂且依赖中心化处理，难以实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现多输出高斯过程的分布式、流式学习，同时保持输出间相关性和不确定性校准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在分布式设置中无法有效保持多输出间的相关性，且计算成本随数据规模增长。
analysis.main_method: 结合递归推理（共享基向量）和邻居间信息共识更新，实现并行、全分布式学习。
